item.title: Babe? Are you still there?
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Since I was a kid i used to think all the AFTER_Break-up Stuff happens to people are total bullshit
*Oh I Cant stop thinking about her!! *Oh I can't Be without her
But Once your crush/Girlfriend just have an Argument with you Where She's Like I'm Done with you and She tries to avoid you from all the connections you got with her and can't even call their friends just to talk to her because your relationship with her is a kind of secret!
So I can't even tell her sorry by sending her msgs I Cant even tell her sorry by email because what are the odds people accessing their emails nowadays? I Cant even talk to her because I am only good in words here not in real life!(that's what she said)
They say Time will heal all wounds But with the time passing by this stuff is getting worse and worse As the cigarette which is lighted up is ending minute by minute The Cancer is getting in my lungs slowly as the time doesn't want to stop for us The wait is just killing me when I'll get to tell you all the stuff I have been waiting for The meeting of us after all this which happened between us Would be like I Still having butterflies in my stomach and you are still ignoring me not talking to me!
 
Sorry Darling I know it was a total disaster which I did just before the exams but A separation will give both of us a chance to collect our thoughts and decide where we want to go from here! Just hoping A separation for a little amount of time because you not being next to me is like the biggest punishment of all time!
I Don't care if there are other guys who are into you and you gave the special place to that guy Which I Couldn't get in past few months I just wanted you to know about how I feel about you that's it! I didn't cared about the moment which I was saying... But please don't feel bad about it! I am Sorry for ruining our bond and friendship I am sorry for ruining my mental image in your head but does it matter anymore if in your head I was a jerk and Still I am
Sorry baby if you can still try to trust me again Sorry if I don't know if i can call you my baby girl Because even after what I have done I don't think I have that authority to call you that But Sorry for everything I have done with you! Playing with someone's feelings...Messing with the one who used to call me their BFFs... It sucks right? You are right I Should get punishment for that...But for how long? Today it has been like A Year... I know you have already moved on but the feelings which were buried came alive when my music playlist hit your favorite song Alone dancing on that songs with all your moves and the edited lyrics you used to sing in Karaoke Nights we used to have Crazy right? I still remember the way you do everything because you were lil too perfect for me...
Don't Think of me like I was a stalker back then YES i think i was into you Because you were like the only thing which used to matter me in this whole world! My life before you was like a tunnel with you at the end of the Road holding a lamp and giving me hope that things might change! Giving me hope that things might change from here and telling me that everything will be alright just be positive about it! You were the one who gave me a chance to open up with someone I can trust And Like a little kid I used to tell all my stories and like a good parent you used to listen to me no matter how meaningless the stories were! Now you not being by my side, listening to my stories I feel insecure about everything about whom to trust and whom to not The world is not same without you, You never told me what a world would be without you because either of is isn't Scarlett Witch who can see the future The Nicknames we used to give like I used to call me My Dr. Harleen Quinzel Not because you were crazy and my crazy meets your crazy but you were more into psycological stuff and your advises were the one which kept me away from being the person I used to be before you came in my life I'm Sorry Harley Your Joker Just realised his mistakes and This Joker is not like a chaos agent He just needs his Harley back with him just to watch the whole world burn :P Because without you it's like nothing left in my world! You can put all the blame on me I'll happily take it as my mistakes because without you it's like nothing left to be worried about or nothing to live for! Even in the end if we meet and you want to slap me in the face you can! Because If you coming back at me even after all this is like a biggest achievement for me!
Yours truly HL PS:Too Drunk or Depressed to type more

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Superb one😍👌
Thanks vish :*
Awesome bhai mere

item.title: Let Her Go! She's the Heroine!
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: As Sir Henry Miller once said "The Best way to get over a woman is to turn her into literature" But during this time who knew the woman who just got turned into literature will haunt you till the end of your life! Will Mess with your brain and tease you with a Nickname "LOSER" For not trying too hard to get her back! As the life passes and the types of movies we watch we tends to praise the hero and think we are the hero of the film of our lives!  But in this process we forget that we are also villains in someone's else's life! ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ She Came in my life-like a hurricane in my Boring steady life! Faking feelings about her... And being a Secret admirer in her life! Sending her messages from different numbers Just to keep her busy with replying me with messages like "Who's This!?" And reminding myself that the unknown number is Better than me! Silly of me how couldn't I get the hints that she's already into something else! Something bigger than me and Perfect for Her Even where her parents agree on that! Meanwhile I'm Something which is temporary in her life! Days passes...Time Flies Somethings never change! Even today in my phone her contact is saved with some special abbreviation! My hands were shaking and I was being nervous when I was about to delete her number from my phone! Not because she is the one who made me this good! But Because she's the reason why I started to trust people! Every Relationships ends up with some kind of hope! The Hope remains constant with having a positive feeling just like you used to give me lectures on How Being positive helps I Might Never forget those classes we used to bunk just to listen your sweet talks on how hope is a good thing and how no good thing ever dies :') And how Staying positive might help me in a better future! You revealing me about what kind of boy you want! And the next day I try to be that boy and you used to laugh at me and call me "THE IDIOT"! Your Name-Giving power is very good... people still call me the idiot ≧◡≦ Yesterday I retook the test of "How well you know THIS GIRL" Couldnt have courage to use the real name because was too frightened on how would you react reading my name! First time it was 14/15 and so was yesterday's test result! Remembering my answers and making the same mistake again and again!  ^o^ Time Change but some people are meant to be same while other changes! Some people just learn to ignore other people by just sending them message in the end so that they don't feel ignored or stuff! Not blocking them because they will feel sad! Meanwhile with the idiot he doesn't feel bad anyway so blocking him wont matter him...! Isn't this idiot a real human? Maybe he is... Maybe he is not Is he Some kind of sociopath who doesn't care but fall in love with you without knowing your past! Just Think about it Dear! (▰˘◡˘▰) Affectionately Yours HL PS:Too Drunk or Depressed to type more

item.title: Only If You Were There
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: It's a story about a boy meets a girl! But in the end the boy falls in love with the ethics of code by which the girls live by (☼.☼) Sorry Babe! For you it was just another phone call where you were all pissed off but For me it was like the best 8 minutes of my life! Where I was only smiling because i was cheerful to listen to your voice and nothing else! Gone are the days where you used to tell me to behave in front of people and treat people nicely! I know I was savage with you during the exam times,where i was like if THAT guy can get a girlfriend Why cant i? Sorry I was a bit harsh on you on the blocked and unblocked story but they say "if she never blocked you she never loved you" I am thankful for everything you have done for me! But only if you cared about me this time you would have known about how much I have changed since i last met you! It was in the Intensive Care Unit Where you were about to be dead in few moments but your eyes were open And the only thing you saw was the LAST PERSON you want to see in your dead-bed! I Still remember those last words you said to me "Fuck Off Dickhead" And I was happily nodding because I wanted you alive because You were the most beautiful thing happened to me ever! I was so happy just to see that finally you broke your rule and had those words coming out of your mouth! I was so satisfied with those words, Not only Because it were your last words but You had a little chat with me,Who was dead inside for like years ago and cannot be repaired because of the stuff he has been into. It has been like days now and still when I visit that first hospital you were admit in I can still feel your vibe and your presence in the premises,Like you were pissed off the last face you saw in your last seconds of your life when you were fighting the war between being in this world or get back where you came from! Isn't it funny when You used to call me your Batman and you used to be Joker. The Only Reason Why I'm Still in love with the joker I Dont know why you were so mad about the character! or was it the actor Heath Ledger who performed the character joker? Because you were the fan of "10 things i hate about you" and you always used to bring out all those stuff you used to hate about me like *Thinking before you talk *Dont regret later of what you said *Dont assume everyone is dumb etc... etc...! Today when you are not here with me I have already heard about The Upcoming Joker in the Suicide Squad movie.. In your absence i have seen all the Jared Leto Movies and I have told people about what amazing actor he is and I know you hated the Leto since You were a Coldplay Fan yourself! ^o^ I know I'll be missing you on the day when Suicide Squad is releasing because you were the one who told me we will go together, But Some things are never meant to be the way we suppose it should be..! Some Legacies are Meant to be End Just like that! (>_<) Isnt it funny Even though you having thousand of friends on Facebook around 400+ followers on twitter and Instagram and 200+ Whatsapp contacts you didn't had the number of that guy who was there sitting in the hospital,Outside ICU when her operation was going on and the percentage of her surviving was low like any logrithmic graph!! Maybe you had a lot of fun here with people...Maybe thats why god is jealous and he wants to take you from me... She's Still in The ICU... *To Be Continued* Your Lovingly HL PS:Too Drunk or Depressed to type more

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: U just nailed it man...🙌awesome...!!
Thank-you Dude... You are super-Awesome to read and comment here ^_^
Bro! You're about to win too many hearts in coming time.
Haha I wish too bro...😌 She left me with this void in me...gotta fill it with something...😅😅 Thank-you Bro😘😘
Awesome bro. Doin a great job 😀

item.title: Akshita Gupta - 2021-10-21 00:32:26
item.content:encoded: I know m apne backup account se directly Instagram par bol skti thi lekin block ni hona phr se bina message read hue. Obviously, apne ex k frnd se frndshp krne k bahane se aayi bhi nahi thi m, bs aap logo k through uska actual reason jaanne aayi thi ya uski writings padhne as a writer. Phr ap sbki writings padhi toh mann hua as as writer, har writer ko craving hoti hi h aur apki writings ne toh sukoon diya na toh bs, mere suicidal thoughts control ho jaate the aur kya chahiye ek mental illness wale ko. So please meri dusri id se muje block ni krna, m na like krungi na follow na comment, bs writings padhungi time to time.. Aur bs sorry kehna tha jo bhi gusse m ya frustration m kaha mene, ab mujhe ni farq padta saurabh se aur uski life ka m kya kru ab, uski apni life h. Mein move on kr chuki hu bohot pehle. Mujhe bs as a writer, writings ki craving hoti thi, logo ki nahi.. And thank you unn writings k liye jisse mere triggers control ho jate h taki m apni mental illness ko psychiatrist ki help se theek kr pau. Wse bhi mere paas option h ab. Aur ha, agr blog par views badane h toh twitter aur LinkedIn k account connect krdo aur blog k through kamana h toh personal blog m bhi upgrade kroge tb bhi kaafi options aa gye h. Bole the na ek baar, mere blog and apke blog ko bol kr, toh bta rhi, baki apki marzi, meri toh gharwale bhi ni sunte h, baharwale ghanta sunenge. Meri value ni bhi kroge toh mujhe farq ni padega, jyada kisi ne ki hi ni.. And sorry fb par sunane k liye, aur apni id ka backup account apki writings padne k liye toh katai nahi hai, wo toh mera account temporary ban ho gya tha ek comment par report ki wajah se, isliye banaya h, mera har reaction ap par ya saurabh se related ni hota h. Saurabh mera past h, mera present koi aur hai toh har chiz m saurabh ya ex bol kr ghusane ki zarurat nahi hoti h. Bss yhi kehna tha.. Last message to darshan sanghvi, bhuvvi, saurabh and you. Vidhi di achi h, wo samjhti h mera mental illness aur agar m koi link share kru toh ex bol kr awkward ni feel deti.. item.title: Akshita Gupta - 2024-08-09 04:01:35
item.content:encoded:

item.title: I See You (ICU)
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: She Died! (●︿●) Those two words were the worst of the kind when you hear from someone's mouth! It was 1st of April and People were trying to mess with my head by saying random stuff to me It was the worst nightmare of my life yet! But Still Somewhere in his heart, 1% of the chance is like that She might just get up and slap him as promised in the chats,Just before he fell in love with her! Her Body was in the shape just as same as She Expected him to be in after breakup... DAMAGED But Still My Heart was like still beating for her, And many things going in the mind like Why is she still talking to me Even after Trashing my love in that garbage Pit? Maybe I'm too damaged and since she's more into psychological stuff she wants to cure me But Less she knows about me..She's Just trying to be a part of my dark world where she is the queen Already! The Queen where she's like the Female Darth Vader Who is trying to get away from her only Hope! Hope Where Shes holding A Light At the end of the tunnel just like any other Parent who is helping their kid to go Ahead in life! Take the hard path to forget her... Forgetting her was the worst part of my life where my life was in between either her with me or me! What's the point in letting her go when she's never going to see you again but still you want to be with her,Not anything but Be with her Just one more night beside her...Listening her breath as the ECG Beeps and assuming stuff that she wanted to say to me In My Head! Dearly beloved are you listening? I can't remember a word that you were saying It was 3 AM in the morning where almost everyone in the hospital were sleeping Even the ECG also wanted to sleep because even he was tired of monitoring your heart for me Because even the ECG machine was staring at me and telling me "Bro She's never gonna survive this one, it has been months since she's here and you're just spending your time just for those three silly Words" (◡︿◡) The Only reason why the boy was there because she's the last one of her kind! She's the last of her kind because she was the only child of her parents And She's Already out of this world! While I watched her Die when I was frozen in fear! (*︵*) Yours Forever HL PS:Too Drunk or depressed to type more

item.title: Forgetting You But Not The Time!
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
She wasn't there for me at my worst she wasn't there for me at my best She was literally nowhere in my life Then why Should I be bothering about her this much?  (☉▵☉") With that momentum you hit me, Deforming with me..But You were the one with elastic property You never heard what they said about the elastic ones! They lose their properties rapidly In Stagnant water only mosquitos lives and grow up And Major cause of malaria is stagnant water Similarly you were disease to my heart... Now its time I Should Get you out of my system!  <(⇀‸↼‶)> I know I have been "A stupid fuck" in front of everyone you know even god gives us one chance to change everything! Even we get a chance of changing government in every 5 years Why can't you just give me chance to express myself properly! :( People just make image of yours by your action (mostly first impression) And that Image is kept alive till their death Why don't you just give me another chance of changing my THIS IMAGE? Maybe if I get another chance To repair my mistakes Maybe I Might end up screwing stuff because that's what I am :') Maybe that's why you never tried to give me a second chance Isn't it funny you were the one telling me that we will go to GOA and sunbathe for hours Because you were more of a day-person. No wonder why we couldn't manage to get even one date Because I was more of night-person. That could also be explained with why i have dark-circles and you don't!  Because I took yours share from god so you don't look less beautiful with those Dark-Circles I being a fan of Certain TV-Series and Movies I started feeling like The Narrator From Fight-club to Tom Hansen of 500 Days of Summer to Dexter Morgan of Dexter Except Dexter has his need to survive He used to kill people to be quiet while I'm My Own Dexter Where I'm killing myself for satisfying myself! But why am I killing myself when you're not even caring? She said "I Ain't her type!" Silly of her she should know that in any relationships adjustments are made nothing comes in a perfect package Adjustments in life is like completing one's flaws to another person and trying to make a "Perfect couple thing" I know you love being complicated and make things complicated Just because your Favorite movie was The Da Vinci Code! It's Hard to crack just like an egg But How would you know you don't even eat half of the stuff Even if I had a gun pointing towards you You won't even try to argue with me Because you know I wouldn't be the one killing you but kill myself! At least there would be one less crazy person in your life :P I think I waited long for your msg to come by All those thousands of text messages which I would've use in my post were in your inbox only only if you had time to talk to me! But seems like you don't even want to stay with me even for a second
No time to search the world around Cause you know where I'll be found When I come around
Yours Lil Psyco HL PS:Not even drunk enough to make decision that you deserve a better kind of person than me ;)

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Very nice bancho
Superb one Himu😍
Aswome shoe👌👍
Really this was very Touching.....n no one can ever be better then u for her....

item.title: Thank-you Babe
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
​Nothing comes best when you stop using what you are using and start using the better version of product! Just like if one is comfortable using notepad in their PCs instead of Word Let them be! Because some people are meant to be the way they like!  If there would be same type of people around the world Then there would be nothing intresting going in life! They just wake up, Do their Job, Come Back Home, Sleep! There would be no hatred in the people! There would be no rebellions among us!  The world would be a better place where you have been just like me! Maybe i would not have ever liked you in first place because  SAME POLE DOESN'T ATTRACTS.....SCIENCE BITCH :* Relationships are not just meant to be perfect! Couples need to work on behalf of their respective sides to make the relationship works! Maybe she expected a lot from her prince charming but lil she knew the guy was already ready to die for her! Since it was her Set of Ethics which she didn't want to break because she was more into NO Boyfriend thing! But that was fine with the boy because the boy was self-obsessed!  Now When the boy is 20 and his parents think they have taught everything to their child how to live! but little they know the boy also have many secrets like those countless chats with this girl he was deeply in love with! 20 years, Its a big amount of time...Since his first crush to first night_out to his first kiss! Everytime when the boy thinks about these stuff theres a little blush in his face!  The Age 20 is one dangerous one for him If one got surrounding like the one which the boy couldn't handle! The Boy is still managing to be in the world where he is trying to survive!  He just put on his headphones while Eminem on his walkman rapping about his life and motivating him to be strong! He just try to act like a rapper like buying this LA Hat Which the NWA people used to wear,the old school was not the trending topic right now but he is still managing to survive!  As a motive to live this guy chooses Entertainment field!  Watching the movies and tv series and picking up the good quotes and tell that to his friends like! 
You will live a dull and boring life if you dont take risk
The boy got much motivated with this dialoag he risked his only thing which was beating for him! His Heart! He just had a crush on this girl who used to live within her principles! So lil he know he can't be as Cool as the character who told that because that guy was awesome! He was happy with the girl replying him within minuites!,With every reply of the girl, every double tick on whatsapp , the boy was falling for her Finally the day arrived when the boy thought it would be the time he should be confronting his love for her! He was all depressed that day because all his surrounds was either having a past_lover or currently loving someone! The Girl even asked him if he is alright! too many things going through boy's mind! Whether he should tell her? What if she will say no? What if she'll just start to ignore her? What if she will just block him? When he finally said those three magical words  Her Answer was in just two letters! It was N followed by O It has been 3 months since that day! It was 31st of April! Just days before May the FORTH! The force wasn't strong with the poor boy Well thankyou for rejecting the boy's proposal! maybe 5 years from now where you will be happily married to someone and maybe have couple of kids! While he might be still single looking for a girl like you or maybe not like you! Well thank you for being so rigid with the boy! Maybe he can change a bit! and maybe change himself with all that depression stuff he has been going through! The boy thought about writing her a letter about how he feels but Whats the profit of writing the letter which she'll probably end up tearing it! Thats why he is using this post to tell what he feels about you! :) Dearly beloved, It has been a long time since we had a talk on this topic! I got a million reasons off the top of my head that I could think of Now I'm sitting here with your name on my blog I can't believe I went and did this stuff for you My next girlfriend, now her name's gotta be same as yours But your parents were smart enough to just name you as the UNCOMMON one! I stumbled on your picture yesterday and it made me stop and think of All those funny stuff you said! about we going to places and visiting them! Just for the sake of watching me happy again you even told me that you would come with me on a road trip!
But please don't get me wrong, I'm not bitter or mad What else can I do, I haven't got a clue Now I guess I'll just move on, I have no choice but to But every time I think of you now all I wanna just say Thank-you!
By the way now the boy has found out there's no profit in being Drunk and depressed anymore so he LEAVES WITH THIS letter! *Drops Keyboard* HL PS:Happy for you :)

item.title: She Will be Fine take care of Yourself
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Dear Crush <3 You were the glowing light in my dark life they say without darkness there wont be any light No wonder Why Diwali is celebrated in your house without any diyas because That house has you!
We humans are weird We try to find our perfect half for our entire life but then after finding them we just either end up together or just pretend to not accept him/her and move on searching for the Almost-Perfect Half!
All we seek is the happiness we are think we should be getting from the movies we watch and the people we live with. Its okay if your favorite boyfriend is that book you read again and again which is keeping you busy. While she was doing romance with the books, he wrote about the perfect girl he wants to be with(Yes YOU) While watching this, The boy was thinking why can't he get that same romance like that girl is doing with that novel!
 
Didn't I Told you if I lose you,Just like the clouds,My eyes will do the same...It'll Rain Isn't it funny for you I’m like the water on the road! Nobody loves water on roads,Even the Sun Help the road to be as hard as your heart By just making sure the water gets away from your life "FOREVER" You just want the water to find a way out of those pavement and roads,So they just push the water to some other place where it's not bothering YOU!
Maybe I was just want to find something to care about! Like Romeo to Juliet! Like Summer to Tom Like Elliot to Mr.Robot (Spoiler) Isn't it funny when we see those heartbroken shape posters or images One part is usually a little bigger than another! While one is trying to be perfect being the dominating one! Other one is just trying to cope up with the little loss in that heart! But deep inside we all are alive..Its only some part of heart which he/she stole
SHE'S JUST A CRUSH HIMANSHOE MOVE ON! Crushes are really important in life Because once we get to know about their liking we also start working out on stuff like “Am I Fat for her? ”, “Will she agree with me if I am just like this?” And stuff like that which just makes a person a little better than what he was yesterday
People Nearby are asking me why I write stuff…. Do you remember you said you love to read and one day you asked me about my fav. Artist I said its Eminem and you asked me to get his book “The Way I Am”? I Am sorry if I said you wont like his book because it's all about how he came up with all those songs he wrote! Well consider this as my version of the book "THE WAY HIMANSHOE IS" PS:Happy for you and your choices PPS:If it wasnt for you I would have never written all these in first place,Thankyou!

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Amazing! Heartfelt!
Thank you sir <3
This is my second favorite, after silly girl.. ;) nice.. Missing you last line though.. xD
Thank you Bro <3
Good one bro! Like Elliot to Mr. Robot haha

item.title: Still Breathing...
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
The boy pleaded for redemption and explanation for his act but the girl simply forgave him… Only she didn’t forgave him but forget about him
Months Later,When his friends asked him password for his laptop, He wrote it on paper “GET HER BACK”, His friends felt sorry for him because she is never going to accept him But Little they know about the boy as he wants to Get back the innocent nature he lost due to the rage of her rejection and not talking to him without explaination
He even got gifts for her... Everyday a new little gift Now he burn those gifts because the gifts would've done the same thing to him.... A Hug would have given him warmth in the body But now since he is rejected his heart is cold dead but body is warm enough to survive...
Parents Once Said "You don’t drown by falling in the water, You drown by staying there". Similarly in the boy's case he’s not at all moving out from the pit of love he has been fallen already Still in hope that someday she might love him back…
Maybe there would be someone who will love me like i do to you, Maybe someone will understand the value of me... Maybe someone will nomore call me a creep but call me cute... Maybe there exist a girl who can understands me the way i do to you
Friend asked me About new year resolution, Funnily they were Hoping I would leave my drinking habit And become sober But in my mind I was already on the verge of forgetting her... And moving on to still believing in true love But Never thought of the habit because of which people avoid talks with me...
"One man's trash is another man's treasure" No wonder why I was treated as trash...maybe for Something special Now I think I was first trained to deal with such situations so that even If I end up in same situation again With a Perfect one I know what to do next...;)
Thank-You You are a great experience to me... Gave me enough to think about... Gave me a reason to live and Think again why i am important because there are more of you.... THANK-YOU 2016.... You were one good Year You Gave me the worst and the best...Like You are Karma.... I Hope to get Nirvana :P
PS:In the middle of chaos i found you , The World Maybe broken but hope is not crazy....

item.title: Too late
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Breaking my habit of liking you but Sorry if i have been too late It has been series of post where Me, who has shown the rage for the young_blood who took my heart and broke it in pieces

Well it was obvious for any girl to reject me, Not because I was humorously depressing But there were some things about me which nobody liked They are as follows: (The Flaws in Himanshu :P ) 1.I lie a lot of times to hide the real me, Not because I don't want you to explore me and take a little interest in me but I don't want to be the USED product like the hand-wash in any restaurant/hotel 2.I Use Sarcasm to escape any situation I know people hate when someone gives the smart answer and leave the opposite one speechless and do the *DROP MIC* Thing. 3.I don't even have good sense of dressing I Used to wake up every morning take a quick bath and pick up any shirt and come to college without caring if its ironed or not 4.Too Drunk or depressed Me Being an Engineering student and Doing something as my passion (Writing for example) But the posts are depressing because that's all happened with me in my life I wont Blame her for this because she was right at every part of rejecting me 5.Path Still Unclear Thank-you for rejecting my proposal, Because if even we were in relationship it would not have had last longer than maybe couple of months 6.My Taunts are hurting Well if you were my girlfriend you would have end up getting compliments which no-other boyfriend would have thought of it maybe harsh,Bitter,Funny,Sweet,deep,depressing...idk 7.Self obsession Would be one of the major cause of breakup... You Maybe thinking, No Himanshu is nothing like this But That's me... Most of my friends says the reason why no girl is approaching you Is because of your self obsession
“There's no room for demons when you're self-possessed.” -Carrie Fisher(Princess Leia)
8.Always finding flaws in others...
"Nobody's perfect and I stand accused     For lack of a better word, and that's my best excuse" -Billie Joe Armstrong (Jesus Of Suburbia)
9.Language The language you speak shape up your thoughts, Creates an image for others, that image of yourself is then people remember you with
“I wish you could see what I see when I look at you. - Allison Pang
10. Addiction The worst thing about me is addiction If we would have end up having a date in the nearest CCD I would want it again and again... With you because i get addicted to such silly things easily And many reasons i cant think about right now! :P Love can make a calm person go crazy in seconds, Love can make your heart skip a beat and making it realize that s/he is the ONE! Love can make you go stalk them on Facebook daily for couple of hours Love can make you want to call them again and again and ask them this three words..."HOW ARE YOU" Love can make you to do their part of assignment :P Love can make you to write novels and book If you have love for anything Just do it! (hahahaha....) Courage is all you need Himanshu to fight in this world! Your Alter Ego Shoe PS:Just because it's not happening RIGHT NOW Doesn't mean it will ,Keep calm and wait for the iron to get hot ;)

item.title: Stop Being Afraid
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
They blame me for getting drunk that day and having a scar on my face by the bottle of wine Meanwhile everyday is a new you! The day you think to make changes with yourself and try to be what you were years ago

(*And all the faults mentioned in my post below*)

But wast it a wrong day to change OR maybe it was the best day to change... IDK Every evening when he comes home from an exhausting day with a little meet with friends having a talk over tea and cigarettes Learning and teaching them about life stuff they learned from their own experiences Attending college whenever they feel like they miss their hot teacher Those priceless hours spent in canteen And then it made him think whats missing, Little he knew he kinda Broken-down on his academic reports His parents always used to ask him one question "But son, How are studies going on?" And usually his response used to be same "Studies are going same" One fine day he woke up from a nightmare,

(You guys must be wondering it must be the same girl xD)

He dreamt of being detained for whole year because of not attending college and not studying properly Friends nearby are trying to help him with the depression But he did not woke up from the dream when he saw his result of him failing the examination Maybe because he was expecting What bad can more happen with him in his life? Anyway Change is all we need in this world to survive Even caterpillar change itself into a beautiful butterfly Just like in every four years America elect their Honorable President (Not complaining) What part of history we learned If its repeated Failed the first time, Didn't knew my mistake Failed the second time almost knew where i was wrong But not the third time.... At the end of the year its only the academics by which people judge you... Signing off for now Will catch you later Shoe Your Lovingly HL PS:Not drunk but mature enough to know where to stop

item.title: Drunk Call
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Drunk calls are the best No Lies , Just Honesty And moments of true love <3
When I saw my friends making call to their beloved I furiously took my phone and called my best friend Because at that time I was sure that she's the only one who will help me at this hour of time
I Drunk called her at 1 AM We Talked like lovers do. Few Hours later, With sobreity Friendship came back
Told her about the situation Told her every little fight with Sunshine Told her how much I love having these little fights with Sunshine in that one hour call, halfway between the call,she asked "Sharvilak, Are you in love?" I didn't knew what to say... A long silence was the saviour of the day She added "Pagal, Ladki ki photo to bhej, And piece of advice Stop lying to people whom you care about! If she's affecting your little life this much please make sure to make it a special memory of your life" After that sentence, Sharvilak was awestruck, He was confused Whether to tell a lie to the only girl who still believes in him. So Instead of lying this time he said the truth "Umm..Yeah I guess, But That doesn't mean I'll not drunk call you next time" She knew that Sharvilak was in kind of problem plus he was drunk so she went on asking silly questions to make him feel lightly, Like *Why is the moon white and im brown? *Why is your Sunshine Stingers me everyday I go out for morning walk? *Why do you even call her your sunshine when all you do is not look her in college but is your favorite pastime after the college? *Why don't you just call her the moonlight of your life? When she's just gonna be there at night, where you'll end up sobbing and she's listening from far away? Because I already hate her (Just to lighten my mood!) And the leg pulling contest went on for couple of more mins, Then Sharvilak added "I want to be the minority but also at the same time I want to be the major part of her life I want to see her marriage i want to see her kids i want to read them bedtime stories I want to be that person in her life that every morning she wakes up and see the bedtime breakfast and tea is ready for her I want to be the slave of her heart forever and ever, And I know this is not possible... I know , Chaa interrupted me in between saying "Woah, Youre drunk but you sound pretty cute! Where is that guy who makes fun of everything and don't care about Where is that guy whom i used to fight and we end up with having a pretty unforgettable nights of our lives? " Sharvilak added She's my sunshine after all, At the end of the day its only her work which makes the moon shine,Don't forget it's the same moon from which we communicate with each other. Chaa got warned him with the past he had with this girl.... The girl who died hating him even on her deathbed. Sharvilak interrupted her saying that she's sunshine... She's never gonna fail to shine... She shines every day just to make sure that everyone she cares about are doing good!! What am I gonna do when she's gonna leave me some other dude? What am I gonna do when she saying no to my proposal? She said "Dekh Sha Kiara isn't everything, think properly Don't try to do anything hasty I know you don't want to lose her till she's with you And you also know Nothing is permanent" "But-But even we humans aren't here to create something which is immortal... With every breathe I take With every cigarette drag I inhale With every sip of alcohol I know my death is coming soon But I do want to make the best of the days until I'm here... Otherwise why are we alive with having all guilty pleasure" He added with pitching some memories from past to lighten her mood.. "So tell me more about this sunshine of yours... When are you getting bored of her and leave her then we'll chill in Goa... Get some new sunlight and get tanned" She trying to make fun of her to just change the topic Sharvilak was already excited to tell her about the new girl he found and Chaa kinda started hating her already... Not because there was love of BEST FRIENDSHIP it was because for the first time chaa felt a lil insecure because this was Sharvilak who didn't had any good friends other than chaa.. And on the other hand chaa didn't used to get time to talk to Sharvilak because she got many good friends... But Nothing match the craziness with a heart like him Sharvilak was the kind of guy whom you can call on 3AM in the morning and cry he will console you no matter if he has his exam the next day, because he has seen some good friends who can do anything for him and he has lost many of such friends.. Not because he being jealous of them and try to act like them but because of transfers. Sharvilak added "I can't propose her right away just like that.. Remember the previous episodes where I proposed her and she didn't say anything and I was devastated Remember the depression phase which I went through.. Remember how I first told you about my sunshine and she's special because she's only shining there For me... Maybe it's just attraction... Just another...." And then he ended the call.. Tears came out of his eyes while thinking again abs again about the small fight they had the last night he threw his phone in anger because even he knows Kiara couldn't be with him.. Because she's way outta his league... He had an extra cigarette in his pocket.. He took out the ciggrate and burned it As more smoke going inside him the more melodramtic he became Where he was having all those emotions together... Now he started hating himself more... Not because of that fight but just for starting to bleed from pen.. Couple of min later there was a call again... He took the phone from ground... One Big crack on his phone screen... That's when he laughed at himself... At his stupidity... He was too dumb to go on break something which is the only thing from which he chat with her... *Call from Cha* Every Night the Sun sets,its the moon who gives the hope... The World Maybe Broken but Hope is not Crazy

item.title: Hold My Hand
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Memories got flashed back in front of her eyes as she saw the tree She was lost in a memory lane, As the time passes her eyes became watery Didn't know what to do because at one point of her life she was moving on And on the other, she didn't want her new date to know about the past Unknowingly my hand rested on hers, Didn't think about whether the people are watching us or not Trying to console her and with a gentle move on her wrist telling her that everything you're thinking will soon end, And soon enough everything will be alright She wasn't touched like that by any boy except his ex and his family members, At first, I thought its kinda awkward to do that even on the first date. But emotional attachment wins over the ethics and codes of the First date. The emotional attachment win over all the codes we live by, Even when in a corporate lifestyle if the certain work is done with full attention and heart and when the work is complete it leaves us with satisfaction. The Tree was just one of those elements in her life which make her hit country road and travel for a couple of hours, loving the wind and trees which are passing by her car thinking about all the good things that happened between tree guy and her. She's not shy or irritating... She's better than all those girls I have ever met, She's more amusing than 80% of girls in the college She's not at all boring, In fact every time a pessimistic face looks at her Even they smile and think, I so want to be like her.
If you spend your whole life waiting for the storm, you'll never enjoy the sunshine. -Morris West
Hours later When I was in my room, Downing beers and was just remembering the past meanwhile, she was on the call with me on the other end I told her about how I am not capable of doing what I am Doing  I think I should Quit my engineering. She only said three words which are still ringing in my ears "What About Me?" After Couple of minute of silence, She said Look, that's why I don't want you to even think about quitting. Because of you today I'm capable of enjoying all the small happiness of the life. I don't want you to quit on me, At least you are at a better place than the others Minutes Later I got a WhatsApp message from her "If you are still thinking of quitting I will personally come to your room and kick your ass" That message was just enough for me to know the importance of her in my little life Still, at the end of the day, it's just her reaction of not resisting that feathery touch on her arms which make him think that whether he was right or wrong. PS: Drugged from the first touch by your hand PPS: There was never a night or a problem that could defeat sunrise or hope.

item.title: Addiction
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
The Secret Ingredient to his smile was the joint of marijuana Not her Smile or Her Existence in his life Because it has been months she has left
And in the dead atmosphere near him There were bottles of alcohol lying around his house That explains why "Too Drunk or depressed to type more" The addiction for being dizzy went away where there was rise in the new day The rise of the Sun which made every other thing looks like worthless and undesired The Rise of a new hope which changed the whole future for the boy
He started talking to a girl regularly And soon enough he realized that The guy who used to blush while even peaking at marijuana is no more affected by the joint but is more affected by just one look of her Her Grin was the only thing that meant him the most momentarily, Now the Secret Ingredient to his smile was Hers
Now the boy is addicted to someone else The nicotine-addicted mind is now addicted to the artistic soul of her Smoking Breaks were used to chat with her and no cigarettes were consumed because the brain was busy with the only drug the boy had..."HER" Attachment leads to Addiction Addiction leads to Bond Bond leads to Love Love leads to Cravings Cravings leads to Expectations Expectations leads to Depression Depression leads to Breakup Breakup leads to Detachment Detachment leads to Separation Separation leads to Loneliness Loneliness leads to Demotivation Demotivation is enough to screw one for a moment... So live the moment for yourself because life may not give you to blink eyes for next As Ewan McGregor once said "You are an addict So be addicted, Be addicted to something else. You've got to channel it You've got to control it" Even if you're not there with me tomorrow I may go back to where I started... Or maybe not It just we do it for the satisfaction or just to keep us entertained for a whole long day.
The satisfaction we get from doing the certain thing, for example, I started Writing on this site because at one point I thought she won't read my Facebook status, Neither would read my WhatsApp status plus she has already moved my contact to blocked list on her phone and was marked as spam in her email ID. That's why a link she would just open and read it. In a single hope, I used to keep myself in a sphere of Comfort explaining myself everything will be alright, Thus writing for her became the addiction of mine.
 
PS: Love the addict Hate the addiction PPS: Written after when you said about your opinions on the enigma...Remember the three calls? ;)

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Mmhmmm! Amazing!
Thank-you Dada :)
To ab ldka sudhr rha hai.. New girl?
Or maybe New Alternative to old Me... 🙈
Every blogger had a past love which never came in their life. But it's help to improve us as compare to others people.

item.title: Pulling Teeth
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Envelope 1/5 After an exhausting first half at college Sharvilak was tired of attending all the lectures as his name was on the detention list And it was necessary for him to attend the classes otherwise he would not be allowed to give the End-Sem During recess time while he was at his favorite Shop Sipping his Favorite soft drink with Cigarette Suddenly his phone vibrated  and it was supposed to be a call from ....  "Her" Kiara had no idea about the liking he recently added to his list of addictions,  but their relationship had been as strong as a diamond-carbon bond, Nothing could break that bond easily "Hello?" "Yeah you, Where are you?" "I'm just going to my class just near the institute, " he said "Remember you gave me five envelopes and said I can use it anytime I wanted?" He blushed and felt proud for the first time in his life for doing something stupid "Yeah, I Do Remember" "Well I think so I might use one of them by then end of the day" In less than a second, The grumpy him changed into an excited him She said: "You Remember the place where we first met?" "Oh, where you used to meet Voldemort?" We never used to call his ex by his name, so we decided that he should be  referred with something  which should not be his name, So his name doesn't make her feel unhappy. First love is indeed hard to recoup from. Even though Sharvilak was having his name on the list of students who are not allowed to give exams he took the risk for Kiara. Because if he wanted her she would have even done the same for him. Kiara, on the other hand, was an explorer She used to love traveling and trying out new places. So her parents decided to give her moped, Couple of months later while taking admission in college she made a smart move and selected a college which is 35kms away from her house, Her parents had no choice but to give her car because the hostel accommodation  was only for people who don't live nearby the college. it was 2:30 pm as the sun was right up in the sky, she came by her car to his place instead of college, Because He didn't want any controversy of him going out on a date with a girl who is way out of his league. After the Nostalgia of spending a perfect evening spent last time they met, both were expecting a lot... A Black Fiesta came by and stopped right in front of him as she furiously bashed the words "Hop in" Like There's a WW-II Scene, As she has declared war against the world with him on her side. He winked at her and asked "So what's the big occasion you called me suddenly in the middle of the day when that hot ma'am lecture was scheduled next? You don't like she flirtin.." She interrupted him in between by adding "Yeah, That's why you were ready to come with me anytime of the day even after being in the least deserving student to give final exams" And in the middle of the leg pulling he realized that she's the one who is worth falling for but only when she's there to pick him up again like mothers do... Mothers Don't just disown their children just for one small mistake "So Where are you kidnaping me to miss?" "Just put the goddamn AUX to your phone and You remember the playlist we made on your phone?" A couple of songs later when they were both singing the song without caring about how in tune they are singing... The car was headed to the countryside which was near the city and the connection to the both the cities, Kia had this plan of getting to the nearby cafe near the countryside and chill with him. During pit-stop Kiara turned her head towards him with a heavy emotional look on her face, He saw the bewitching eyes of her was started to fill with water, She was about to burst into tear when suddenly he held her hand firmly and looked in her eyes with a sweet smile,  kissed her on the hand and said "I know, I Know why I have been kidnapped and why without arguing I came for this hangout, Well Don't worry about that dear, We waste our time looking for the perfect lover, instead of creating the perfect love we always wanted to share with them. " Those words made her feel a little strong and proud about her decision of not believing in anyone's else rather than Him. She hugged him and tears rolling down her cheeks were now drops of faith to fight the cruel world. That was the first time when Kiara felt so good after crying She understood the quote she had on her phone "Cry as hard as you want to but just make sure that when you stop crying, you never cry for the same reason again" Couple of minutes later when She asked for a smoke he said he might find cigs in his bag, Browsing halfway through his bag she found out an old picture of Sharvilak with a girl "Dude why is this picture in your bag? is she your crush or something? This pic looks like a Princess is standing next to Naukar(Servant)" She said it with a sarcastic touch of humor "Yea Kiara, I used to be her servant, She was heartbroken just like me, She bought her broken heart to my Garage of Love, Since the blood was same our heart matched and she recovered from the heartbreak by taking all the parts of her broken heart from me and leaving me incapable and lost. The people who touched my heart, are the ones who broke it.Then came entry of a beautiful girl found me writing a story which may reflect a bit of her storyline". He was not sure  if Kiara was his fan or friend first, What made her fall for him? Maybe the write-up was reflecting her life story somewhere, or maybe she just believes in fairy tales and she's still struggling to fight for one. Since he cannot ask what is the back story of her and Voldemort, he preferred discussing about his personal life stories which were unheard by anyone in his friends. She's the kind of girl with whom one can easily fall in love with, She's the kind of girl with who is everybody's myth, She's the kind of girl who  lives in others heartbeat. Cause she is the synonym of love for him She blushed for a little while and was thinking about why he has been hiding this story for about three years of his engineering life and suddenly is now saying the truth. Everything that he is saying is making sense to what she had been thinking about him since the day she first saw him. Minute by minute she felt a little more confident about the guy she trusted for the moment  she is suffering from *To Be Continued* Part-2 PS: Finding you was like Coming home

item.title: Castaway
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Part-1 Part-2 She kept her legs on The Dashboard Opened her hair Lit a cigarette Looking at the Picture "Why can't you be this happy anymore I have been knowing you since past 3 years and haven't seen you this happy" She asked him while puffing cigarette of his favorite brand. "Weren't you the one who said when a thread is detached and then attached there's a tiny knot between the thread?" "Yeah, I Do remember it was from one of those silly fights we used to have..." looked at each other and they burst into laughter. Finally, after Couple of hours drive, they reached their destination. It was a Cafe-Restaurant with a crisp ambiance and Sun made the place look like a paradise. It was 4 pm in the evening, As Kiara informed her parents that she's with friend they're working on a project and will be late Acoustic songs were playing in the cafe it was open air space with only two couples in a huge space The waiter showed them their table, it was a small round table just for both of them and a perfect for couples "Why don't people come here? It is such a beautiful place" "Sir actually we started this store few of days ago and you might still be our first 100 customers, We also serve alcohol" looking at him the waiter said Sharvilak turned to Kiara and wanted to hug her just to show him a place like that it was a heavenly match both Kiara and Sharvilak... One was the inquisitive person while the other used to love his own room and the only time when he used to leave the room was just to smoke or just go to college, Another reason why his name was on the detention list "So why is it always the heartbroken post?" she asked while sipping her Cafe Cappuccino "I Don't know Kia, People hate being in a relationship for two reasons... Either they have a bad experience or they are just forced to be in one" "I wonder which one I come on" Patting her back "Don't worry Baccha...You will be the perfect Girlfriend" She blushed and then got up pulled sharvilak towards him as she wanted to take a tour over the recently constructed site. Sharvilak took his Cafe Frappe with him and started walking with her After couple of minutes later he pinched the question "So why here? Who told you about this place?" "Do you have any idea what's my favorite hobby other than being online?" "Travelling, Oh yeah, the only passion where you need no talent. So you are basically Dora The Explorer but a bit matured and got a license to drive" Taunting her in every possible way "TU KARTA BHI KYA HAI? " She said fiercely and felt a little insulted She added "Even your favorite song is "The Lazy Song" by Bruno Mars, Where the lyrics go 'Turn the TV on, throw my hand in my pants' Plus you're such an introvert and your only special talent is to make a sarcastic comment all the time and...." Before she could finish her sentence and break into tears He held her hand "Kia you know why you are here with me?" "So just you can make fun of me?" "For that, I have my friends I have my ex, How dare anyone laughing at you and your stupidity?" He started stroking her hair and said "No Kia, You're too much precious to be made fun of......... Ms.No Talent" "Stop it you Now!" Pulling him towards her and sweet slapping him One touch by her made sharvilak blushed for weeks.. that slap kept him happy for days On the other hand It was 5:30 Already and the DJ Started playing romantic songs Sharvilak said "If I had to describe you in one sentence I would have said...." She interrupted him "Ladies First, Bitch" " Ohh Lady Jesse Pinkman Calm down.... Okay you go" "Ummmmm.....You are the type of guy who is told to be in a happy place but I Dunno why you punish yourself and be the only sad one in the mob, Why you are still obsessed with that girl. It's okay if you still believe in yourself that she will come back " Sharvilak first time in his life felt a little proud of how he tried explaining his situation via WordPress and said "Aww... that's so sweet" as soon as he finished his sentence he kissed Kiara on the cheek and he pulled her on the dance floor Meanwhile, every word Sharvilak lip-synced, it made her fall in love with him 'I'm never gonna dance again The way I danced with you.........' After couple of romantic songs when sharvilak pulled her out of the Dancing area and now both were facing their heads to each other, his hands wrapping around her waist and hers were over his neck, Sharvilak said "if I would've given one line to describe you it would take me months to write everything about you that too in encrypted format...." "Don't you dare leave me like this!" she said while pulling his neck towards him " Theek hai baccha, wait!"' After kissing her forehead instead of lips he said "You are Phoebe Buffay but a little weird" "That just doesn't make sense, All my life I used to think I am Monica Who is having a well-organised life who is a hygiene freak and loves to be the host of the party and just like her I am waiting for my Chandler" "Baby, It's Okay...Life doesn't have to be perfect, It just has to be lived" She felt safe being in anyone's arm like that since her last heavy-breakup. For her, Sharvilak was the clothing clip to keep her on the rope of hope on her worse days "So Tonight I got nothing up in my schedule What's up with you? You free for the night?" She asked "I Don't think so anyone would be wanting me on Friday Night anyway" As it was Half day the next day in college plus it was declared a Common Bunk on that day on his WhatsApp group. "I'll Just tell my maid to not to come for the night...Sounds perfect?" "Cool" *To be continued* Part-3: Sweet 16

item.title: Sweet 16
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Part-1  Part-2 Part-3: "So what are you going to write on the envelope? It's the first envelope you're going to fill up and keep...." "Just wait for the four envelopes to finish first na bacchu" She said while stroking his hair As they were leaving from the cafe and moving towards their car Kiara asked him whether he is interested in looking out the Ghost-House which was popular back in those days? Sharvilak is a kind of guy who gets scared easily, No wonder He haven't seen any of those Man-Made ghost houses, He simply said No by saying "IDK if it is safe for girls there" She rested her head on his chest and asked him in a low tone "Arey mera bacche ko bhooto se darr lagta hai?" Sharvilak hugged her with Trembling hands and replied her with fear in his voice "It's not like that, If we take a stop anywhere now we won't be getting booze for the night" She senses something wrong here, She wrapped her hands around his shoulders and kissed his cheeks and said "Don't worry baby I'm already high on having too much of you... You know You're the kind of drug not everyone wants but you're the kind of drug I especially don't want to share with anyone, As Roxy Music once said 'Love is the drug and I need to sc...." And before she could complete he kissed her on lips, She was too kissing him and that was the first kiss of their relationship. It just happened suddenly in that moment, and they slipped into their own oblivion "Acha okay let's get Wasted" After the kiss, she got excited as she was not kissed with that passion in that one minute of osculation, As when two surfaces/Curves touch in at least three points is called as osculate. But in this case, two souls were adjoining at all possible points. Cruising towards his house, She was talking about how she hated being in the same class with those people who has broken up with her after being in a relationship and how she is not attending classes just to avoid him and other things In a nutshell, the kiss was a confirmation of her trust, evidence of her love. A transparent indication of her feelings she'd been hiding all this while. And she noticed the same smile on his face as the picture with that girl, Finally, she saw the happy face which was hidden behind the clown... The Joker "Aaj mera joker itna khush kyu dikh rha hai?, Finally 50 shades darker dekhne ko Harley Quinn mil gayi kya" winking at him "Okay but mere parents allow nahi karenge to date a girl on valentines day" And for every leg pulling there was an unconvincing half-baked reply With every lame and lousy excuse, he was convinced she was forgetting her past and trying to live the moment Sharvilak felt like celebrating the exact time and wanted to smoke too, He took the car at a lakeside and parked it on a roadside, They both got off the car, Kiara was holding a pack of his cigarettes, There was nobody at that time of the night. Kiara saw the moment and held his hand and breaking all the stereotype quickly sat on one knee and said "Sha.... I don't know how to put this in words but I want to say how much I feel safe with you, With you it's like I can open myself up, I can talk to you continuously for hours and this haven't been any problem to me, or I should say 'us'..." Sharvilak picked her up and gently told her to give him the pack of cigarettes before she throw it on Lake After a sad gloomy face of Kiara He lighted the cigarette and started smoking as she was speechless to see the rude behavior of sharvilak. She slowly started to walk away and then he sat down on his knees and said "Since you were not going to complete it may I?" And then she ran and jumped into his arms with uncontrollable tears And hugged him. He said " In all my life, I have never felt so complete. I just don't feel happy with you but I'm satisfied. I feel safe in your arms. I never thought I'd depend on any human ever again and these cigarettes have been my only companion. Would you mind if I replace them with you? Would you mind being the warming cigar smoke on the coldest of my nights?" "YES YES YES, Sharvilak I will be the nicotine you want to addict on to.....You Silly boy" They kissed and it was passionate from both side and it was the first kiss after coming into the relationship... It was 16th of January 2017. The Number 16 still makes him giggle and think about the Proposal.   As they were reaching home sharvilak took out his phone and ringed his dealer to deliver the booze at their home, Kiara was very excited as she hasn't been loved this deeply. And the First time she'll be boozing with his boyfriend. As they reached their destination, Kiara's phone rang *To be Continued* PS: Meeting you was fate. Becoming your friend was a choice but falling in love with you was beyond my control

item.title: Birthday Plans
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Sharvilak was chilling with his friends at his friend's house As they were having a fight on Which biryani taste better, is it Lucknowi Biryani or Hyderabadi Biryani The fight started from a casual talk to why they put the Cardamom in Biryani, Are they insane trying to ruin the perfect taste in the mouth, maybe God made a mistake putting Cardamom in the recipe like the Powerpuff girl's intro sequence Suddenly there was a call from Kiara 'Hello, Who's this?' Said Kiara 'Obviously Me Dickhead' 'Was just confirming if you are with someone or alone, Anyway I called you coz' 'Oh Now, you need reasons to call me?That's strange Kia Sup?' 'Nm babe you say' 'Babe, Hmm... actually I'm in the middle of something can I call you later?' 'Okay listen, I'm throwing a Birthday Party this weekend, Cancel all your plans for this week coz I want my slut muffin with me ' 'Sure horny buns I will be there, Got to cancel plans for the week' Who was on the call? Who's Miss Horny buns? Are we still on for this weekend? Were the questions asked by his friends just after the call Sharvilak has five close friends whom he trusts and believes. No matter what the difficulties are these five guys are the only people in the world he trust Ankit, Yash, Avinish, Sanket, And Himanshu Together Forms A.Y.A.S.H (Enjoyment in Hindi) They together do all the AYASHi in the world and Don't forget to call up for any opportunity of fun Since they all were very active in other activities and Do Random stuff to make themselves and group satisfied The best part of this group was There were circumstances in which they felt alone they just start typing in the WhatsApp group of five and relieve all the tensions of their life 'United we stand, Divided we fall' But the best part about this five people was They never felt a need to be separated Their love for each other was Pure. If any one is happy everyone celebrates the little joys of that person. If anyone is sad everyone joins the conference call and talk him out of sadness. The Best part of having a group like this is another reason why one wants to go to college every Damn day. Sharvilak got up took out a cigarette out of his pocket and said 'I Am sorry guys, I got a call from a friend of mine, she's having this big Birthday party thing on Saturday, Mushkil hai boss' 'Yaar Tu har baar aaisa karta hai' said one of the friend 'Next time pakka yaar', She's my childhood friend You know I rarely got friends outside this college and she is with me since past some years' 'we also would like to meet this FRIEND of YOURS' started teasing one of the friends 'Pagal ho kya? She might be ....' he took a long pause took a drag from leftover cigarette and then said ' you know' 'We Know Nothing Sharvilak, Please enlighten us' 'Don't try Game Of Thrones tactics on me, I won't fall this time' And the leg pulling continues for couple of mins, Then Sharvilak left for his home and called Kiara 'So what's the plan?' 'Arey my friends are going home during the time my birthday' 'So You're throwing a birthday party for yourself, You got the coolest friends ever' 'Stop it Yaar, So Fusion is the place where the party is, and yeah don't forget to bring gifts Idiot...You remember, Last time the worst gift was of yours' And she starts teasing him and enlighting him to bring a gift to remember As he saw a difference in the tone suddenly as if her parents came by and they told her not to talk to sharvilak... Kiara had a really rough childhood but she survived and recovered from that fall, And now she stands as one of the most adored women for sharvilak. Sharvilak always used to ask stories of her that how she survived that wave of sadness and depression and stays one of the most artistic soul in this meaningless/Selfish world, How she fought with all those Negative thoughts/ vibes that come across
She was the only TED Talk he used to listens to
PS: They Say some friends are for the lifetime and I think I just got mine. Thanks for staying up late night and listening to my crying, and tolerating my anger for silly reasons, I Can't Thank-you guys more... Part-2:Espionage

item.title: Letterbomb
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: I'm sorry for keeping our relationship secret i Guess thats what happens when when you're too afraid of telling people that you are in a relationship with me!? I agree you're way outta my league but does it matter when you're the one who's ashamed of telling people that you liked me or in relationship with me? I know I'm not the one who should be talking like this because i was your slave this whole time... Just like that dog who wigs his tails and say yes to everything you do... I think i was ready for this day... Where I'll be sad and happy at the same time just to see you're happy... But with another man... I know it hurts to even think about it... But i think I'm probably much too late to just apologize you ... The apologies also have an expiry date... Remember how you used to love dancing in the rains... Remember how you used to call my friends and force them to hate me.. Remember how you used to like when i used to kiss your forehead and play with your hairs.. But isn't it funny you gotta start again with the new guy... From telling him how you hate gifts to how to love getting pampered every time, you gotta tell him your favorite ice_cream. Why you love that specific tree, that exact bench. Why you still loves to ride your bike fast... Isn't it a bit irritating to just invest time on him. And tell that dummy about everything you like and dislike and in return all you need is to be taken care of...!!? Send my love a letterbomb and tell her to visit me in hell And now you are going leaving me on 'our'road. But now I feel that road is becoming mine as you have someone else's footsteps to follow. We shared same photoframe but now its fine. I will crop. I will smile. I will make my own day shine and night beautiful. You know there are trillion stars that shine everyday without fail? Sometimes there are clouds to cover them but then too they never fail to keep their promise. Though they are far. They can't see me from there. But then too they shine! Let me make my own way and I will plant flowers and dew drops will shine on them every morning. Coz however the night is stars will shine. However the day is dew drops will shine Yours Always HL

item.title: Espionage
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Part 1:Birthday Plans Part-2: Sharvilak wanted to try everything best to Kiara as they became close as friends since past few months and wanted to give all his attention to her   Deja Vu all over again as he selected and rejected the same gifts which were given to her by him. Sharvilak Calls his friends (AYASH) and asks them for helping him to find the perfect gift for her. Kiara seems to be one of those girls with a care-free attitude who loves traveling and still believes in postcards than greeting cards or a WhatsApp Message. "What could've been a perfect gift to her than to gift her some of those old postage stamps, or maybe a mailbox " sarcastically suggested one of the friends. Little they know they've already met Kiara and she's nothing like the one boy described her. She's not the kind who shows her real color in front of anyone. She prefers to hide her inner self within herself and her closed ones Since she had a rough childhood and some memories are impossible to forget but easy to retrieve. 'Just Give her the cash, She will get anything she wants...' Said one of Sharvilak's Friend who was just jealous to see how much he cares about her 'But I don't want to be her uncle who has a little crush on her since she started her adolescence. I Want to be that guy who heard all her personal interest and want to give a gift' 'So What are her interest?' 'She needs a trip to Pune All Alone in her Ford Fiesta with all her favorite songs playing on the stereo, Just a Long Trip, Just to meet her best friend Alisha.' 'There you go, And Yeah Please send the pics of that party too and tell me her reaction' Said his friend while leaving the scene It was 13th August 2016 The Gift_Giving day Finally arrived while he was shit scared to give her the mixtape he created for her. That evening he dressed up with his all time favorite Black Shiny shirt with a waistcoat and blue chinos with shoes, adding up to the getup he applied cologne so that she doesn't smell the cigarette smokes, He picked up the pen drive which was filled with the songs of her all time favorites and went to the hotel where the party was going to held... Fusion Cafe & Longue The place where she was hosting her party, The Place was just one of those perfect places to throw birthday parties with the cool ambiance playing rock music like that place is only there for the parties and nothing else. While Sharvilak was late than the time he was expected to come on, Kiara didn't mind because she was busy with 20 of her good friends. Kiara asked him what he'd got gift for her he simply replied that he wants to be the last one to give the gift when she's drunk so she doesn't even remember what the gift was On one hand, he was scared on will she like the gift, On the other hand, he was excited to give the gift since it was the first time where he spent like 40+ Hours to search for the songs download it from the internet and arrange in the order of what she would love to listen. To assist him he got in contact with one of her friend Rhea who was also eager with the idea of giving her mixtape. While the opening couple of gifts which were cosmetics and other beautiful branded products, like she needed to apply something more to look beautiful, He scoffs. After few drinks Rhea gave the same mixtape which was made by him, it was confirmed when Kiara insisted her to show what's on the pen drive... As soon he saw all the similar names of the songs with a special note after every 10 songs which were a voice note from her talking about the time that was well spent with Kiara and how thankful she is to be with her. As soon as he heard this Sharvilak left the scene and fled to the nearest gift shop for getting her some decent gift. On the other hand, When the first voice note was played it was a familiar voice of Sharvilak Even Kiara was shocked that how in the world Rhea and Sharvilak know each other? Then Rhea explained everything that how she forgot to give her gift as she is always the one who doesn't give the gift to people alone but with someone. As soon as Kiara hears his voice her eyes were searching for him. Sharvilak was running out of ideas, as he was not in a financial condition to give her enough FuelPoints to roam around Pune and come back. The Blank Cheque things don't work in 2016. he came back to the hotel with an apology letter he improvised and kept it in the stack of the envelope he was carrying. And as soon as he entered the hall Kiara was furious that where is her gift, She demands it now? while reaching his pockets for the gift accidentally he removed all six envelopes he was carrying and told her that this is her gift. 'Bunny, Why you disappeared suddenly from the scene when Rhea handed me that pen-drive?' She said 'Actually, I forgot your gift in my bike, So I went to take that..!' 'So what do we got here? 5 Empty Envelopes and 1 filled, is this some kind of your silly game which I don't know the rules about?' 'Uhh....Actually, the filled one is for me...it's the rules which I will be reading for you, the other 5 are for you!' hesitated sharvilak while giving the five empty envelopes. He Improvised the situation and romantically held her hand and started singing the song 'Just the way you are' Kiara thought that he was being romantic meanwhile he was just improvising the situation

When I see your face There's not a thing that I would change Cause you're amazing Just the way you are And when you smile The whole world stops and stares for a while Cause girl, you're amazing Just the way you are

'Stop with this song you know how much I love Bruno Mars' Kiara said while she couldn't stop blushing '5 envelopes are for the five times when you feel alone, lonely or you just want some cigarette breaks at my favorite place This is your Willy Wonka Golden Ticket to spend some quality time with me' As soon as Kiara heard this, her heart knows no bound, She was overwhelmed and with a warm hug she welcomed that gift and she whispered to sharvilak that this was the best gift she got in this year. She wanted to kiss her at that exact time but since they were just good friends plus she didn't want to spoil the special bond they have between them.   PS: Kiara Never told Sharvilak that she knows about the Rhea's gift is actually sharvilak's gift at that day but told him just the day after the proposal "Sweet 16"
