item.title: Birthday Gift that He served..!!
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Special shout-out to her... After many days this post touched my heart... :')

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
O:8:"stdClass":8:{s:5:"title";s:34:"Birthday Gift that He served..!!Â ";s:4:"type";s:4:"post";s:9:"mime_type";s:0:"";s:6:"format";b:0;s:12:"modified_gmt";s:19:"2017-10-17 12:01:21";s:9:"permalink";s:80:"https://scenicscriptssite.wordpress.com/2017/10/17/birthday-gift-that-he-served/";s:7:"content";s:3093:"
So, It'was My Birthday..!! My Phone started to beep Every creature Was most Likely to talk With me. All Of My Friends My family members And everybody was Just Like dam take the call. Hey pretty people Not because I couldn't take those calls But Bcz I didn't want it to. I was On A stroll To Fulfill A wish That Means A Lot Big To My small World. Ya ya Don't get confused.  It Was My Birthday But Instead Of having A gift I Wanted To gift Someone what He desired. That someone wished For something Strange but Yes It drive me Even A Bit More Crazy. Oh.... !! Now, You are eagerly Waiting What Was That Wish He desired For..?So It was A wish Special wish...  "To FORGOT The complete World" Just For A while !! He asked me !! Being Neciest Of  Every Friend He wanted me !! "Wished for Sitting Under the House Of "Almighty's sky",  And Simply To Go on a Endless House Of "Magnificent Talks" Only He and Me"  It seems Little weird But ya It Hitted My Heart Then Anything Else.whole of the world was lost in their sleep. but I Found Myself Totally Lost In That "priceless conversation" with him..!! It was the best Gift I got On That special day..!! A bunch of "sweet talks" Wrapped In "Precious Time",  such A "Sparking bond" Tied with beautiful Red Ribbon Depicting our special "friendship"  And That Peachy sticker Of "His Name" on That Unforgettable Gift" Ohh My God !! The Best Gift I got on My Birthday !! My day was shining With A endless Flow Of Happiness Because of That miraculous Gift. Now You say How Could I take The call Of Others.When I was Already On A Endless journey Of  marvellous Talks With such a scenic being. It was He who Understood That Above all the fancy restaurants I wanted A Night With Moon And Sky.He undestood That gliston accessories ,expensive stuffs High status ,and Heavy Monetary gifts do not attracts me. But Yes Gentle words from An Innocent Heart does. He Bought That wondrous gift To me,And Such A stupid He was..!! He said "I didn't Gift Anything To you." Now How To explain That stupid While Rest of the people served artificial Gifts He Gifted Me something Original that He is not going to get back "His precious time "Best present is "Time" Not Money and levish life style" So Guys whenever you look for presenting something everlasting to some one very special gift them your Time,  Togetherness, tinges of love and above all "Memories" that will last for one Complete life, not just for a span of Time, Thank you so much friends,  As you all spared your precious minutes, reading this Article, keep supporting and happy reading Pretty souls. By :-PRACHI AGARWAL
";s:15:"images_mirrored";i:1;}

item.title: Broken Arrow
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Envelope 3/5 After a bad date in Kiara's House 'why don't you trust me, Kia? Shreya has nothing to do with me it was a just one-time thing, she asked me for lift And as nobody in our mutual friends except you lives in that area so to meet you I took that road but after leaving her when I called your home you were not there' 'Stop it you, with your silly excuses, I Have seen you with her couple of times I should have known from earlier I still Remember your proposal....or I should say I was a VICTIM of one of your ALTER EGO. If you really had nobody in your mind then why you took more time in just accepting it? You know what, EVERY TIME....EVERY SINGLE TIME.... all you want to be is the hero of the hour Aaaandd you know what? I Haven't seen anyone this manipulative You really know how to play with brains Not only you played with my feelings but with my trusts too you know bunny why I don't trust people naaa'

Hearing a false accusation Sharvilak went near Kiara to hug her, to make her believe everything she's thinking People say only one kiss could be enough proof to make her believe. As soon as he came near her she moved away making him feel guilty

'You know what bunny, I Hate you even more, More than those sleazy guys who were trying to get into my pants for a night. At least they do some commitment promise and they try to complete the task in the given time and at least woh dhokha to nahi dete aaise!' Listening to this sharvilak lost his temper and said

' Kia, I Don't know where did I do wrong, she's just a friend darling, Nothing more babe' 'Don't you babe me, Mister, And what's with her obsession all the time? And, What's the call also? every fourth day she calls you' 'But Kia, Listen to me naaa... She only calls me for the assignment stuff and homework, Nothing else we talk about dear and secondly why in the world would I talk to her about the RANDOM GIF or A Dank Meme? does this mean you don't even trust me with any girl I talk to? They are my classmates Kia, Somewhere now and then I gotta talk to people, give them importance because not you but I gotta live with them until next year! '

But Kiara didn't want to hear anything, There's a saying that you cannot easily win over a girl's argument whenever you're having a fight, Meanwhile, Sharvilak was trying to control Kiara's anger and a change in emotional state which was changing as fast as Lion running behind its prey... IMPROVISE, ADAPT, OVERCOME that's what he was using. Finally, Sharvilak lost it and started jumping on Kiara with Ammunition of the different situation which he was ignoring or avoiding 'So What if in your "hypothetical World" I have a relationship with this girl named Shreya who I barely know, Even you are not perfect, Did I ever asked you about your ex? Who was studying in your own class? who was following you even after you broke up with him? Did I ever ask you why are you so shy and depressed and crying when left alone? But craves to get loved by anyone, then let it be 4 legs therapy or a "human interaction" Don't just assume things by only a few of your assumption, she might be nice but I prefer you my baccha! , No matter what I'll always be rooting for you Not Because I lust or anything but because she couldn't even understand even the half of what you know about me....Remember the first envelope when I was making sure you won't feel hurt even though I was about to get detained for a semester but for you, I took that risk' Listening to thing Kiara broke into tears but she wanted to stay strong but she tucker her hair behind her ears anda exclaimed in distress 'But Baby, I m not your paper. I can't work according to your wishes. You'll say the truth or false to me, I have to listen and believe that you are not lying.yet you want me to believe in what you say. Sorry but I m not your puppet, I do get hurt too, I too have feelings! ' As soon as he heard that, he was furious and rushed towards his bike without even doing their thing! he left the house furiously, cruising on the highway Anger was already filled in his head, now in the form of putting the accelerator throttle bar at full speed, he was emanating anger. Minute by minute, One near miss to a truck to another. Like he was in a fast and furious movie just raising the speed like it's a game simulation he is stuck in.  

3 Days Later

Kiara is pissed off at him for not calling him since past three days. 'He might be doing this with each and every girl he lusts on. he is such an asshole! At least he should've said that he reached home.But he doesn't even have time for that!?' They used to have a three-day rule where both of them have to communicate at least once, Hours after the end of the day around 11 PM Kiara finally called Sharvilak 'Hello, Shar..' 'Hello?' Unfamiliar female tone was heard *To Be Continued* 

PS:No PS this time..... Happy Diwali :*

item.title: Paranoia
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Chapter-I

CHAPTER-II

Kiara finally called Sharvilak ‘Hello, Shar..’ ‘Hello?’ Unfamiliar female tone was heard 'Err, who's this?' she asked in frustration and rage because it has been late night and it was no other noise coming around which means they must be in a room 'it's Sharvilak's friend Shreya, Actually, I wanted to talk to about ...' *Click* As soon as she heard 'Shreya' Kiara lost her mind, her anger knew no bound she checked his Whatsapp last seen which was 3 days ago, 'Fucker must be using WhatsApp Plus just to avoid me ' to satisfy herself she said this to her Hamster. She at the moment is provoked by the idea which is running in her brain that Shreya and Sharvilak are together Sleeping already. 'How in the world can he just ditch me like that, Just because I was confirming my doubts I had regarding him, Why do boys be so irresponsible? And Why can't they just accept their fault and just apologize instead of just ditching me like that? Why do boys have soo much Pride and Ego and Why can't they just approve their fault and move on? ' Her Phone ranged instantly It was Sharvilak calling her She was already so displeased with a female voice on call at night, but somewhere she was believing that he couldn't cheat on him just like that when everything is going perfectly between them with all those dates going smoothly, They even became so compatible with each other that even Kiara doesn't mind wearing his clothes without hesitating She Picks up the call 'Hello, buns? , It's me, Sha, You cal...' 'Yes, Bunny May I ask what is going on?' asked 'Oh, That? Don't worry, Shreya was just around just came for some coffee and chill' 'You know what? You are worse' 'But, Kia What happened?' He asked casually like he still own him 'Go to hell, Sharvilak!' *Click* Hearing this Shreya took a sip from her Cold Coffee and tucked sharvilak back to his bed 'I Have to ask you this Why are you doing this to her?' 'I don't want her to get hurt, You know how sensitive Kiara is na' he said with adjusting the syringe ' I Think you should probably leave' he said in distress 'Okay, But the first thing you do tomorrow morning is tell her' Says Shreya, She seems to be more disturbed than him 'Just Go, And Don't Tell anyone about you coming here Okay? , Goodnight ' Shreya was smart enough to sneak Kiara's phone number from his phone, Fingerprint scanners are a lie, One can easily access phones only if he is intoxicated and when that person's hands go numb, that is the portal/time you get into his phone. Hence Privacy is violated. In a Similar way, Kiara's Phone number was taken. Next morning Kiara gets a call from the same unfamiliar voice Soon the unfamiliar voices have become more and more Familiar 'Good Morning Kiara, it's me, Shreya from last night?' 'Err, Good morning, what do you want?' 'Can we meet?, Apparently I live nearby your house and I think we should be talking about sharv situation we got here' exclaimed Shreya 'I know you live near my house, Yet you're still alive, fine by me' 'Okay then CCD it is' says Shreya The One thing sharvilak loved about Kiara was how she fakes herself in front of the whole world by pretending she is fine meanwhile she is not. He was one of those rare people who has seen her real depressed face behind the mask. And now since the trust is broken again with cheating, Kiara couldn't trust anyone easily As soon as she entered the cafe, Shreya saw some changes in her facial sculpture Mascara smudged Swollen Face Red eyes She has already cried a river for the one who couldn't even move an inch 'Hello Shreya, It's me, Kiara' as she throbbed her keys on table 'Oh yeah, I know you, Sharv's Phone wallpaper you are' 'Oh Really?' exclaimed Kiara with a surprise look on her face as she was expecting that he would lie to Shreya also like he lied to her 'THE PROPOSAL, THE ENVELOPE, THE GIFT' were those moments she used to cherish are now suddenly in her worse memories folder. 'So, He told me about your date' 'Obviously, he would've' scoffed Kiara 'Don't get me wrong but I want you to come with me Right now' said Shreya in distress 'But, What's the matter why the hell are you in front of me?' Asked Kiara furiously 'Sharvilak Doesn't know I'm here, I am here...' 'What? Do you want to know what will he do to you after dating you a couple of times? , He would eventually make the last date get worse and move on to any next available girl, that's it, That's how Boys Are!' as Kiara whipped all her anger to Shreya 'Just, Come with me Kiara, I'll Tell you what happened' Walking towards the car Shreya said 'I am Bad at this Kiara, But listen to me, Your anger is totally right and you should be angry, But Sharvilak Didn't cheat on you with me, He cheated on you with his body!?' came a sarcastic comment by Shreya 'Wait...What the Fuck are you talking about? Are you even in your senses? You mean he is cheating on me with his hand? , what kind of blogger does that? he already writes about hopeless romantics stories and for experience, all he needs is to be loved? Why the hell would he do that?' said in a more sarcastic way just the way how Chandler would beat awkward situations like these Shreya took out her phone and showed her a photo, Sharvilak's skull was cracked open with blood all over his body it was the same white shirt Which he wore on date, which apparently turned red, his bike was not in the frame but even his favorite jeans and flip-flops were spoilt. Shreya Added 'That's what i was talking about he made sure that you don't get to know about this accident' As Sharvilak was in a hospital with severe injuries and fractures but he didn't want to tell Kiara about this because it happened just after the fight as he doesn't want Kiara to think it's her fault. She is super sensitive about things and with people murdering and throwing her hopes and desires in garbage and already she is an overthinker because she is super sensitive They say idle minds are devil's workshop She has been through many dark pasts only a normal human can think about but don't want to see themselves in their shoes. As they reached the hospital Kiara cried again, this time again for sharvilak but not because he didn't want Kiara to know about the severe accident, but because even after being in such a pain he cared about her feelings and don't want her to get involved in this. Too Many questions Kiara had in her mind while kiara was struggling to get into the hospital Room where Sharvilak was bedridden *To Be Continued* PS: And that's the thing about love It makes you do crazy stuff It makes lie just to see the other happy It makes you walk miles only for that one smile It makes you dance on the silent tunes, that only you can hear. It makes your heart-throb in pain Only to make you strong enough, to fight for your fairy-tale.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: 🙂 This is beautiful..i Couldn’t help but reading the entire parts. just keep going ..with this “fight,for your fairy tale!” It can make anyone believe that they do exist! 🙂
Thankyou Dude 😅💓

item.title: Coming Clean
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Chapter II

Chapter III

'Kiara, they shifted Sharv this morning to another room since he was in Orthopaedic Department until last night' said Shreya as soon as they reached the hospital and figured out hospital reception 'He is at room 513' said the nurse in the reception Kiara was awestruck to see the ambiance of the hospital and it kept reminding her of why he doesn't flaunt by the clothes he could buy if he is in such big hospital which has an Orthopedic Department and 5+ floors She Checked out Shreya again, She seems to be really close to sharvilak who might've brought him to this hospital kiara started wondering what's the relationship of Shreya with Sharv and why didn't he told me about her already? Is it been like 3 envelopes already and no mention of this girl? Have I been talking about myself too much that I forgot to hear his side of the story? Question starts to wobbling in her little brain But right now at that time she was more worried about how is sharvilak because the images seem to be really disturbing for her even though it was some spilled blood, like death of a character from Red Wedding plus that's another reason why Kiara never liked watching Game of Thrones As they reached the floor and it was a huge building, It was like when Joker goes to meet Doubled Faced Harvey in The Dark Knight, rarely anyone in the hall but still a fear in the ambiance with the negativity of loss of people's ability to do positive things. 'Excuse me, miss!, Where's Room 513?' Asked Kiara The Nurse said it's at right, end of the hall Kiara rushed towards the room as soon as possible Finally, after 3 days of the emotional roller coaster ride, they met. Sharvilak was surprised to see a little gift which Shreya brought with her which was his lifeline. As soon as sharvilak saw Kiara he was awestruck, suddenly mixed vibes in the room. Watching him that way Kiara couldn't stop herself she immediately rushed towards sharvilak and hugged him, Watching this exact scenario Shreya took out her phone and took a snap of the most beautiful thing happened to him in past few days 'Next time I'm Gifting you one of those smudge-proof Kohl.' said sharvilak '4 days later, without saying a bye or a goodbye kiss you just barged to your bikey and fled the scene, You know I was worried about you, It was three days and this is what you say!' She broke into tears again Sharvilak mouthed to Shreya signaling her to give them a little space. There's a chemistry between Sharv-Shreya which can only be seen either between two people who have lived together for so long that even a life of eyebrow says a hundred words along 'I'm Sorry Kia' he said 'But Sorry ain't gonna make things okay between us, Why didn't you told me about the accident? and how in the world Shreya know's about you and not your friends? we have to address the elephant in the house' 'Kia, Calm down baccha, lemme explain everyth...' *Knock on door* It was the nurse The same nurse which told Kiara about the room 'So Sharvilak you got a visitor. By the way, Is she the lucky one you've been talking about since past three days?' Said Annie (The Nurse) Kiara extended her hand to Annie 'I guess that would be me, Kiara' Annie was happy to see those lovebirds meeting finally after 3 days, ' Kiara,'You must a very lucky girl' She said Annie was more of the same age as Kiara yet Kiara was confused how she knows about the guy who just moved in, is Sharvilak treating me as a God.. And if that's so why he doesn't want to meet me? As soon as Nurse has done her routine she left the room by saying 'Don't worry I will make sure nobody comes here to disturb the lovebirds' looked at sharvilak and gave a wink Kiara is puzzled now, More question arises her mind. Sharvilak saw the confusing face of Kiara and said 'Didn't I told you in these three years I haven't made many friends but I have AYASH and one BFF, well that BFF is Shreya, and the reason why I am at this hospital is that because Shreya's dad is a doctor here and because of her I could afford a big ass hospital Plus the accident happened right outside the hospital Didn't you see a wrecked bike?  And Annie, Annie is just a childhood friend of Shreya,  she's doing Internship here or maybe part-time job, She's here since her birth  I guess that's what Shreya said ' mocked sharvilak Kiara wanted to slap her right in the face and ask him, why the hell is she the last person in his friends to know that sharv is in hospital, But his lie couldn't win against the argument she had on her side. 'I thought you probably ditched me or something, And I was there talking rubbish about how you use your cheesiness to get to innocent girls like me and yeah one more thing it's a mascara, not a kohl dummy, Stop it. I'm perfectly fine.' said Kiara with a sad look on her face 'No Baccha, You're insulting yourself you shouldn't be fine you are more than fine, in fact, you should be awesome but righ...' before letting him complete the sentence Kiara kissed him. Yet again it was one minute of osculation, As when two surfaces touch in at least three points is called osculation. But in this case, two souls were adjoining at all possible points. 'But babes, I am sorry, I Should've told you earlier about Shreya but the thing is I never open up to people so easily plus I didn't want you to meet Shreya like that, but I was planning like you know dinner or something,' 'No Need of that dear, I know what exactly to give her, But right now I have to leave, I got  this stupid wedding of some dumb  family friend to attend' 'Okay Kia, But now take this, this Envelope has my power of attorney, The Doctor said I'm going to die due to the cigarette smoking, He said I got lung cancer' 'WHAT?' 'Yeah, I'm not gonna be in this nihilistic place anymore' Kiara opens the envelope there she finds a letter of apology for this joke and explanation of why he didn't want her to know about the hospitalized situation, But just wanted to return the envelope 3/5 back. After reading the whole letter there was a big smile on her face like Romeo saw Juliet for the last time before dying. As Kiara was supposed to go home to get ready,  she headed out of the hospital greeting farewell to sharvilak, As soon as she reached her car, a cloth which was containing high amount of chloroform just kissed her mouth and as soon as this happened Kiara tried to fight back but the solution was strong enough to put her in unconsciousness *To Be Continued*

PS: Under the fire of your angry eyes I never wanted to say goodbye So I'll be sorry for now That I couldn't be around Sometimes things refuse To go the way we planned

item.title: Drama Queen
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Envelope 4/5 Kiara calls Sharv. 'Hey, Kia was thinking about you only?' 'Oh really? I thought I was in your mind only when you feel alone at night' 'Nah, that would be god, Remember I'm scared of ghosts' chuckled sharv 'So it has been like weeks you've got out and of hospital, I was just wondering since our exams are not in a month so, I would like to use one of the envelope' 'Oh, babe you didn't need to do your homework just say.... I'll be there..' 'No, I'm coming to get you.. Where are you anyway' She asked 'I'm with Shreya Right now' 'Again? weren't yesterday you were with her? Make her your girlfriend I'm not that important na' said Kiara with a grumpy voice 'haha, just kidding. I'm near your house anyway came here to take my medicines' 'Okay drop your bike at my house we are going to somewhere special place, just come will you? ' 'Okay my Cinderella' By the time sharv reached the house, she was already sitting in her car ready to go and said 'Hop in, we are going far from here... Someplace you'll love' 'why are you Doing this? Why does every envelope must have some fun story to tell our kids?' She looked at him with eyes wide open and she exclaimed 'KIDS!?' 'Yeah, You'll have yours I'll have mine' said sharv while dodging the bullet 'You know, Sharv I don't want my kids to roam around me till they're 18, I can't handle myself how the fuck am I going to handle two little cute looking version of me' 'Chill Kiara, I gotta ask for my parent's approval, how will they agree with me dating a hot girl like you... They'll be like... Beta, Are you sure she's not a hooker, and you bought her just to show off' Laughed sharv 'And my parents would be like, Why are you dating a beggar? You should've gone mad I should make sure to get Dr.Agrawals appointment For CT Scan' And the leg pulling continues the whole trip to the cafe which was on the other side of city As soon as we reached the Cafe, It wasn't a cafe sharv expected to be but with her everything is mesmerizing when she's with him. Kiara was having a reservation already over there so table hunting was not a job for him (Like a gentleman) As they ordered their favorite coffee and with light music making the hall look more romantic Sharvilak asked Kiara a wrong question at wrong time again, 'Okay real quick, If you were to meet your boyfriend here in this exact Cafe Right now what would you say? ' 'Ummm, Idk maybe something like I still think of you But I don't say it anymore' said Kiara 'What would you say sharv? ' 'Ah, I already had the answer for this... Babe, When you left me I was so lost in you, I even thought about suicide but then I realized I'm too dumb to die' Laughed sharv. 'I wonder what would happen if you were dead by then, wasn't it like 3 months barely I knew you after your breakup?' 'Yeah it had been like a year dude, it was my 19th birthday' 'can you believe She left you on your Birthday, Your special day, On the very day you came into existence, well it was your parents but still... ' chuckled Kiara 'So what? 19 years ago also I cried... What's the big deal? Maybe I'll get my first big break on 38 and the cycle continues' Laughed sharv with an irony sprinkled in sentence 'Drink your coffee fast' Kiara says 'I got some plans for us tonight, And Yeah Not saying what exactly will we be doing because I have my plans not on my phone but up here' pointing towards her brain 'Okay' says sharvilak 'But on one condition, We don't have to end the date at my house' 'But, Why?' asked Kiara in a deeply troubled voice 'I Don't want to spend my 21st Bday under the same roof for 21st time' 'Okay, Okay I'll make sure.... wait, what? Your Bday?' Stumbled Kiara as she knew he was born on April 1st and that's the reason why she didn't get a chance to wish him as his girl 'Once, when I was a kid I changed my birth-date on Facebook to check how many people remembered my real birth-date, and since then that has been the date till now, But now since you know about my real birthday Please don't tell anybody,I hate it when people be like, I Know you are not an April 1 product coz you can't-fool me' 'Hey, Chill I got this thing in recording already!, I knew you would speak up something today because you were sounding low, And I know it's not even your attendance you care about these days, so it might be something else, But when you said you're with Shreya, and then joking about that, I'm not sayng you lied but the way you lied was not perfectly layered, it got no fullproof story which means you didn't got time to frame in your big mind, I know couple of things about you writers, You all are one big liar, you know how to write fiction and make people believe in that it's your story' After a big speech of Kiara Sharvilak was awestruck, Sharvilak is the kind of guy who doesn't want to listen to himself from anyone. Even if he'd be the one to cure Ebola he would want the world to shut the fuck up and keep his name anonymous Kiara gave her one of her classic intense looks while sharvilak was scared to say anything to her. Kiara snapped and she started laughing hysterically. 'hahaha' Kiara said 'Don't trust anyone that much that they start judging you from what you are saying, Your first mistake babe' 'Stop with your treatment of mental disorders' sharvilak said while sipping the last of his coffee 'okay now since I've scared the shit out of you once' Kiara added ' Let me try this again, but with a little surety that I'll be scared too' 'Don't tell me you are taking me to the same place where you've been kidnapped to and how much you hated that place' he said. When did I say I have the plan in my mind don't try to read it okay? I'm Not an open book or some cry for help thing. That's your Department not mine' said Kiara 'Geez, what is wrong with you anyway!?' 'You'll get to know soon' winked Kiara, as they moved towards the car *To Be Continued* PS: Sharvilak is still wondering the words that are written on Kiara's Tee which reads "You are one in a Melon" is that for him or when he reads that in mind in third person it's for her?

item.title: Bonnie And Clyde
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
chapter-1

CHAPTER-2

'Hey, Did Badass Kiara modded her car while I was chilling in the hospital?' 'No wonder you were stalking those buttons like you're drawing one of the French girls' giggled Kiara 'Yes' Kiara says 'I did make some modifications in the car while you were playing Doctor-Doctor with Annie' 'Are you, Are you Jealous of Annie getting more time to stalk me?' he smirked And the leg pulling is the only thing both are good at which is like a routine for them every time they meet 'Babe' Sharvilak said ' Why there are only songs from Tay-Tay, Katy or Riri Why didn't you synchronized your playlist with the one which I shared with you on Spotify? ' 'Its because I Don't want you to listen to your songs even when you're with me' said Kiara with a sarcastic look she gave to sharvilak while he was just scrolling through her phone's playlist to be played on Stereo they finally agreed to listen to Eminem While they stopped just outside the city Kiara wanted to smoke as she is a free girl because when she's with Sharv Because Who doesn't need a smoking partner? Smoking is such a depressing activity when done alone it means you're either addicted to it or you're just lonely and just need to pass the time 'Hand me the pack sha' 'But you're not yet ready for the one full stick, Let's share this time' Said Sharv 'Fine' Said Kiara 'Why you always want to be my mother all the time I Fucking DONT KNOW' 'Like your mother share cigs with you' Said Sharv 'I wonder what a weird convo that would be. Mom: Kiara Darling, You wanna smoke some cigs? you: No, mom I just had th...' ' Like You share everything with your mother' Said Kiara with a change in a tone from happiness to sadness 'Ayee, Kia' Said sharv while tucking her hair with both hands behind her ears' Look at me, I am sorry but still, you gotta hand me the car-keys because I can't let your drive while you're even a bit intoxicated...let it be nicotine then' he hands her the stick and lit up lighter like a gentleman, 'So anyway' said sharvilak 'since I am the driver now, Where to miss?' 'You know this new place they built this new haunted place in central mall?, Right next to your house, I got a reservation of laser tags in that same mall, new place recently opened' 'Fine' he said As they were about to reach the destination shavilak turned the car in the wrong direction and stopped the car at next signal 'Are you gone mad?' said Kiara 'Give me my car keys we are going back' 'No, we can't, because one of my family friends work there and if they see me hanging out with a girl, it would be total chaos like, like what if.....what if you were caught murdering your own sister for being a bitch?' 'Okay, Fine Weirdo, I'll just say Rhea we can't make it to the dinner' said Kiara. 'Wait, What?' he said ' You Sherlocked me for layered lying, What about you? First horror house, then changing it to laser tag just because I love laser tags and now dinner with Rhea and Aadi?, You know how much I hated those couple, you know Aadi is just using Rhea to get back on Vidhi, He still loves her But she just said that they're not compatible with each other, Just because she has a different Instagram page of fan-following of 40k doesn't mean she's the real model, And even if she's a real model, then why can't I call myself an author?' Kiara kept mum till he rants about himself for few more minutes. 'Anyway' Kiara stopped his blabbering by keeping her hand on his mouth and said 'And I thought I was the only one who knew Aadi was using to get attention of Vidhi, Even I had this vibe while meeting him' Kiara took out her phone to inform Rhea that they can't make it to dinner but as soon as she saw the phone she had like 19 missed calls by Rhea Rhea called her to inform that they couldn't make it to the dinner because Aadi got an invitation to the big gig but only had two tickets so they both are going. 'What was next on your list?' said sharvilak since the dinner date was already out of the question Kiara said 'We can go to that place which you liked the most' 'That's about an hour drive from here Kia, Are you sure we can come on time in the city?' 'Did you forgot, I can drive, Bitch' 'Okay let's roll then, can you just browse through my bag, I got some weed, can you roll it?' 'Sure Babe' she kissed him on cheeks like she craves for weed As they reached the location there was rarely anybody there, for a metro city its like they are at nearest village 'Light them up' Said sharvilak while getting out of the car and walking towards the bridge. the bridge was made on the top of railway lines so that they can watch the trains coming and going by from up there while they smoke and have a good time As soon as she lights up the joint sharvilak played psychedelic music on his phone, it is said that once you listen to music while you're high it increases the high. they sat in the middle of the bridge legs hanging outside and watching those train and wondering what if police caught is smoking, who's gonna drive the car then Suddenly both of them heard a familiar voice 'KIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAARAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA'  

*To be continued*

PS: This PS thing is supposed to be a part where the writer breaks the fourth wall and talk to the readers... PPS: Couldn't come up with good PS :P

item.title: Last Night On Earth
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
CHAPTER-3

Suddenly both of them heard a familiar voice 'KIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAARAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA'

The voice got amplified but with a female voice too 'Shit' Kiara says ' I accidentally gave a missed call to someone' The voices came forward as Kiara panicked and was calling her dad, Meanwhile, sharvilak took her phone and called Rhea for help as they were expecting her to make some calls and free them as they thought it's the police with one of the parent. The voices stopped and suddenly started running towards The love couple. Kiara was scared as she tilted her face towards sharvilak's chest and rested her head over there, while she was crying since Kiara's parents have no idea she's dating sharvilak. As soon as the shadow came closer and closer one of them screamed 'They Smoked some weed Officer!, What should we do with them now?' Kiara was scared but she was frightened at the same time, she turned her head towards the shadowed people turns out it was not Kiara's Parents, Nor the Police She was relieved to see Rhea and Aadi over there, 'WTF' Kiara says 'Are you even here? Didn't you had like a Bigass Party to attend?' 'We Lied' Rhea says passing the cigarette box to sharv 'We Got Sharv's Msg While you had your plans for boring dinner with us' 'When did you get the time to tell her?'Kiara asked him while thinking about sharv using his phone during the date 'I was chatting with Aadi during the day while You had your plans with Rhea and double date thing, while Aadi said let's make it a little interesting so I told him to cancel the plan and tell you that they are going in some big gig and there's no uncle of mine I know working in that mall' Meanwhile, Aadi Lighted up a cigarette and gave it to sharv 'So' Sharv Said 'I am still surprised you didn't see that coming, You were the one who corrected me for saying a lie and teaching me about the trust issues, and you were the one who failed to understand the trap darling' Sharv kissed Kiara on her head while it took a little time for her to understand what's happening 'While taking the lit cigarette from sharv, Kiara said 'Fine, You Already ruined my plan by adding your excuses, Like you knew how to sprinkle the salt in Wherever necessary' 'You do know, Dandi March was not for salt' Aadi says while taking out beers from bag 'Now, That's What I call a perfect party Aadi, No wonder I love you, buddy, Hey Rhea, Make sure to keep him away from me, Maybe I Might steal him from you' Sharv winks at Rhea 'So Basically you wanted us to get wasted?, Who's going to handle the High me? I know sharv can't handle me when I'm sober, how can he handle me when I'm high' 'Look who's worried about getting wasted' Rhea says 'She Already couldn't handle herself from some drags of that kush' and the catfight continues for the next ten minutes which included pulling of hair cursing each other and kinds of stuff, Meanwhile, Sharv and Aadi opened can of beer and started chugging the beer. Whenever there's a catfight going on never stop it, instead just grab the best seat from where you can watch the fight and chug a beer. Another reason the boys didn't stop the cat-fight because they don't want to play with fire because Rhea and Kiara are like childhood best friends. After the first beer, the couple moved towards the bridge and sat like Sha-Kia were sitting. Sharv took out another joint from his pocket and Light up the joint while Aadi called him on a side to talk about the Rhea situation he got there. 'She's Depressed since past few months, I wonder if Kiara knows about this or not but it feels like she needed a shoulder, while Kiara was busy with you. Can you make sure that Kiara don't do anything inappropriate st....' Stopping Aadi before completing the sentence Sharv Said ' Don't worry, She won't be a problem today because it's a saying that never hurt a girl's ego, I did it twice. So I'm not getting any romantic action today for sure' Sharv gave the joint to Aadi while he said 'What's the deal with Vidhi and you? like you still want her back but she is not interested in you, was she your first ever?' 'Yes,' Aadi says ' She was my first female friend, girlfriend, and wife in those role-playing games we used to play someday when my parents were out of town, But seems like she doesn't want me now. You know, there was something special about the first love, Remember the first time you kissed a girl? Remember the first time you got high on "brown stuff"? It's never the same with second time' Sharv kept mum while he was listening to Aadi, That's what writers do in a group, when people talk they listen to them and then write about them without them knowing 'So You're in a situation where you want to go back to Vidhi but can't leave Rhea coz she won't have anyone to talk about.' says Sharv. Aadi added 'There are days when even after 10 cups of coffee I'm still thinking.Where I went wrong, I couldn't sleep, There were some nights where I used to not sleep and come to college.I didn't feel like dressing up and come to college anymore. I felt like life is pointless. I've been becoming a nihilist asshole...' while he took a long drag from the joint and ended the speech with 'And I used to be popular guy in my college ' 'How about we get out of here and spend the rest of the night at my place? You seem to be a bit disturbed, I got some more ammo for the night at my house...Let them sleep in my room we got terrace for ourselves... We will find a way to get over this problem of yours.okay?' 'Sure, Let's get girls out of here' Says Aadi while instead of getting girls he went towards the car and took out cake meanwhile girls blindfolded sharv and Rhea helped Aadi to decorate the place of where the birthday cake was supposed to be cut. As soon as sharv got blindfolded he said 'Oh Kiara, Don't tell me you told them about my birthday and out of nowhere and they got the birthday cake' 'So' Kiara says ' Rhea Knew About your birthday and that's why they brought the cake in first place, while you were talking to Aadi, Rhea told him about your special day so no wonder he said make it interesting and this is what you had in mind' 'Its almost 12am now, Ask for the wish' Kiara said while opening the blindfold 'Where's my gift?' Sharv asked Kiara while they both remember the birthday gift he gave her... Those 5 envelopes 'Let me take 5 cigs from your pack' Kiara says 'That'll be my gift...Our Gifts' 'Then I would be wanting all five of them tonight coz we are not sleeping' sharvilak said while kissing Kiara on the forehead 'This is the Best night of my life yet' as soon as Phone clock struck 12 they started singing the birthday song, As Sharvilak wished for moments like this to come again and again. For him, he already declared that night as 'Last Night on Earth'

item.title: Before the Lobotomy
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
It has been like years since I last touched you Dear Diary, You know all my secrets And you're the only place where I feel safe to keep my secrets It's been an Immense pleasure having somebody like you Who Just keeps listening to me Whatever I scribble You keep it as it is You Don't say anything but you're there listening to me Today also I want to say some few things in my life It has been a crazy ride after all Being in a relationship Getting out of one But then you have someone to Resurrect from that fall you took But Diary you've been on my worse and I'm sorry if I didn't give you chance to be at my best. So I'm Sorry for that. Ruaan was the one with whom I broke up I was shattered nobody was there to support me It was a mutual breakup thing but it felt like I was the one who was deeply affected Since that it was an Emotional Rollercoaster ride Life didn't go the way I wanted I always used to wonder it was the way of life You meet a guy get into a relationship with him When you're not compatible with it Break it up and find the next one... Maybe a perfect one Like Another episode of Black mirror But with a happy ending He got a job at a big firm and had to move on to another city Meanwhile, I got a part-time job here And worked here But There's a thing about Long Distant Relationship It Never works Its the same with when you both move in together It's like less than 10% could make it out the that Live-In Relationship. He kept lying, I kept waiting, We Both thought it was going perfectly good But when the video call changed to just calls and chat I knew there was something he was hiding. I've caught him lying that too more than once. And the relationship got into a state of risky business where I had only one thing I can be proud of is now failing like a shooting star but with a hope that someone would wish a good luck for themselves and then we broke up on a bad note I sent him some snapchat photos which I shouldn't have But when he opened the window I was happy to see even he's online at the same time so I video-called him Little I know he was busy with another woman who was cuddling him like I used to do Calling him name the name I used to call him and suddenly all those Baby, Babu, Shona, Darling, Cutie-pie didn't make sense I was in a state of deteriorating My face turned white I was unable to see him with another hot looking girl. I felt like I've been used. And that was the last time we ever talk or had a chat. Going to college and work was just another routine I used to follow and love it in a hope that I'll get to talk to my boy, in the end, all the exhaustion will be gone with that one 'Hi' But now since that incident whenever I come home I go directly to my room and sob for next couple of hours wondering where it went wrong. I've been putting all those sad stories on Instagram and my followers also sensed something was wrong. In a couple of days, there was a word on the street that I am single. That news completely broke me down I was not only broken down but collapsed Like How can he do this to me It was a void A void filled with flings A void filled with sad emotional songs A void which was perfectly filled with your presence Heartache has no medicine to cure It won't cure itself But then I met this amazing guy during one of my flings He was Strong enough to accept me the way I was broken and he kept digging for the broken pieces and tried to fix me up piece by piece I felt safe with him Just as the way I felt safe with Ruaan And then my life was back on track My Instagram posts were no more about negativity and how life sucks But it was more about the life I always wanted to live on As soon as I moved on with my life everything worst stopped happening with me I guess that's what life is You have to keep yourself happy to make sure that it stays the way it is We Used to double date with him, He with Kiara and Sharvilak was the most fun time we spent together Kiara and Sharvilak were good enough to accept us as a couple and hanging out with them felt like the best double date anyone can have. We used to hang out at Sharv's place End dates at his home whenever it is late. It was a house-party thing in his house. Couple of months later in my new relationship I get a call from unknown number Sometimes truecaller also gives silly names. Like who keeps their caller ID name St.Jimmy? I picked it up and there was Ruaan on the other side 'Hello, Who is it?' 'It's your old boyfriend' He said 'Sorry I don't have any exes, you must have go......Ruaan?' 'Yeah, I just called you to know that I am in town and I want to meet up with you and sort this thing out' my hands were shaking while talking to that familiar voice You Know there's something about the past When you meet/talk someone from your past you kind of get into that age suddenly. All those Baby, Babu, Shona, Darling, Cutie-pie Came into existence again. 'You know what?' I said while getting confidence back 'I am currently dating someone and i think you should consider this as me moving on' *Click* I kept the phone as soon as i said that and cried again.

PS:Some Memories are like Sharp Edges They Hurt you deep with knowing but just like glass sometimes they hurt you the most leaving you shattered on the ground with you helpless on the ground

item.title: Brain Stew
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Pain in my neck, Thorn in my side Stain on my blade, Blood on my knife Been dreaming of her, All of my life But she won't come true, She's just my nightmare I woke up to
It's 3 AM in the morning And I woke up again Yeah At least now I have to admit that She's the Nightmare I woke-up to It was cold January night I went near my friend's bed took a joint from his secret stash of 'HIGH-BOX' And sneaked out of the room
I only smoke-up whenever I want to sleep but couldn't With mixed emotions and thoughts going in head The thought of demoting you from priority list was scary you not being in the pinned chats of WhatsApp anymore You not coming in the favorites of my call logs you not answering your phone with cheerful hello
First Love is hard to recoup from I've heard about it but never thought I would endure this soon after being in a relationship for an only limited time. The irony of above comment is with Vidhi also Ruaan was his first love, and Vidhi was my first everything.
First time when the love is experienced it feels like a stupid show that is going on, and you're the hero of that thing called 'LIFE' And since you're the hero of the story, expect nobody to be saved by anyone And you have to fight for your own fairy tale Because you still believe in that bedtime stories, Thus you have faith that fairy tales do exist
Even After being the school Head boy Mr.Fresher in College President of the Student Council Committee Doesn't matter When all your notoriety is based on your flaws and rumors Spread by people which could include even your BEST FRIENDS
I sneaked up to Terrace To get perfect view of sunrise while buzzed up over few drags and to let enter the Stingy light In my sad and depressing phase of life
No Friends, No Girlfriend, Not a shoulder to cry on. These days even can't trust anyone People bragging about Bro-Code are the one who's breaking it People talking about trusting them are the one who can't be believed
Was it my fault that I wasn't loved in past 20 years and now when I had a chance, she got together with an ex? Was it my fault that I trusted her more than anyone in this world? Was it my fault to give her all those silly presents and making those First months of everything anniversary?
Maybe it's my fault who was surrounded by people Full of fake promises and for some minutes of pleasure how they manipulate the other to get into their pants
Maybe it's my fault who was trying to get the hottest girl available Maybe it's my fault Who didn't hear the bad side of loving devotedly Maybe it's my fault that I tried to make a move on her Maybe it's my fault that I Didn't try to sleep with her even after 3 months of the perfect relationship
Why does every date that ends up in one house Should end-up with sleeping together Having "love-making" sessions Why can't it be more like having a good time till the sun rises and then come-back to hostel and sleep cherishing the moment we had with each other
Call me a loser But does that change the fact that I dated that girl who have 40k+ followers on Instagram and the fact that she wanted me and my time not the money my father earns and nobody knows why me but all she wanted was to be heard
Sharvilak once told me to get into someone's heart Is to listen carefully and then make your comment repercussion Maybe that's why Vidhi liked me. Maybe she was moving on But she was scared enough to move on alone she took the assistance of friends and relatives but she couldn't trust anyone near her Maybe that's why she said yes to the date Maybe that's why she was egomaniac at first but as the time passed she was Benevolent and started thinking about ourselves Maybe that's why I started falling for you Maybe that's why I want you back in my life but at the same time I want you to be happy reminiscing me as the guy with whom I spent a good time But this thing will remain between you and me And in the end, it doesn't even matter. (Chester was Right) It's only you and me now you listening to me and re-visiting the old times and connecting the dots as the days pass Thank-you Diary for keeping the deepest of secrets with you
As He saw the most beautiful sunrise from the top of the terrace and was free from all those feelings which were buried deep inside, Finally Relinquished!
 
PS: While puffing drags all he wrote in diary was 'I feel like I've been crucified to be satisfied' Because in the hostel it's not called diary its Newspaper which will be flashed in front of friends and made the joked about.
PPS: Diary extract of Aadi

item.title: Portfolio
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Hello,
My name is Himanshu Lade

I have
175 posts on Instagram  (@sharvilak_writes)
Which is filled with my work
with excerpts, snippets, and micro-tales
On the genre of Romance, Fiction, Young-Teen and philosophical

Handling my own Wordpress website (himanshoe.wordpress.com)
on the similar genre
58 posts
Click on the title to read the post.

Stand-Alone posts: 21 (Which does not need a backstory to read)
1. Babe? Are you still there? 
2.Let Her Go! She’s the Heroine!

item.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
As they were reaching home sharvilak took out his phone and ringed his dealer to deliver the booze at their home, Kiara was very excited as she hasn’t been loved this deeply. And the First time she’ll be boozing with her boyfriend. As they reached their destination, Kiara’s phone rang (Extracts from Sweet 16)

Envelope 2/5

'What took you so long to pick up the phone?' It was Kiara's Sister on the other side 'Why, what happened dear?' Asked Kiara with a worried tone 'Dad is in hospital, he needs a bypass surgery and the docs are saying they'll be doing it tonight, mom is scared and you know u can't handle her properly so can you come to....' 'Yeah just send me the address, I'll be there' said Kiara interrupting her sister *Click* Sharvilak saw that worried face again as soon as she kept the phone Without saying anything Sharvilak asked for the address to go As soon as they reached the hospital, sharvilak said to Kiara to go ahead he will be right back, he had this friend to meet up with. Without further questioning, Kiara said 'fine' packing her stuff in the bag 'just be here with me... I need you' 'Yeah babe first date ending up in hospital, this will be one great envelope' he said 'Sure, Whatever' said Kiara As soon as she reached the room where her dad was admitted, The ambiance was not good, it was like any room where people are having a negative vibe like the patient might live or maybe not. Like they're watching him for the last time. The doctor came into the room with a paper and took Mother's sign... It was an application which stated that if he dies hospital is not responsible for his death. It's scary to even think about your loved ones dying in front of you, only because you are too afraid to sign on that piece of paper. As soon she signed the paper, the operation started and it was visible to the family members because it happened in a room and through a full window glass compartment they watched doctor playing with heart. Writers and doctors are the only people in this world who can touch many people's heart just by their work, in writers case, it's thousands of people, but with the doctor, it's only the family members. Kiara spotted Sharvilak while he was searching for the room 409, while he was struggling to find her, she couldn't shout because she didn't want his BOYFRIEND to be introduced like that, but no wonder she had to do it right now or it would have been ruined the perfect proposal. As soon as Sharvilak saw Kiara he hugged and kissed her forehead and told her everything will be alright while her eyes became more watery since it's a heavy atmosphere to expect someone to do a flirty thing. And their first date after getting into a relationship is not the Sharv's room but the hospital where the to-be father-in-law was having his heart played you're he met that day. Her mother and sister were busy in the room signing the papers, while since she is the closest to dad which explains why can't she leave her dad alone even for a second while his health is a critical position. 'There's no other way to resolve this, they have to do quadruple Bypass by tonight or things might get worse and he might have a temporary or permanent memory loss' her mom said while wiping the tears off her little daughter's face. She was puzzled to see Sharvilak there with Kiara, but she was happy on the other side that At least there's someone to take care of Kiara while this period. She was happy to see a familiar face in the crowd of unknown. She remembered Sharvilak from the Birthday party pics Kiara showed her while saying that he has given me the best Birthday Present after dad. She also remembered calling him as a miniature version of dad but with little bad habits like swearing and smoking, because of his loneliness. 'Mom, This is...' 'Sharvilak' Both said in unison. 'I Remember him' mom said 'Remember when you were telling me about the best gift of the birthday party' 'I was just with him while she called me so I asked him if he's okay with coming here' Kiara said 'It's actually great' Mom Said 'I was about to call your uncle to take you and your sister home but I think it might be fine if you're stuck by here' Kiara turns towards sharv and asks him whether he will be able to spend the night here in the hospital. Meanwhile, Sharvilak was thinking to fled the scene for a cigarette break and since now Kiara is now with family his presence means nothing now since it's a tense situation and a newly grown relationship if took responsibility by the first day then she might expect him more and not see outside the lens of rose coloured glass. 'Sharv' said Kiara while taking out coffee for both of them from the coffee machine 'Do you mind spending the night here in the hospital with us at such crucial time?' Sharvilak was surprised to listen exact the words he was not expecting her to say because it has been like only 4 hours till now they got into a relationship and too much dependency if given now can be a deadweight in future. As Kiara sensed a pause while she was thinking and she gave him the second envelope and said 'Okay Now?' *To be Continued* PS: I knew you were special from the moment we met. How I'm looking forward to all of our tomorrows. PPS: how much easy it is to kill someone for a writer but when the death happens in real it makes you feel shattered, How much of a psychopath we writers are!!!

item.title: Peacemaker
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: As Kiara sensed a pause while she was thinking and she gave him the second envelope and said ‘Okay Now?’ (extract from Nice Guys Finish Last) 'Are you crazy?' scoffed Sharvilak 'you can't just go on and buy time with me, you know you've used about 20% of my time...Our time' 'So what?, I know there would be something interesting coming up after the envelope and I thought why not use now?' she said while making the anime eyes (eyes of innocence) 'Okay but in one condition, your sister will also spend some time with us it'll be great to know both of you' said Sharvilak while accepting the envelope. 'But I'm not sure if Shanaya wants to spend time with boring old people' mocking sharv 'You know what... I'll tell your mom to call your uncle and that's how this envelope ends, without a starting and it ended just like that..' Said sharv as he was not in the mood for being someone else for next couple of hours. First dates are usually about being the person that you have described yourself in your Tinder Bio, You have to be exactly the person whom you wrote about. 'But baby don't worry I don't want to be impressed now, stop your drama and stay with me here, I need you' said Kiara. 'Shanaya, come join us for some ice-cream' said Sharvilak while moving towards the cafeteria on the third floor Shanaya felt obligated as she was the only one who didn't have a company of her own age, and when in crucial time never leave kids alone, maybe that's why Kiara's Mom didn't call her uncle when she saw sharvilak taking the bullet. As soon as the elevator reached the second floor, Kiara got out of the lift first and selected the table and sat there, while sharv and Shanaya were having this first-time awkward conversation thing where both of them has no idea what to talk about or what to do 'So' sharvilak said, 'What kind of ice-cream you like?' 'I love anything with chocolate on it' spoke Shanaya 'You learned that from your sister? to be specific?' Said sharv. 'Isn't it strange, we have some things common even though she's the one who has been picked up from the garbage bin?' as Shanaya tried to loosen up the mood with dark humor But at this point, Sharv was thinking whether Kiara deserves him, Since. that comment her sister made was jarring. But Sharv took it lightly because at that point he's should be the person she want's to spend time with Because sharv was protecting her from all the jerks she needs to avoid to get the perfect half as he thinks he is the one for Kiara for the moment Kids look some of their favorite stars as god Listen to them religiously Following the path, they have been pretending to be in their shoes And act like they do 'So, tell me what Kiara likes?' said sharv 'She is a dumbass, she likes everything that she feels good like for example she loves any ice-cream which tastes like chocolate, like me' 'So you're saying that she is copying you because you're the coolest sibling and she feels vulnerable in front of you?' said sharv 'Oh yea, Sharv you're right' instantly she felt proud of herself   The best thing one can do in strenuous surroundings is to make people forget about the intense situation by either laughter or with a more abominable condition Kiara was puzzled to see how sharv and Shanaya Two different sides of the magnet how socially connected with each other with an instant After eating the ice-cream Shanaya was feeling sleepy and asked Kiara to leave her at moms.  So all three moved back to the surgery room where mom was in tension since it was already late and she preferred to tell the extended family the next day since it was already past 2 am and the surgery was happening in the next room which is visible from the glass window and only two family members are allowed at one time. Kiara and Shanaya went inside Kiara tucked her little sister in the sofa while mom was out with sharv The only thing mom said to sharv was to take care of Kiara 'She doesn't need a boyfriend now but a shoulder at which she can trust. Trust is the best proof of love one can give to anyone. If you for this one time behave, and not be a kiddo and don't take advantage of her situation, I would have taken care of her too but these hospitals are strict with their rules ' Listening to this Sharv's eyes filled with water 'Ma'am' Sharv said while rubbing his eyes 'Thank-you for considering me as this responsible, I will make sure nothing's going to happen to Kiara and shield her from the wind, cover her from the rain, and make a home wherever we will end up.' Kiara came out of the room as she saw a tear rolling from sharv's cheek, looking at the face, she hugged sharv and the mother said you kids take care. 'As Kiara and Sharv moved towards the car Since he would like to get some time out of that aseptic smell and the distracting smell of flowers combined. As soon as he was out of the hospital premise, he took out the cigarette and lighted it, and the first drag he took was not like the usual one but this one was more of a "relief" drag. He was happy on one side that Kiara's mother trusts him, and there was no fear of meeting the parents if in future events if sharv is invited to their social gathering. Kiara took sharv's cigarette and gave her the acute look, as sharv knew where this was going so he also joined the game and they were looking at each other for like a minute and a half and then they started to laugh. Laughing really makes the mood lighten makes one forget about the pain they are adjuring to be in As they were sitting on the hood of the car Sharing cigarettes and the last of the funny stories of sharv Both were coming to an end but until that time her mind was wandering off her father's situation.   Until Kiara gets a phone call from her mother *To Be Continued*   PS: I Actually hate myself a lot of the time. But when I'm with you, I don't hate myself.

item.title: Restless Heart Syndrome
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
As they were sitting on the hood of the car Sharing cigarettes and the last of the funny stories of sharv Both were coming to an end but until that time her mind was wandering off her father’s situation. Until Kiara gets a phone call from her mother (extract from Peacemaker) *Missed call from Ma* 'The time has come' says Kiara as she was searching for something in her car suddenly Sharv held her hand and said ''Everything will be alright dear, I am here with you' 'Hey, Dumbass! You smell like shit and I am searching for a cologne, So you don't smell like walking cigarettes' Said Kiara 'Oh, so your dad doesn't pick me up and burn from the top, that's why? It's too late for that kid. your dad probably hates me more than ever because nobody wants's their daughter to date a slob like me or him in his teenage years' sharvilak mocking to Kiara 'Do you think My dad was an asshole just like you, and some bitchy girl like me fell in love with the ability to hide his real self by putting on the mask and let judge people whatever they want to and don't care because...' 'Stop' Said sharvilak 'Stop fucking with my mind already.' As he was trying to get what she's talking about Sharv's phone suddenly played the song Millionaires By Script when sharv argued her to stay with him for that one song. Even Kiara thought why not wait for a couple of minutes If this guy took care of me the whole night when I was not in my best 'Date face' He deserves some minutes from the envelope As sharvilak started to sing the chorus
'Look at us since six in the morning If time was money, yeah we'd be worth a fortune I swear you may think you're rich7 You could have a million euro but you cant buy this time'
That's when Kiara realized that every envelope should just not be used but also create some golden memories like this. Looking at his stupid face Kiara couldn't resist but hugged him tight and started dancing like prom couples till the song ended and they moved to the hospital. Little moments like these make one forget about the whole situation they're going through and for that moment you just feel like you've seized the day and you feel alive for that particular moment 'So, since the surgery is done' said Kiara ' If he needs anyone, I will stay here till you guys go home and freshen up, You take Shanaya to home and take rest.' 'Stop acting childish' said Mom 'He will be alright' Meanwhile, Kiara was happy since the surgery went we She scoffed 'Thank-god, Another beautiful Day with whole family' Moving towards the operation Room, the family was excited to see dad with the new upgraded heart. While sharv was sweating like a pig First time meet with Father-in-Law is always clumsy It's all about the First impression Because in his mind, She's the princess and He doesn't want to see her Little girl doing any mistakes in choosing the boy she want's to spend time with Because as a father, his job was to be that perfect guy so that she idolizes him and want a gentleman just like him in her life As Kiara, Shanaya and Mom entered the room and hugged dad And Kiara was excited to introduce him to Sharvilak as she said 'And Dad, I would like you to meet my..' as she turned the other side she couldn't find sharvilak, To hide from the embarrassment she barges into that door and there she saw sharv, who's nervous to meet her dad 'What the fuck' Kiara said 'You know you're the hero of the story, and why hiding now?' 'I-I-I I Don't know what your Dad might think about me' Said sharv in a worried tone 'Plus he's not yet fine, what if he ha...' 'You know what babe' said Kiara while stroking his hair 'The thing you did, It's just more than enough to make me and my family think you're a keeper' as she kissed him at the forehead. Some kisses are just not meant to be romantic but some are there to just encourage enough to make you do things which you fear the most As sharvilak got enough courage to go and face Kiara's Dad They went inside And Dad said 'So, you must be Kiara's Boyfriend, I Assume.' 'Uh!?' Sharvilak was astonished to be called as Kiara's boyfriend by Her dad 'It's too soon to be giving labels to each other' Said Sharvilak 'Oh, You're also a smartmouth' Said Dad as he waved his hand ahead to Sharvilak, as an acceptance in the Family for that time 'Dad' said Kiara while she was trying to cut the tension with a knife 'It was our first date, and he agreed to stay with me while Shanaya and Mom were in the other room watching you, and you know how the hospital rules are' "All I want to say' Sharv utter 'Your Daughter is a wonderful kid, and at that time she needed someone since she told me how much close you both are and Listening to that made me realize that how much I miss my own family. And when she Asked me to stay I was overwhelmed and since then I can't thank her enough' As the doctor came into the room and said 'Since the operation was successful we gave you a little window of 10 minutes, Visiting time is not now, come back at 5:30' As they all said their farewell to Dad and went home While Sharv asked Kiara to drop him where they were supposed to be 8 hours ago 'Oh, So you still would like if I borrow one of your Lose Tees and wear it and go to college?' She chuckled as they sat in the car and decamped to Sharv's house. As they were moving closer to the house, Both wanted this car-ride not to end but due to circumstances like Sharv's name on detention list and that lie Kiara said about the project, are some of the things due to which they have to end the envelope as it is.
It's okay. Life doesn't have to be perfect. It just has to be lived. -Dexter Morgan
PS: The best thing about broken people is No matter how much low you feel They make sure you don't be left alone Just the way they survived the wave Alone.
