item.title: Outlaws
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Four years of engineering Eight semesters Twelve branches Countless Gatherings But for him only one group which never broke apart Even after having their differences The Friendship was the reason why they come back from home
It was a final month of their Four Years Engineering program It was time to get ready for the real world After the Final examination All they have to do is wake up From the fairy tale Which they thought will be their life
It was the time to Enter in the field they really want to go in When some are going with their start-up idea and others just want a white-collar job to serve their families Meanwhile, other's are interested in studying abroad
And thinking about all these time Makes Sharv awestruck with feelings And wondering when Kiara is going to use the Last Envelope Because he needs someone whenever he's questioning his own feelings
Kiara, on the other hand, is worried that If she uses the envelope What after that?
There's a saying If you give a beautiful girl power to control heart In early stages of a relationship She might go Vulnerable When the power is snatched from her
 
After The Birthday celebration by the Unfamous Kiara and Gang
Meanwhile, she was pressurized on using the envelope by sharv Not directly but with each taunt, he used to say would aim towards the last envelope Because he got a campus placement in his dream city Mumbai And Sharv wanted to complete the legacy he started So at the end of his course He would be proud of one thing he did by himself
After thinking about how each envelope meant Something special like who knew I would date such a dweeb until he opened up and showed me the The real and Caring side of his Which is like giving a flower to someone at the tender age of 16 Where the Envelope 1/5 was about how he made the simple proposal very special and when I needed him the most during my dad's ByPass surgery he was there Staring at the sky Looking at the diary filled with thoughts and each poem ends he was unwrapping the side which even he fear to talk about Nobody talks about their deepest fear and insecurities Until they're comfortable with the audience And as a Blogger who write fairy tales and make people believe He feels easy to change the character according to the mood
Envelope 3/5 was a twisted story but worth mentioning Because every relationship isn't a fairy tales You have to fight over all those Ups and Down to make it a happy ending
Envelope 4 Was the favorite envelope till date Even though it started as a simple date but ended up in one of his favorite hideouts where we celebrated that dweeb's birthday
Each envelope meant something to me And each envelope elevated our relationship status From giving me that envelope to celebrating his birthday It was a dream-ride for me
Maybe that's why I'm more worried about my envelope now What if This was the envelope where we fight with each other and That ends the beautiful Sha-Kia and maybe that would be the end of it
 
Frustrated in their thoughts Both called each other at the same time at 2 AM in the morning And both heard the busy tone
Kiara could hear that sharv might break up with her Because he wanted to finish the envelope ASAP and move to Mumbai And since the busy tone Made her more worried
While Sharv being the optimistic one he thought that even if Kiara is cheating on him Now he knows how to end the envelope.
After both hearing the busy tone they thought that the other one is on the call and if they see the notification the other might call So both were thinking to not irritate
Next morning Both woke up with not a call notification So Kiara decided to go to Sharv's college to Find out who that SOB is who is trying to steal Sharv from her On the other hand, Sharv decided to go Directly to Kiara's house Since the Surgery, the parents know him properly and they call him sometimes for dinner and Outings
Isn't it cool when parents allow your loved ones To hang out with you and they also love him being around the house Kiara called Aadi and asked for Sharv And aadi said he never came to college Instead of asking him about which girl he's dating now she said okay fine, I just came to college to surprise him No wonder why he never makes me wanna come to your college campus
browsing through the campus she saw Shreya hanging out with her friends Shreya was happy to see Kiara on the campus and she asked her Where is That guy because of which I am still single? She gave a confused smile and said that's why I am here I came to his college to surprise him Meanwhile, he is not even in his class neither canteen
'I heard he was having an affair with Annie' Shreya said in suspicious tone 'Since Annie loves Hanging out with people who spend time with the real her not the nurse her' Now Kiara is more worried and started asking questions to her about Annie-Sharv Looking at the tension Shreya created in her brain and looking at how deeply she cares about sharv Shreya couldn't stop giggling and then she said ' Even if Sharv leave you for someone else na, I will find him and kill him, and would happily go to prison for you, He's just soo much obsessed with you'
Listening to that Kiara blushed and started thinking about all the good times they spent together. 'Let me Just call that Son of a bitch' Shreya said 'He was supposed to come today And him me and aadi were supposed to smoke-up on the basketball court and think about the last months of our lives together Kiara asked 'Can I Join you guys? with the basketball court thing?' 'Are you mad?' Shreya exclaimed 'I always asked sharv to call you and join us in one of these trips Let's give him a surprise when he comes here.'
'Where the fuck are you? my loverboii? still bowing to Princess Kiara?' Said Shreya 'Yeah, I'm at her house right now waiting for her to come' Sharvilak said 'Did you called her before surprising her, she might be in college now ?' asked Shreya 'She's either supposed to be home or somewhere nearby, because of her Preparation Leave' Said sharv Shreya Exclaimed in excitement 'Asshole! You promised me you would be here in an hour so we could start tripping soon' 'Calm your tits, I think Kiara is cheating on me' Said Sharv 'She didn't pick up the call either she said anything where she's going' 'Just come here we got all the snacks and stuff is also ready' Shreya said 'Okay fine in an hour I'll be there' said sharv *Clicks*
Shreya then suggested Kiara about the plan to surprise Sharv meanwhile, they had like an hour time Shreya called the gang When they heard Kiara is the chief guest everyone was like they will come
Even the Sharv's Closest friends were thinking about How the Fuck can this guy gets a girl this cute, mature and understanding And how she's the reason why he thinks life is worth it
Sharvilak before getting into a relationship with Kiara, Sharv was The most depressing guy they've ever seen But he wasn't suicidal he was like that unwanted burden But he always had a good judgment about choosing friends. Maybe 10 schools in 12 years make him mature more quickly in this field.
'But Shreya, We need to dump my car because I don't think so anyone has a black fiesta With sunroof and vinyl on side of the car' 'Damn gurl, you are one badass' said Shreya and took Kiara and parked the vehicle at Shreya's mansion
As soon as sharv reached the college and searching for the gang They were supposed to meet in the canteen and then proceed towards the basketball court Sharv saw Vidhi chilling with her friends so he went towards Vidhi and asked her that if it's okay from her to join the gang' He never said anything about Aadi because he was hoping Things between Vidhi and Aadi gets smoothen up and they remember each other as Good Buddies What if they are exes now? What matters is how well you spent your time with And if the ending is great when it's a story worth telling Because in his mind he is still thinking about how to end things well with Kiara.
Vidhi agreed to join And as he called Shreya She said 'Everyone is waiting for you in basketball court' 'Just tell Aadi I got surprised for him' said sharv Listening to this vidhi hesitated to come to their little gathering Sharv said 'Look Vidhi, I know you guys didn't break up on good terms but, Please for me... this is the last time I would request you, and then after this, we might meet and chill like these, And you've been one of my good friend who mentored me how to get Instagram likes and stuff Plus who knows 10 years from now you would be a supermodel and you wouldn't recognize us' teased sharv Vidhi for a minuite thought about this and she said 'okay, what worse would happen? I and Adi would be back together?' Chuckled vidhi
Kiara called rhea and asked her whether she's free so she could join Sharv Gang for one last time Meanwhile, Sharv hated Rhea because she stole the credits to the birthday Gift they both made for Kiara. Without Rhea that gift would be nothing but a bunch of songs with lousy voice notes, It was Rhea's dedication which mattered
Who knew everyone was about to surprise everyone
Near Basketball court there's a small open room which cannot be seen from far but from that room, everything at the radius of a kilometer can be seen. It was rarely used by people to make-out and either does illegal activities like these. Plus since past few months, that place was in hit-list The plan was to smoke up ASAP then move out and roam the campus or just chill till evening Talk about how life has changed from being parent's favorite kid to be known as Novice in the Corporate Life Talk about how rapidly people show their true color Even if they are your best friend and steal your girlfriend and sometimes if the weed kicks you high then you talk about identity crisis and Nihilism
Isn't Life Strange Where life is between And you don't even get it the first time you read that line Isn't Life like Biryani Where you move the weird stuff at the side and take the good stuff inside. Isn't life like a roller coaster ride Where you don't know where life is gonna lead the next moment Enjoy till it last Maybe next moment is much bigger than the current one But that doesn't mean you need to compare good moments and rate them It's like you're your own Social Media Account, Where you are rating yourself and then categorizing them and then comparing them with other people's lives.
 
Kiara, Aadi, Shreya, And Annie were putting camera's everywhere so that they could record sharv's reaction When he sees Kiara over there They spotted Sharv's Bike but were confused to see some girl sitting at the back of the bike. Kiara became furious and she started panicking. While Shreya was ready to Kick both asses. Annie was in the group just because she's a good friend of Shreya and was the nurse when sharv was admitted to hospital Meanwhile, Aadi muttered 'But he said there was a surprise for me' And he cracked the mystery of the girl He exclaimed 'It's Vidhi' Everyone was in shock that why would Sharv bring vidhi in such gathering.
As soon as they got out of the bike and moved towards the room Aadi stopped both of them And asked Vidhi to go ahead while he has a little talk with Sharv.
Aadi exclaimed 'WTF is wrong with you?' 'Calm down' Sharv said while keeping a hand on his shoulder and added 'Look, I don't care about what happens between you two, I just want you to realize that even though You both broke up in the bad term, but how well you end up is also important, And plus it would be boring with Kiara cheating on me and I don't have someone I can abuse to Plus she's a good friend of mine. I thought this is my party' 'Kiara Cheating on you?' asked Aadi 'I'm not yet sure, IDK I have like two to three proofs but those aren't concrete' exclaimed sharv while taking out a cigarette out of his pant and said 'You know these day's its hard to get over something which you are attached It needs time. The same thing happened when we all left houses to study in some college It was hard to get over Parents' Aadi added 'I still remember how scared I was in first two months of my hostel life Now it's more like my life revolves around these people, These are my people, whom I can trust Maybe in a couple of years, we all would be like God Damn! Everything changed since we all sat in someone's room Boozing and not caring about tomorrow, And now we have to be someone So that we can live life to our fullest' And the chat continued till the cigarette was turned into an inhalation device which is used to supply Intoxicated gas and affects brain cells
Before Sharv entering the room he smelled a cologne nobody in his friends wear but only her girlfriend wears that. And before he could come to the conclusion Kiara Hugged him tightly And asked him whether is it okay to be a small part of your Emotional Gathering. Sharv mumbled 'Since you're too lea...' 'What? Be Louder Asshole' Said Shreya 'Nothing.Nothing..' Said Sharv *TO BE CONTINUED*
PS: I don't wanna go back home I don't wanna kiss goodnight Let us paralyze this moment till it dies

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: best of all , love the way kiara is possessive for shrav..

item.title: For The First Time
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
'Surprise motherfucker' Uttered Shreya Sharv was awestruck by his feelings, He was numb for a moment He looked around the room where he found all those cameras and How people were happy around Kiara. It was more like a Positive Energy spreading across the room with her presence It just multiplies. After the hug, Kiara said 'I Need to talk to you, You are in big trouble Mister' Everyone went from 'Aww' to ' Oh Snap!' looking at everyone's reaction Sharv said 'And I Need to talk to you' Both came outside and started walking towards the bike 'Kiara' Sharv started first and added 'Yesterday a weird thing happened. and with that weird thing, I would like to know when are you going to use the envelope' 'What weird thing? And envelope I'm going to use pretty soon, Maybe today. Now I don't care about the sweet memories we make in each envelope. I Should've known that you are not the one I've been searching my whole life for' 'Babe' Sharv uttered ' Yesterday I tried calling you' taking off the phone 'at 11 pm, it was busy and with a couple of proofs ' 'Oh, I love it when things get to spice up in relationship You thought I was cheating on you while I was thinking the same and we were about to thrash each other with harsh words and be real for one time and talk bad stuff about others' Kiara said 'Wait' Sharv said like he was surprised to hear that their relationship Had got to that point where either they move forward or break apart 'See' Sharv said ' Relationship is not like a person helping other to climb the mountain, If the other person is not willing to spend the time and enjoy the adventure together Then there's no fun in dragging the relationship like a carcass' Kiara looked up and stared at sharv for a couple of seconds while sharv was worried if they lost the spice in a relationship and now they hang out like the old couple Who are together just because they find themselves cozy in each other's arm that's it. The little Staring contest was their last hope to save this little relationship. All they wanted was the US but too scared to talk about it at that point It's funny how sometimes in a relationship a person can't say what he really want's because not to hurt other's feeling the fifteen second staring at each other was enough for both of them To know where's the relationship going A voice came from inside 'Hey Dickhead and his Beautiful girlfriend' It was Shreya who just want this last party to start 'Annie and I have to leave in a couple of hours so let's start now You college kids don't have anywhere to go Some of us have JOBS here' She added Aadi and Vidhi were sitting right to next other Awkward moment between both of them when 'Aadi' Said Vidhi ' I am sorry, to break up with you' 'Isn't it hard to forget the first person with whom you fall in love with when the relationship is new to the person And so is moving on' Aadi expressed his feelings 'Babe, There's nothing wrong with you' Vidhi urged while she started to look in his eye and said 'Yeah First love is hard to get over, I remember In all those meaningless dates I forgot who I really was And became this animal which I didn't want to be' Vidhi Added 'In the chaos I found you and I'm glad that I didn't end up with some jerk But instead, it was you' And as soon as Vidhi finished her little speech Kiara and Sharv came inside the room and gave the Roach to Shreya Sharv said 'You guys know, Tea is also a type of weed' While lighting the roach he added 'Just imagine, how our ancestors were, instead of drinking tea they used to smoke it And then since the Britishers Liked the tea so much Maybe that's why Indians are also addicted to tea' Aadi interrupted and said 'Just imagine, if the brit would've loved weed? at this point weed is legal to do' Annie said 'Tea is like a poison to humans, they're killing themselves with that' 'Ever, wondered why they say while having Chai+Sutta you get the good high?, Because tea is legal weed' Kiara added And the conversation bar is set high, Just to avoid the awkwardness set by both couples While smoking the first joint Annie asked sharv she would like to present a line she wrote recently Everyone including Shreya was astonished that Annie writes Sharv muttered 'It's a great thing, that somebody else knows how much of pretending happy souls we are' while he was thinking about breaking up with Kiara. Annie said 'Be with someone who holds your hand to calm those inner storms raging inside you' As soon as she said those words, Adi looked at vidhi, and Sharv at Kiara and both were thinking what went wrong with the 'FOREVER TOGETHER?' Just then sharv took out the phone and started playing Script

the first song was a video edit from Amazing Spiderman 2

While all were looking at sharv as he started singing the Chorus 'We're smiling but we're close to tears, Even after all these years, We just now got the feeling that we're meeting for the first time' Everyone was listening to the song carefully As the song was meant to be heard that exact day where we don't feel sad about the last party But be satisfied with the company They found in their path of life Some were lucky enough in the room to find the perfect half for that time being At the end of the song. Everyone in the room got emotional Including Sharv himself was having wet eyes He peeked around the room and All he saw were those people he has spent Four years of his life where these very people became his family With Kiara being as his Robin to Batman Fighting all the evil And bringing the small group together Sharing moments together and enjoying each moment as it passes by which started with an hi but now it's hard to even say goodbye, when you have good memories with them.. ♥️ *To Be Continued* PS:How lucky I am to have something that makes saying goodbye so hard

item.title: Deliverance
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
And in chaos I found you It was a good time I spent with you Got to know a lot about you And your passion to travel the world meet people And make endless memories with places and people With people, you meet in random places I loved your story of how you Still, believe that There's good in every person Either they bottled up those feelings deep inside them Or they pretend to be happy in front of you until they're happy You just have to find it in them And there you found me Drinking Jack all alone in this bar Yet I don't sit in the barstool But you saw some story in me, The Story to be told by me but I was scared of people judging me Even though you came and sat beside me And asked 'Can I buy you a drink or a box of tissue?' I look up and I saw the girl with a gorgeous hairdo And she was looking stunning Like she was waiting for her boyfriend But he never showed up I said 'Uh, Aren't you waiting for s....' She replied back 'Yeah, For your answer' 'Well I'm Flattered' he said 'It's rare for a girl to initiate the talk' 'You know' calling the bartender 'well, I'm new in Mumbai' And wanted to have fun here, And people Suggested me this bar'

In Jukebox, his favorite song was about to end with this chorus 'Oh these times are hard Yeah they're making us crazy Don't give up on me baby'

'Okay' he said 'But you came to the wrong person here Darling, I'm Toxic' 'Why Do you think, Your fun stories would be boring to me' she said By this time, the Bartender arrived and She said 'I'll have The same drink whatever he is having' Sipping my Whiskey in cold night in my bar With this Stranger Girl who was eager to know my story, why I was sad that night That's strange Because none of my friends showed up. 'I started loving songs of script lately' I said 'And sometimes I used to sing for her' I was hoping by this time she would give me cold shoulder and start talking to someone else But She said 'Oh, I love the Script, wasn't the previous song of the script too?' 'Yes' I said Like an idiot who was desperate to talk to someone about the bad day I had 'You know' She added 'What's worse? , Writing poems for them but they won't appreciate as much effort put in writing them in that piece of a poem' 'Yeah' I said 'And sometimes you just copy the lyrics of her favorite song in the poem and they don't even get it, because they weren't listening to you' 'Or Maybe' She said ' She was just lost in your sweet voice and she only remembers how cute of you to dedicate your poems to her' 'I just came here to have some alone time, and think what went wrong between me and Kiara' he said 'Oh, Kiara is a cute name' She replied back She picks up the glass and took the sip of whiskey and she looks at me and said 'Nice choice of whiskey, Mister' 'I am Michelle btw' I took out my hand for the handshake and said ' Oh, Michelle, I am..' 'uh-noh-noh mister' She said 'We Just met and we're doing the Corsica Bit' 'So, Um then I'm Jude' I said in a sarcastic tone She started teasing my name by singing the song of The Beatles

"Hey Jude, don't make it bad Take a sad song and make it better Remember to let her into your heart Then you can start to make it better"

'So Jude, What's your story? Why so sad and gloomy?' She asked 'It's Just this stupid society we live in' I said 'I am waiting for the day to get out of this town ASAP' 'Looks like we got our own rebel, Who Resents this place, just because he's afraid of people who surround him' She said 'Look Jude' she said 'Isn't Jude, one of the 12 best friends of Jesus?' 'umm, Disciple' I corrected 'It's just a slang that was banned to use at that time I believe And that's how we can't use the words we use now to call our friends' She said And that's where it hits me in my mind That she doesn't care about what people think about her She's just a free soul, Free from all the burden, free from all the pressure That people/Friends create in this society we live in Freedom does feel great when there's nobody to judge you on what you do when you're on your own. I got some courage and asked her ' How does it feel to be traveling around the globe?' She was awestruck by the question and said 'How do you know I am traveling around the country?' 'It was simple' I said 'It's very rare for a girl to roam alone considering this is not a great bar recommendation, and you might be staying nearby, maybe that's why you're here' And I looked at her and added 'Maybe, that's why I don't talk to people when I'm alone, I'm weird' with a sorrow tone in my voice' 'Aisa Kuch sceneNahi hai' She said in Mumbai accent and we both started laughing 'You caught my lie about the hotel thing, but apart from that other thing is just what I do during Vacations' She added 'It feels good when you are backpacking around the country, explore stuff, meet people like you, exchange real stories with fake names, Play Questions, and then the next day go for another adventure for a good conversation or make them believe that there is too much good left in this broken and shattered world'

*To be continued*

PS: I am Glad I met you. Maybe you are the reason why I am happy these days I know we both are smiling but we're close to tears （＾∀＾）ゞ But Life ain't a fairy tale... Am I right dear? PPS: That's why I drank your Jack ;)

item.title: Hail, Rain or Sunshine
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
She added ‘It feels good when you are backpacking around the country, explore stuff, meet people like you, exchange real stories with fake names,Play Questions, and then the next day go for another adventure for a good conversation or make them believe that there is too much good left in this broken and shattered world’(extract from Deliverance) 'Don't you feel a little scared while backpacking alone?' I added She chuckled and then said 'It just for a while, for the first day, and once when you get to acclimatize with the place then it feels okay, Like for example for me it was the Himalayas which is what I call is my third home' And then there was me Who is worried about whether Kiara is the perfect match for me or not And that made me realized something That without her existence I would've been the same sad guy I never wanted to be That without her I would've been a spoilt, consuming drugs or maybe overdosing That without her, I would've been some animal waiting for my hunt to get caught in my trap and then turn it into a toxic relationship

And then the Jukebox played another masterpiece by The Script There'll be a smile on my face and the kettle on And it will be just like you were never gone There'll be a light in the hall and the key under the mat If you ever come back.

Michelle Added 'What's bothering you, dear? Would you mind sharing it with me? Just consider me as the admirer/fan of your little story' I added 'It would be easy for you to know the other people stories with that smart-mouth' She laughed for a while and then said 'It's actually hard for me to get someone's attention and pretending to them like I am listening' 'I am just curious, that a young lad like you, who is somewhat handsome, and maybe broke like most of the time Because it seems to be like you're studying in college and have no experience of the corporate world of flattering people to get their attention' I was amazed to see the deduction level of her, it reminded me of Kiara when we were at the peak of our relationship and then I said 'Yes, You are definitely right, I am broke, a failure, and not even trying to get up from this what I call is rock-bottom' She gave me a confused look and said 'It would be easy for you to know the other people stories when you play the sympathy card?' as she smirked while completing the sentence I broke into laughter while sipping my Jack and said 'Yes, But let's keep this as our little secret' While hiding my insecurities I was scared for a minuite for letting someone know about my deepest feelings, and at this point, the last thing I wanted was some random stranger judging me. 'Sometimes when I am in such situation' Michelle added 'I just ignore the fact that some stranger is sitting next to me and I say whatever I want to say, and the thing they say, Sharing is caring is actually true for some people, Unless you're a Psychopath or Serial killer' 'Otherwise, there wouldn't be People like me, sitting on barstools and wait for a story for me to pin down, Sometimes I feel like I am the journalist who acquires stories from around and Pen down their stories With little edits And call it fiction Sometimes I feel like I am the thief in this thing Not creating stories But just merging one with another with a sync and call it A work of fiction' She got little interested in what I said about the writers and content creators and she added 'You know, everything you write is already written by someone, and when I say this you gotta believe me coz everything we try to express in words is already done' 'Don't you think it's a little late for a girl to stay up here?' I asked her as I was concerned about her She chuckled and said 'It's fine, Until and unless the area gets soothe down and nobody is on the streets' As she moved her hand towards the purse and took out the phone and said 'It's just 1 am, the night is young and so are we' while I took the last sip of my Jack and went outside for a smoke As soon as I came back to the barstool, I saw a note instead of her. 'Dear Jude, It was nice talking to you, You are one fun person to hang out with, Don't worry what happened in past and I am sure you'll recover from whatever you and your girlfriend having. PS: If you write well you should try addressing your feelings down on a piece of paper but this time make sure that

*To Be Continued*

PS: Some things are not already done or said Sometimes you have to mend and Do it yourself Even if its the beauty of words through which people judge you They can't steal your creativity but faith

PS: If you write well you should try addressing your feelings down on a piece of paper but this time make sure. (Extract from Hail Rain or Sunshine) […]

item.title: If You Could See Me Now
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
As soon as I came back to the barstool, I saw a note instead of her. ‘Dear Jude, It was nice talking to you, You are one funny person to hang out with, Don’t worry what happened in past and I am sure you’ll recover from whatever you and your girlfriend having. PS: If you write well you should try addressing your feelings down on a piece of paper but this time make sure. (Extract from Hail Rain or Sunshine) After looking at that note, I assumed she's not coming back and there ended my side of Michelle story. Isn't it strange That In a couple of hours Somebody can steal your heart Just by the words and The story they have to tell and the enthusiasm one can show While listening to the stories I took out my diary and pen from my bag And at that drunk state, I sat down to write a note to my girlfriend I know it's pretty stupid to dispatch emotions At this moment Maybe it was Michelle Who drove me to write So I gathered my courage and Started to pen down my feelings for her Dear Kiara, I hope this reaches you in good spirits How have you been handling the breakup? I just want to tell you the things I love about us Or should I just say about you And still, miss about our relationship Like the time I saw this couple hanging out Where the guy was resting his head on the girl's lap and were goofing around Like this girl was playing with the guy's hair And it reminded me of you Reminded me of how you use to taunt me by saying How much silky my hair is and then get mad at me and then I have to tell you everytime that I applied shampoo today Like this other time I was out with my friends Suddenly his phone rang and it was The love of his life on the other side And how he changed his stance in front of her It reminded me of Us reminded me of how happy I was To completely share me with you To have those late night philosophical talks how we used to talk about Life and Death, Possible Inventions, Nirvana and How one of us is gonna be on TedTalk And what happened to us now? Where's the magic is lost? Like the last words, you said were 'I'll call the cops if you call me the next time' Sometimes I take the long road to college So that I could see you I just revisit all those places So I feel like a little restoration Of my thoughts I don't watch romantic movies nowadays And I started hating Ryan Gosling and his movies Just because he was your favorite actor And you used to love The Notebook so much That inside your little head You already Imagined us as the couple in the movie And now when I look back at all those things we Promised Now it feels like Our relationship was based on a lie A lie that Maybe was planted already in one's brain Remember the first time you actually thought about hanging out with me? Remember how except everything you kissed me in cheeks In the smoking room, Just after I said I think I'm falling for you? It was always a kind of pressure on me Because at that point All these time I was thinking about how to impress you And when you sat down on one knee I for once was shocked for a minuite And now since you were already falling in love with the better version of me I was scared that this day may come soon Where you will find out I am nothing like the person I tried to be the first day And now you know the reality, Let me tell you one more thing The first Impression should not always be the last impression If it was true then why would big companies have more than one round for Job interview? If it were true then why would people drink the same coffee twice before coming up with their favorites? I tried my best to humor you I tried my best to be with you But eventually, EVENTUALLY One day you'll be disappointed in me But I thought it would be when I'll ask your dad for dowry Jokes Apart, But I really miss you Remember our first official date where I took you to Crossword and we were fighting over our favorite author Remember when we went to the Game zone? Remember when we were standing in front of the camera together For a few seconds, But those happy faces said a different story. Remember when I first held your hand in a cafe When we were talking about our first heartbreak And then taking advice and life hacks from each other? And I was practicing your favorite dialogue... 'This is your life and it's ending one minuite at a time?' Like Ed. Norton does in fight club I don't write notes to people Maybe I should do it often since there's no option of call or message But If you ever come back or think about coming back at me I'll be here with my hands wide open happily accepting you Because I don't want to forget you so easily and move on Because you were the best thing that happened to me Even though I have many friends I can hang out with Or tell them about my life story There's always something which I don't tell It's Because you never judged me of what I am PS: Too drunk or depressed to type more. Yours Forever Sharvilak

The Jukebox was playing the song which perfectly matched my feelings right now 'I still look for your face in the crowd Oh if you could see me now Would you stand in disgrace or take a bow Oh if you could see me now'

As soon as I finished writing the letter I felt relieved Like some kind of weight was lifted As I look at Michelle's empty seat There was a glass filled with jack when I asked the waiter whether is she coming back He looked at me and said 'It's for you from that person who was sitting next to you' As I drank her jack and left the bar drunk but with a happy face humming the song 'If you could see me now' PS: True love is growing as a couple, learning about each other, and never giving up on each other.

item.title: This Is Your Life
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I picked up the call "Hello?" a concerned voice said The voice continued "Is this Sharvilak?" "Uh, depends on who's asking" I replied with a witty answer "Let's just assume it's your fan calling," she said "Does this cute voice has a name or she goes by 'The one who is not to be named?' " as I chuckled "Let's just say I got your number from none of your friends, It was easy to get your phone number since you assumed nobody would call you when you provided a call radio button on your profile" she continued "Anyway I called you because I got an offer for you" "I am flattered, but there are many great writers whom you can give this offer, If you need anyone's phone number I could provide you that," I said with a confused tone in my voice "Have you ever tried writing apart from Love?" she responded I said "I have written few put never posted it, maybe because..." "Because you only write it from your heart, and since you are an introvert you never mix up in any group thus you are only limited with only your stories" I was astonished to see that deduction since my past encounter with Michelle, But she didn't sound like Michelle I felt that it could be a prank call, but investigated prank call "Okay, You got my attention, Tell me more about it, "I said She replied, "I am in trouble...."
It was 3 AM in the morning and I knew exactly what's cooking with people I share my comfort zone with I called one of them On the third ring, she picked up my phone "Hey, How's it going?" I asked "I am trying to sleep douchebag, How drunk are you?" "How did you know I was drunk?" I questioned her She answered, "Otherwise, why the fuck would you call me at 3 AM?" And the leg pulling thing continued for next 20 mins "Btw," she continued, "How's your life is holding up?" I replied with a smartmouth saying "I'm filling my void with Alcohol and games" She acknowledges my answer and said, "All you do is watch Pewdiepie playing some game, Is that what your life has become these days?" "Um, Why do you keep checking on me? I am not a fellow 9-Year-old" As I grinned "Btw, You will be turning 22 in a few days, how do you feel about that?" "Well one year closer to get a job and get settled, What else can I say, I am having panic attacks that I will never be 21 again, It's like I should be responsible for my own life like being disciplined, having a five year plans, Time is money and not blame the alcohol and procrastinate things" I replied "But Once an alcoholic always an alcoholic" she responded It's funny how bad stuff you tell about yourself to others They just take a note of it And whenever something bad happens to you They just blame it on that one stuff you said "I learned one thing," I said and continued "To lie and protect yourself so people don't get to question you WHY?" "Aha, I knew it" You never drunk call me Idiot" "Well, You're the first one to catch up the lie," I said and continued "Well the reason why I called you" "I am turning 22 this Friday, and Felix stopped doing Friday's with Pewdiepie I want you to contact him and t..." "You're just hiding your pain under some youtube videos, isn't it? " She interrupted me "You're Goddamn Right" I replied as I took out ciggie from my pocket and lighted "You know Sharv, You've been broken enough, And now you can fill your life with projects your blogs and your career and your little girlfriends but it won't make you whole, You just have to get over those things which made you this depressed and miserable. Where is that happy funny Sharvilak I knew? where is that guy who was goofy just because he wanted to be funny not because he needed to hide something?" And then there was the silence for a minuite My brain was analyzing stuff she was saying I finished my ciggie And said, "Is it okay to be this sad and still layer it with a lie and pretend that my life is going great?" she replied, "Look, Things don't become traditions because they're good, They become good because they're traditions." She continued "Maybe with a new year of your life in this planet let's hope you do some changes in life and move on because the change at first seems a difficult task but when you're halfway there you'll feel good about yourself and be proud of yourself about it" "Maybe you're right, I shouldn't be feeling sad about the bad things that have happened to me, I should be learning from them and concentrate to not do the same mistakes again," I said "Maybe I'll give you a couple of days to think about it because after this talk I think all you need is a time to think about What you should be doing in a couple of days" "Thanks, bruh, you're always helpful," I said *Click*
PS:  The universe is a cruel, uncaring void. The key to being happy isn't a search for meaning. It's to just keep yourself busy with unimportant nonsense, and eventually, you'll be dead.

item.title: Did you seize the day?
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: Day 14 Finally out of my own crib to see what's outside The sun is really bright People nearby are helpful They listen when you talk And I'm still wondering why did i locked myself Friends were asking if I was okay Friends get to know within a second That there's something wrong with you But best part is They are not you You, Who left me But with a valid reason That I'm not the same guy anymore Well, You changed me But in a good way You gave me a reason A reason to celebrate life I saw the sun after 14 days And yeah, it was brighter than usual Maybe I've been living in darkness And never wanted to leave my room Maybe i was healing myself But in that mess I was hurting myself more I was not more focussed about myself But in the end While striving to get you back I found myself I found all those lies told in chats About how I was trying to be better everyday And about how I lied to you about places I'm going to Yes, I don't have enough friends that I hangout everyday with different group and blend myself in Yes, I don't drink or smoke everyday, I just tell those things that you want to hear I knew our relationship was at stake when i said I'm not going to meet that group of friends which includes my ex-girlfriend and her boyfriend who was once my best friend I don't know what to do now when you're not near me But i know somewhere that I have survived 22 years, I can survive some more I found my diary And saw your farewell note, Which said you're never gonna forget the party where you were alone because all your friends ditched you And I was bored to death and that's how we met We were practically drunk and how obsessed you were with dating many guys just to make your soon to be ex-boyfriend jealous Who knew you were Emily and i was Todd Perfect for each other but not at that point At this point I don't care whom you're dating All I wanted was you to be happy I hate it when you ask me whether to hangout with other male friends or is it okay to still talk to that mutual friend who's good at heart but still wanna get to know you better just because he found you interesting Just because of my trauma that you'll leave me for him At that time and even now i dont know The only thing that mattered me at that time and now is Are you happy? I don't know how relationship works in your mind But It takes two to tango Even the blame be for good or bad If you do good tomorrow i would be happy But i couldn't brag about it It's fine Because I dont have that audacity anymore to show my high spirits to you You know i was scared to lose you Because you're still not trained to be tough in this world You're like Mr. Peanutbutter except he was too much determined that this time his marriage won't fail him (4 marriages and still trying to fill the void in someone who truly gives him the opportunity to love them) You're way to sweet for people around you But you should know where to stop and start saying NO Even when I warned you I was toxic all you said was i would love to get intoxicated in that sweet poison But at the end of the day All it matters is Did you seize the day? When your life is ends, and you're looking back at this day, you'll think that was a good day? Just think about it -Sharvilak Lade PS:Suddenly, you realize you'll never have the good relationship you wanted, and as long as they were there, even though you'd never admit it, part of you, the stupidest goddamn part of you, was still holding on to that chance. And you didn't even realize it until that chance went away.

item.title: Longview
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: I wanted to give her the letter But don't want to dispatch my weakness After the breakup But somehow I felt like I should at least give her the letter Three days have passed All I did was Stalk you in every social media account Wanted to talk to you But it was my fault when I said I need some time To think about where is this relationship going It's okay to have a doubt in life When you are about to go to the next level Leaving the old establishment and have to start from Zero It's okay to have doubts in Life When you don't know anyone in the community Because you are new in that set of people But, It took me a lot of courage to grab the phone And dial your number and hit call was it luck or god sending me a message that when I kept the phone in my ears all I heard was 'Insufficient Balance, Please recharge your phone' Suddenly I questioned myself What if she was trying to call me all these days And since my SIM was in roaming so couldn't see the calls And she did not send me any message because none of both of us wanted to show the weak side And something called as 'written proof' So even if one of them is on a date they won't flaunt their phone and tell look how much desperately my ex wants me back And ruin other's date Maybe he/she could be the one with whom you may hit it off And be sure about what couldn't be in Kia-Sharv "Shaaaarv You home?' I heard a voice just outside my room It was Aadi who was banging the door As soon as I opened the door He said 'Dress up, chocolate boy' As he reached the HIGH box And took out one of the cigs 'We got a convention to attend' I gave him the lighter and asked 'Is it Kiara?' As my mind deliberated many questions like What did she say? Or Is she fine? Or Who is she dating? Aadi replied 'Calm your tits, Sharv, She just needs to talk to you, She was talking about some unfinished business' As he passed the cig to me he said 'It could be Reven-' I interrupted him and said 'Nah, She just wants me to take all the gifts I've given to her' 'But all you did while gifting her was to be creative and spend less and give her something more valuable than any of the gifts combined' Aadi said 'That's what's bothering me bro' I said as I took a drag of cig 'time is all I gave to her, and at this point, I need some time to rethink about where is this relationship going' I took the letter put it on the envelope as the last one, carried my bag and said 'Okay, Let's do this If this is how she wants to end the relationship it's okay' 'Come with me' Aadi continued while getting towards the bike 'Rhea and I have been handling Kiara since past few days' 'Just tell me one thing' I said with baffled feeling 'Is she okay?' 'Hop on' Aadi replied 'Maybe this breakup gave her Existential crisis and now she's questioning herself about stuff So just be careful, and use your words wisely' Aadi rode the bike right at that place where whole envelope fiasco started *2 years later* In Fusion Cafe & Longue He saw Kiara and Rhea As soon as Rhea saw me she took me in a corner and gave me instruction on how to deal with her 'Sharv, You did a horrible thing, And we are here to settle this ONCE IN FOR ALL Don't break her heart She has been through a lot these past days She even thought about leaving everything and become Dora again' I expressed tenderness while looking at Kia And that made her broke her into tears As an Ex-boyfriend You can't see her crying in front of you even though you broke up on bad term That beautiful face which was once your possession Is no more yours but still you want to see her happy Those beautiful eyes, When she was about to burst into tears And you held her hand firmly and Looked into her eyes with a sweet smile kissed her on hands and said It's okay to let the emotions flow And said nothing You remember all those moments When you put hair behind her ears and kiss her on the forehead When you listen to her life story Like it's some kind of TED talk  And sometimes you record her calls And hear it again so you don't miss her voice That same girl who trusted you and told you All her secrets As she unfolded herself and you helped her strip all her insecurities away.  But now you're speechless and clammed up Because you don't have the audacity to go and wipe her tears Because you are no more the priority in her life And now you are one of those guys which just want her in life Just because you have some undone work Or maybe just because you miss her body and not the soul beneath it I heard what Rhea said to me And moved towards Kiara, I saw her phone was on with Alisha on call And then Rhea patted on back and said 'Whatever you say will be on record, And try never meet Alisha Because she wants to kill you After what you did to her girl' I was flabbergasted as well as scared at that point don't know what to do But I sat near her, and was reaching to hold her hands she took back her hands and crossed them 'Kiara' I said *To be continued* PS: The only way to fight hate is with even more hate

item.title: You Won't Feel A Thing
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
If you hate me Then why did you date me?
I don't get one thing If you had differences since the day we started dating Why weren't you open to me? Why did you kept your deepest feelings a secret! Just because somehow i manage to get you fancy dates, expensive gifts and quirky replies to all your sob stories and somehow try to make you smile and change the mood.. That's why? I was there during your worst days, But you did not listen to me when I was at my worse I wish you tried to contact me when i was traveling in the woods I wish you tried your best to make me But guess what? Reap as you sow doesn't works with Humans The only mistake i did was to love you unconditionally like a parent to their child So you don't feel alone here when you're 1000 kms away from your home. But you ditched me The only mistake i did was to trust you So you wouldn't judge me for what i was but you did The only mistake i did was To gain hope from you that this "us" could work Because I already imagined you as my perfect half But guess what, nobody's perfect And the day I thought about it I was happy, for us But you have to get behind my back and kiss my friend and bitch about me in front of him, It's his fault too, I agree but why did you just ignited the fire in first place? Why do you want me to be miserably sorry? I fell for so hard and you took my friends with you that now I'm loving it here being alone in rock-bottom But I'm not going to degrade you as such and gain sympathy here, because I'm not you You'll probably hate me more for writing and posting this piece But i don't care what you think about this.. Remember the time when i used to write and narrate all my short stories, snippets and poems to you? Remember the time when you were in trouble and the first thing you did was called me? Because somewhere you knew I will definitely find a way Remember the time when you were sad over chad when he died? He was your 4 legged therapy and no human can take that place, I was there in hospital, at his funeral, and whenever you needed me i was there Maybe that's what my fault was I was taken for granted I was your friendzoned guy but in relationship with you at the same time. You thought you'll do things to test me But I guess I failed at the last one When I got to know 'Mera bhi kata wo bhi acha wala' And when i confronted you that thid is not how a relationship works you were easily aroused to anger And you showed me the real side of yourself You never wanted love from me But you wanted to use me Just like a mop Who will clean all your tear and be there with a pint of beer or pack of cigarettes whenever you need me I was too dumb to not get the indications Maybe i was in love with a toxic person And that person killed my passion for love But don't worry Nobody's gonna take your place Because you'll be remembered for being the girl who taught me 'Duniya Madarchod hoti hai including me' Yours Once Himanshu Lade
PS:Thank-you for killing me and my writing career in just one second😊

item.title: Burn It Down
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
It all started with the first month of the year 2018 I was single, happy and not caring about what is happening in the world I was happy in my own shell or maybe I was pretending to be by wearing a mask Maybe I wore the mask and now I'm liking it so much That whenever someone tries to get intimate with my inner self From the inside, A voice crackdown and says She's going to probably use you for your own good and leave you Like the slice of lemon while savoring shots
A Major Throwback to the girl who dated me for 3 months Who shed the light on the positive side of life who Taught me that just because somebody's pain is understandable doesn't mean their behavior is acceptable so they should stop whining about this She also had a tough life though, The best part was even after being depressed, sad and lonely also in parties she wore mask far better than me. I couldn't see the mask, And when she revealed her blubbering face, I fled the scene. Maybe I was too dumb to look back at how you used to make me happy, how you used to argue with me with dumb topics and still end up losing no matter how strong and valid was my argument Maybe I was busy looking at now rather than the future if we made it up that far... Anyway, I Apologized her before writing this piece, and hope everything is back to normal, and she's happy somewhere. longing to find the romantic, Prince charming for Missy TooGoodForMe. I Know people might be like she was the one And I should go back and apologize about it But at this point, this happened like 6months and now at this point, even the expiration time is gone. Yes, it was love, It happened fast, we had some great times, people may call us like Hashtag Couple Goals but now things have changed, I wanted something else she was not ready, So Basically Relationship is like a Life of Married people, You have responsibilities, You have a dream which you think you'll eventually accomplish it, but there's always a society which expects a thing or two, For example, have kids, or get a job.
The best part about writing it down is you just have to let go of feeling Whenever there's an idea in my mind Wherever I am, Let it be parties or funerals I take out my phone (Yeah like a hippie) And start making notes. There is a thing about being an artist and becoming art in someone's conscience Art is just everywhere, it just has to be found Writing became more of a hobby to me than just scribbling Every day I come home from college, I check my notepad and then start scribbling the ideas which were sketchy back then Not only writing but I also started to learn from other writers and blogs Shoutout to all my friends who are reading this and will give me an honest review on this, I'm glad somebody out there is reading this and will be then correcting me on the small flaws I make while writing.
And BTW, Congratulations to my elder brother who woke up one day and decided to marry the girl he's confident to keep her happy for life. It was a big day in my life, I was scared a bit when he was getting married It was like when your cousin come home and how you have to share all your toys, let it be Xbox remote or your favorite toy car. That was my moment where I felt like I have to share him with someone, And also because she gave me a bar of chocolate :P (Yes I can be bribed just by chocolates sometimes,It just my brother knows how to pull that trick)
College was fun this year, mostly spent alone like always, but coming back in town just to complete the Engineering because you were incompetent in that previous year, But I managed somehow to be in a group and we had fun, for them it's just another guy while to not whine about the old group I keep myself distracted with the new friends.
There's the thing about moving on Once you know there's nothing permanent You know you gotta let things go Even after trying hard, Even rubber has a constraint Pascal of elasticity It also breaks down after some time
Went on a couple of trips One to actually go and meet my Ex and then meeting friends en route and others for, I could be away from the place and find solitude in calm mountains and forests. A Big shout out to Felix Kjellberg whose videos helped me through tough times Like how not to give up on what people are saying, get my humor back and give me many ideas like this one, and making clickbait titles and Read them my year review xD I tried getting in Kjellberg's video brad didn't want my humor to be shown on the show (JK, Brad you're the best :* )
I am really glad that I had a conversation about the events like open mics And tried one or two small poems of mine I also met some gems in life which help me every time when I am in trouble and give me life advice and better shed some light in how I wasted my 22 years believing that Santa Claus exists and be the good boy every year, Because every Christmas My Father used to give us a warm holiday vibes, just because when I was home during my winter vacation of 10 days, Mother still feels great when her son comes home from hostel.
2018 Even though started with my friend literally stealing my girlfriend and then talking about their kiss in front of me, But I experienced how it feels like to be loved more than you do to them... 2018 Even though was a rough start, with bucket list to tick and broken resolutions, I tried achieving goals but I also tried to take a break and enjoy life a little 2018 Even though was overall bad for me But one thing I was sure, that nobody remembers the guy who gave up 2018 Even though started and ended up with a heartbreak Now I know Nobody's perfect and that's okay if you couldn't find the one with whom you spark. If Life was meant to be perfect everybody would be Famous and have a life like Eminem or PewDiePie 2018 was not at all rough but was a great experience to me Thank you all to exist in my life and will hope to meet you again You guys made me realized one thing, If there's one thing man lives for Is how even after being together for like 20 years how we are all gonna miss that one day where we met and had an actual talk about stuff like why should marijuana be banned? while rolling a joint or hitting it bluntly. 2018 Has made me less vulnerable Because I was searching for the perfect and when I got someone near to perfect, I left her and again my adventure begins.
It's an ordinary world All you expect is just what is being fed you by Rom-Coms And you think that should be my life, But the things they do On-Screen is for entertainment purpose Do you want to end up in somebody's life just because They are Entertaining, That's Fucked up And when you will be bored with that thing You will find the next good thing than the perfect you could've got? Life isn't a series of how much bad or good choices you make Life is about how you can be happy with something so little So make the most of it This is not the end of it, Many days are left to come and don't worry you all will be successful one day.
Love the Addict, Hate the addiction
Peace Out PS: If I hurt you in any way, It would be probably your fault, So you can call me and apologize for it xD PPS: I'm Sorry to finish your Jack, and hope you forgive me one day :')

item.title: Stray Heart
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: As He saw the most beautiful sunrise from the top of the terrace and was free from all those feelings which were buried deep inside, Finally Relinquished! (Extracts from Brain Stew) Next day I woke up 15 miss calls from various people Including Sharv and Kiara I opened up WhatsApp to check what's up with the group Somehow the diary entry I wrote was status of people ‘I feel like I’ve been crucified to be satisfied’ I even got messages from Sharv asking if that's a song lyric? I opened his chatbox and said 'Yes, It's from Green Day' as soon as sharv saw my text he called me and asked 'what's been bugging you, bro? You smoked up entire stock for the week' I said "I'm Tired of being compared to someone who is superior to me. I still remember the day when people use to listen to me and not ignore me and not compare it with the current situation" As soon as I sent the message I kept my phone on charge and went to my favorite shop to have my breakfast. As soon as I finished my cigarette and was about to head for my room I saw sharv outside with Kiara inside the car while sharv smoking his cigarette and was waiting for me to get out Maybe there's something about college friendship, People do know where could they be when they have a sad day. Sharv saw me and commanded me to sit in the car I refused, I said I need some time to be alone sharv took my phone out of his pocket and said Yesterday you had the time of your life even this phone was fully charged yet you put it on charge and came here. because you need your alone time. It has been 4 years Aadi, I know some things about you and you panic whenever something's bothering you. And you've been my best friend since I moved here If I can't help you then IDK What could. sharv whispers "You know today was my 5th envelope but I requested her to come I need your help, Aadi is in trouble, it was not only song lyrics it was a cry to help." Kiara came out of the car and said 'Aadi Come with us, Maybe if we hear what's bothering you, We could help you with a female point of view... I guess it's about Vidhi...Right? ' I opened the car door and sat beside the driver seat sharv took the key and started driving the car "Where are you kidnapping me, sir?" "Just take the AUX and play a good song," said Sharv and Kiara in unison Sharv said 'Do you remember what happened when we stopped near the lake, dear?' Kiara said 'Yeah I kicked your ass, tell me something new' Letting Kiara take advantage of the talk, She asked me what's bothering After a couple of songs later, I played the song 'Loser' by Dino James and said this is the issued As the song proceed further 'Maa ko Ek Choti si khushkhabri sunane salon main tha tarsa Phir jhooth bol diya karta tha abey marta kya na karta' kiara saw tears running down my eyes as sharv took the car on service lane and stopped there, and when sharv looked at me I couldn't stop myself and started crying Yaar koi to Samjho meri halat kya ho rahi hogi? It has been like two weeks Why that Vidhi has to choose Ruaan? When she knows he has been cheating on her, Why do people are so much influenced by the movies that First love is everything. Maybe it's the stupid chemical which secrets in mind when you talk to them... Maybe we should blame the dopamine. Maybe I am wrong I am still waiting for her just because she's an interesting person to talk to like even at 4 am drunk she is still an amazing person to talk to. Shayad Meri itni si galti thi ki mei usse bohot pyaar kar baitha As sharv got out of the car opened the trunk of the car While I was confused what is he doing? I asked Kiara if he told vidhi to hide at the trunk of the car? While Kiara took out tissue from her bag and handed me and said gaadi ko ganda mat karna and gave me a wink Sharv opened the bag and took out a box of cigarette came back in front called me outside Sharv Philosophy revolves around either smoke or drinks on his hand with empty hands he never takes or gives big decisions, even when Kiara proposed him he took a puff and then said yes. As soon as I got out of the car Sharv said 'I already have a pack of cigarettes in my pocket, it was a test to check how much you are still thinking about her, No I don't have vidhi back in the trunk, and if I had her why wouldn't I just tell you?' I took a cigarette from his hand and asked him what should I do? She's all over my mind...It's like she's ruling this heart. Sharv put his hand over my head and said 'I know these feelings, Even sometimes when Kiara is busy doing her work and not replying me I get scared and get such thoughts, sometimes at night when she's sleeping I wonder did I do anything wrong that she forgot to send me the goodnight message. It's okay to feel sad and depressed about such things because A. You loved her unconditionally B. You never thought what would happen to you if she leaves you C. You were totally dedicated to her You were like a child she never had, every mistake you did she used to punish you by not replying and in like an hour or so you promise her that you'll not do the same thing again. You were like a father she never had, every time she used to tell you stories about how she never had a listener like you and your advice were gold to her. You were like a brother she never had, Every time when somebody bullied her on Instagram or someone tell her mean things you were there to protect her. You were like the guardian angel to her, Remember she was about to jump on Andy's party? if it wasn't for you she would be dead by now and we all would be under some investigation. You were the friend she never had, Remember when she told you about her insecurities and how you kissed her on the forehead and said everything will be fine kiddo... you just need to learn from everyday mistakes? ' Kiara who was standing beside Aadi listened to this and she couldn't stop tears coming out of her eyes, And she said 'If she can't understand your sacrifices it's okay, maybe she'll understand it someday and may apologize you. but that doesn't mean you should give up on love just like that? love is the best feeling in this world Aadi. And remember the best times with them and maybe not compare them with the previous ones. I bet sharv would hate if I say my Ex-boyfriends never used to smoke' chuckles, Kiara Sharv added 'Remember her as your favorite chapter till you find someone special, she taught you about love, she introduced you to this world, Remember the good parts of this and maybe not concentrate over bad things?' As Kiara hugged sharv and said 'Let's take him to places where we have been before' *To be continued* PS: Dear Munchkin, Why are you so beautiful? Why do you take my breath away? How did I get so lucky How are you perfect in every single way?

item.title: Up On The Roof
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I went out for a smoke break While I was smoking, I saw this beautiful girl, Sitting outside in the backyard With a Diary in her hand, As she was doodling something. That caught my attention As I was approaching her I saw some scars on her hand some of them were fresh and raw. It was unusual to see someone over there With a more fucked up story than mine. And I was happy at that moment because I realized what I want in my life Chilled beer, Soothing playlist And my diary in which I brainstorm When I'm bored. I got a stable job now, Focussing more on my career as well as my mental health. She saw me staring at me and suddenly closed the book and saw me suspiciously and said 'You know it's a crime to violate people's privacy, you do know that right?' and put the diary back in her bag 'I am Extremely sorry, I didn't mean to. I was curious that why would someone be here at this party and enjoying their own company?' I said as I took a sip from my drink. 'It's so amusing to see people not enjoying their lives with themselves, they always need something to spend their time with. They keep themselves busy with Applications on their phone, or they discover some new music and enjoy that, or chat with a random person and start developing feelings for them' As she got up from her place and looked into my eyes and took my cigarette. 'But, isn't that something which is keeping the humans happy? Like without the addiction of the internet' I said with curiosity on my face

She saw my face and chuckled as she went towards the stairs and asked me to join her. 'That's the thing, Social Acceptance is all we live for. If I don't get enough likes on Instagram or minium 10 DMs every week I'm not popular. If I don't upload stories every hour they'll know I'm not fine.' She said as we were going up to the terrace. I was speechless for a second and I was amused to see how her brain worked up to get to that conclusion in just a few minutes, or maybe she was thinking about this all this time and wrote it in her diary too. 'May I ask you something?' As she passed me my cigarette and gave me a chance to speak. 'You do know, the people you are talking about are the ones who are using their 24 hours to themselves. and not poke on other's business. and sadly they don't exist, People are busy with Watching new TV Show to keep themselves occupied or watch the movies or read their favorite book and try to imagine themselves in that fantasy world till they look away. For instance, Look at me. I thought to be to myself would make things good for myself, But here I am, My curiosity made me ask you something' We reached the top of the terrace and as we were moving towards the railings 'Tell me One thing Sharv, What made you stop doing something which you used to love once?' She asked me 'Wait, what? Err I guess you mistook me for somebody else' I said as I was hesitating. 'Well, Yeah you clearly were lost for few years somewhere and now trying to be the same kid who you used to be years ago, By acting like you are stupid, and getting to know things, Are you some kind of Pickup line that people just get impressed by and they start talking about random stuff like these and then you just somehow make the conversation interesting?' I saw the ring marks on her finger and asked her 'What is it that made you analyze me in such a way that nobody has ever described me in such a way, Are you trying to flirt with me with complex conversations to keep up with?' I chuckled as I pointed her towards the scenery and added 'Let's just enjoy this moment, This one moment which is being abstained by many people downstairs, right now' As she started naming all the constellations and stories behind those we could see up in the sky 'I have a question for you, How did you know my name? We just met like five minutes ago?' I asked her. She looks me in my eyes and said 'You're Famous around here, at this point it's worthless talking to you about these all stuff, You're all over my friend's social feed' as she reached her bag and took out a small bottle of Jack Daniels. I chuckled softly and said 'You do know how to pull the strings, That's gripping' She asked me 'So Tell me honestly, have you ever thought about the dreams you had when you were a kid or what kind of person you would be?' 'Well, Yeah.' I replied She chuckled and continued 'And with every person coming in your life, molding you to be someone they desire to be with and in that mundane you just lost the original you, At first you were adapting the change and trying to be a better version of you or maybe the inferior version of you but you are too blind to look at yourself because you are happy  doing it for your own happiness' 'If you put it that way, yes. Sometimes I do wonder how did this man' Pointing towards me, 'has come a long way by selling the world what I am not.' *To be continued* PS: How do people find something concrete and decide what they want in life and how it's going to be with them forever!?

item.title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
She asked me ‘So Tell me honestly, have you ever thought about the dreams you had when you were a kid or what kind of person you would be?’ ‘Well, Yeah.’ I replied She chuckled and continued ‘And with every person coming in your life, molding you to be someone they desire to be with and in that mundane you just lost the original you, At first you were adapting the change and trying to be a better version of you or maybe the inferior version of you but you are too blind to look at yourself because you are happy  doing it for your own happiness’ ‘If you put it that way, yes. Sometimes I do wonder how did this man’ Pointing towards me, ‘has come a long way by selling the world what I am not.’ (Extract from Previous Post)

Chapter-II

Humor me Buddy, what is the one thing people are scared about?' She asked me while rolling a joint. 'Well, Apart from abandonment and empty promises, there is something which people do it so often that now they need proof of your amiability, no matter how nice you are, there are people who will always want to have proof, even phone calls are getting recorded by them so it can be used as proof in future squabble.' 'Exactly' She gave me a smirk  'Where have people lost the chemistry of bonding, Sometimes we do it for happiness but don't you think you are giving a little too much attention for that one thing to be there in your life like it's a life mission. Absence of it will create a void and never be filled with anything else. When have we humans become this shallow?'. She gave me the joint to spark and she continued 'Have our lives became a to-do list? To watch that romantic movie and then talk about it, discuss it, use them in as examples to explain real-life situations, fantasize them sexually and non-sexually way, and then have the purpose to become them. And when you don't achieve to replicate them, you settle for less but be happy by doing something like them.' I passed her the joint and continued the conversation 'Forgery is something people follow it like some codes of ethics need to follow in life, with also not use of brain-like writing like a programming code and expect the results to be different, When someone tries to break this code, they are criticized by the society' 'Society deserves to be hated, and then there are people who start comparing individuals with how they treated you or how well you did in the exams Like life is a series of examinations you give over a period of time. Isn't it amazing to see even the Jesus resurrection was in doubt by many people, Do you think if you go out and ask someone to loan you some money, won't he ask you for your identification before just giving you the money like Mr.Beast?' 'Hmm, But don't you think the main objective of reading a book or surfing the internet or getting drunk and socialize is just to keep us occupied till we find something else to do which amuses us. The universe is a cruel, uncaring void. The key to being happy isn't a search for meaning. It's to keep yourself busy with unimportant nonsense, and eventually, you'll be dead.' She looked up at me and started wondering if she is in between two stages where she is in complete denial but angry about something which she couldn't even address. I caught her looking at me and then I started telling her about the time when everything was going south, 'You know even after how shitty my week went at that time, There was one thing for sure that. I was telling myself that tomorrow everything is going to be alright, having that faith that I'm going to live the next day even after the heartache just made me realized. I've never been this much negative about my life. I wish I could thank him for being there in my life, I lost him 10 years ago.' 'Do you believe in Reincarnation?' She asked me 'Well, Maybe' I replied with a weird look on my face. 'I wish that I could get someone like Chop, but then he won't be like him, which could break my heart for keeping expectations from anything' She continued 'Why do people keep expectations from things they know could be there till they are the same person as personified?' She was trying to hide the ring mark as she asked me the question. I took out a cigarette and put it in my mouth as she lit up the cigarette. 'You try hard to impress people with what you don't have, you try to forget what it is to be like a vagabond. The movies and people around you tell you to get a job find a love interest and try to settle down with them, sacrifice yourself truly for the job and for the loved ones. but the one thing they don't tell you is to be yourself and do what your heart says is right. If you want to fall in love with that person, the first step itself is wrong. When things come up naturally, you develop feelings for a certain person. If by the time your main objective is to fall in love by forcing yourself, you are doing it wrong and might end up getting hurt and one day you will blame everything associated with that person for being in your life let it be something for your good or your bad you will hate it, you will start hating love because it hasn't worked for you and you think everyone will end up as you did. Unfortunately, that's not true for others.' She looked into my eyes and started looking up at stars. There was silence for a minuite where none of us said anything. She asks 'Do you believe in love at first sight?' *To Be Continued*
“Stars, too, were time travelers. How many of those ancient points of light were the last echoes of suns now dead? How many had been born but their light not yet come this far? If all the suns but ours collapsed tonight, how many lifetimes would it take us to realize we were alone? I had always known the sky was full of mysteries—but not until now had I realized how full of them the earth was.” ― Ransom Riggs,

Good one Bhau I am waiting what happen next. Keep it up
Thank-you Will keep you updated

[…] ‘You try hard to impress people with what you don’t have, you try to forget what it is to be like a vagabond. The movies and people around you tell you to get a job find a love interest and try to settle down with them, sacrifice yourself truly for the job and for the loved ones. but the one thing they don’t tell you is to be yourself and do what your heart says is right. If you want to fall in love with that person, the first step itself is wrong. When things come up naturally, you develop feelings for a certain person. If by the time your main objective is to fall in love by forcing yourself, you are doing it wrong and might end up getting hurt and one day you will blame everything associated with that person for being in your life let it be something for your good or your bad you will hate it, you will start hating love because it hasn’t worked for you and you think everyone will end up as you did. Unfortunately, that’s not true for others.’ She looked into my eyes and started looking up at stars. There was silence for a minuite where none of us said anything.
