item.title: Beautiful
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
She asks ‘Do you believe in love at first sight?’ (Extract from Previous Post)

Chapter-III

I looked into her eyes, She was staring at me for an answer as I agreed with her and asked her 'Tell me something, Are you scared of failures because you are afraid of facing that pain? That seems to be hard but once you've experienced in that field it becomes a habitat. Are you scared of new opportunities in your life on how will you react when there is nobody to guide you.? You become your guru and find a way to move on from those memories but you find nobody. You tend to fall back and not think about the circumstances because somewhere your brain is also having its anxiety "What if things don't work out" What if I fall back in the same activities which I was once doing in my leisure time. Live a trip to nostalgia for too much time that you are back on your kid mundane, All you do is play videogames and do nothing productive Way before that person came in your life and changed you completely, Have you ever felt so good about the break-up you end up wishing her the best for her future. You go back in time and stop thinking about what caused the break-off of the engagement. you end up and add the leisure activity from your not so past. And it's worst to stop something which is worst in the best of both depressions. Don't you think it's best if we just take some serious steps before the flood takes your brain into the darkness? When did we stop looking ahead on what's happening an prepare for the next pain comes up. Did you gave up on living like that already?' Did you forget how her presence made you happy, And somehow someday you are going to replace me with someone else who will blow your mind by telling things like these. Did you forget about the times when you couldn't go that lower emotionally to anyone else, she was there. She was there when you cried for your grandparents' death which happened way before she came in your life, Are you giving up on the adventure which gives us experience so that one day when your kid will grow up they wouldn't be having a proper role model. because you've set such a bar low that even your colleagues will laugh at your despair. Are you that shallow that you stopped looking for next happiness, next pain, next mission, next story. There are millions of things one can do before going that shallow, Like learning a new skill in something which he didn't even think of learning at that time because you were forced to following that you never want to take the initiative to step forward and take the command of your own life. To quote Stairway To Heaven Yes, there are two paths you can go by But in the long run There's still time to change the road you're on.' I saw the jaw drop and she was just staring at me that I'd say whatever or just lighten the mood. She was puzzled moreover with many questions in her mind she straightaway asked me 'Do you believe in the afterlife? And if you do where do you want to end up in this life' I was awestruck and hesitant at first and said, 'Well, I don't believe in the afterlife. But just for the moment if I'd imagine myself as someone who has once achieved the basic things to live by, No family, No debt, living in harmony with this world and live my life like that. with less social contact with the outer world. not taking care of his own life' She couldn't believe the answers he is giving. with every bit of question, he is trying to share something personal which he couldn't in front of others. Because some bonds are just made for that. That 3 am friend as people call it nowadays. 'And And also I'd wish to die while drinking' I giggled and continued 'Bargaining is something that people do while they are on their death bed. They think of giving their relatives A part of their whole, So you don't feel bad about living your life the way you always wanted Smoking marijuana, eating Cheetos and scribble something in a diary. Did that void they left you with, hurt you so bad that you are not even looking in the direction where was your once happy place. And you are convinced yourself that you were born broken, and that's your birthright. Now you can fill your life with projects, Your books, and your movies and your little girlfriends but it won't make you whole. You're BoJack Horseman. There's no cure for that.' After a minuite of silence, she said 'But Once when you’ve controlled a hurricane like this, you become the blow, And it’s the rest of the world that needs to run for cover. Because you become unstoppable, And that's the thing about broken people, they run towards isolation till they figure out how to be strong and how not to give up on life like that, You can fill your life with stuff which is not important to others, but that doesn't mean you need to do things just to impress them, Sometimes you do it for yourself and trust me that's the best thing anyone can do in their free time, taking care of themselves. *To Be Continued* PS: But don't let 'em say you ain't beautiful oh They can all get fucked. Just stay true to you so

item.title: Hey Jude
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I saw your msg And then we decided to meet. Not knowing each other that much clearly. But still with a faith that they might be a good company when you are drunk and having fun. We started by discussing the types of beers and how many we've drunk previously. Starting for Co-vid to loaned beers. And then we talked about stuff which is still insignificant to what happened that night. We got laid even without kissing each other. Peeling off the layer of others like an onion. You explaining me about how ridiculous movies are made these days and further knowing we both are obsessed with fight club. Sorry for breaking the first rule. And me telling you how Southpark changed my life to you telling me about the movies that inspired you. In the smoke room, you asked me if we can sit here, We sat there for a few minutes till people came and thought what's wrong with these people? Why aren't they sitting inside? You told me about how well I write and frame things. I remember asking you if I can be somewhere in your top 100 must read and you said no because you're too childish. Explaining the situation by the same movie, not breaking the second rule. We were discussing the music industry and we're drunk enough to sing the songs that are coming on tv. Even the DJ guy knew what playlist to play. Each and every song we knew at that time. Still, when those songs play, it's something reminiscing about the time I had a lot of fun singing the song. All those memories bring back to that night which became an important moment in my life. People nowadays don't have enough patience to appreciate the slow and effective pace, with every coming passing mode you become stronger and once you reach the heights you are not afraid to jump because you know you built it strong that it won't collapse without you. And that causes insecurity. You went to the washroom and couldn't even able to unlock yourself from the closet. Where you were looking for ways to escape And it was the funniest shit happened with you I can see that in your enthusiasm for telling me the entire story. When we were about to leave, You specifically told me to tip them because they were not rude to us when we were singing that too drunk. Sorry, I forgot. Habit from college We were waiting for the cab while you were insisting that you will go alone. But I was worried about the mode of communication you were going to take. Finally tricked you and said the cab driver to drive to your place. On your way to home A half an hour drive. Enough make out we could've done But we were too drunk plus that thought didn't cross my mind because I've never kissed a woman before. I wanted it to be special because I was waiting for that moment. The most adorable moment for me was when you put my hands over your shoulder and just keep your head on my chest. I know it's the first meet. But I didn't want to spoil your drunk ass mood. Humming the songs playing on the radio "Chehre Pe Zulfen Bikhri Hui Thi Din Mein Raat Ho Gayi" As I put your hair coming in front of your face behind your ears. And wish to have a girlfriend for whom I will do such things. It was the night of everything for me.
First time I ever had a smoke with a girl. First time keeping the conversation real and interested First time I've sat in the smoking-room, The first time saw someone talking about relationships like a casual thing happened in your life. Thinking about what my Ted talks could be. First time I ever got drunk and sang songs. And after leaving sitting and talk about how streaming apps are going to be the next cable service meanwhile not booking the cab but we were so into the conversation that we both forgot to book the cab. It was a little expensive but it was worth it. Thank you for not ruining it by asking me out again. I really appreciate we ended the meeting in a high node. Xx PS: You met me at a very strange time in my life. PPS:Diary entry #01

item.title: Middle Child
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I feel like I'm stuck in the middle of two generations when self-deprecation jokes were not a self-defense When roasting people was just for fun, and then people forget about it when people used to talk about ideas more than people. where people used to live in the present and not in nostalgia. From Orkut to Snapchat, Everything changed. tbh was supposed to be known as 'to be honest' and not about rating people. Filters were just what camera used to have, now every picture uploaded are gone through photoshop at least once. Posting old pictures and calling it throwback and not talking about the feelings associated with it. not only filters in photos but also wearing a mask in captions Since when thoughtful caption became a thing to be cool? and maintaining the social image became a thing? I've lived with people who were roasting each other on scraps, now maintaining streak for fun somehow roasting someone is called attacking someone, how? What changed in 10 years? We have become more sensitive and heartless at the same time, We are great in wearing the mask and pretend everything is fine with each filter either being funny or just adding you to look more fake But we don't want our friends to know the real us, by pretending or by saying what we want them to think. When did making friends have become a mind task and not a casual thing anymore? Are we becoming greedy or choosy by judging people from their social existence and not how they are in real life? To fit in the community we have a fake story about the failures and not talk about the real issue regarding past conflicts. A social media image you created, now you care about maintaining it, by putting a random funny witty or a philosophical quote and not addressing the main issue. We have been hiding under the image of being strong and courageous we kind of forgot the sole reason for us to be strong We love forgery so much that we are forgetting why we need to practice their mundane. An editing application in our phones has become common by adding a filter on our picture and posting it as a display picture for no reason, where posing for caption became more important. Did we stop living for ourselves and we started to care about others much, and that's why there is more need for therapists than friends at this point? Even after being in negation on how you never fake a story or post a highly edited post and deep philosophical caption Be Humble, sit down. You know it already nobody cares about your life unless it's some friends really worrying about you. If you can fake what you want to be online, just make sure it doesn't affect your mental health. PS: thank-you for reading and if you reached here and not scrolled down the next image.

A lot of people ask me, Am I afraid of death? Hell yeah, I'm afraid of death, I don't want to die yet. A lot of people think that I worship the devil, That I do all types of retarded shit. Look, I can't change the way I think, And I can't change the way I am. But if I offended you, Good. 'Cause I still don't give a fuck -Slim Shady (1999)

PPS: If my social image is being different than what I am in real life, I don't want to pretend to lie to myself.

item.title: Wish you were here
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded: He was in a coma all his life, He was so much involved in other's people lives that he was unable to look at his thoughts and opinions. Throughout childhood, he was bullied, he started using humor as a defense mechanism, hence the obsession with the sitcoms, he started imitating them, taking inspiration from songs and movies. The definition of insanity is doing the same thing again and expecting different results. He was one of those people who had faith in people around him and keeping expectations. Sometimes he gets annoyed by the people around him but he was unable to say because he was weak to do the simple things we learn, Growing up. He saw his friends getting married and having kids and was happy for them but when asked him about his life he was always confused and change the topic to something else. He was afraid of going that path that instead of answering those questions even to himself, he took out the easy way out. He was in a state of unconsciousness and was when asked about how he feels about the past years, he used to talk about the times described well by others. Whoever he met was greedy enough to take advantage of his situation. Called him names, tagged him as the loser, Casanova, Playboy, Spoilt brat, and many more. Every time he opened up he was either ridiculed or they just change the topic because they were unable to give him the answers or just was there for the booze and not the talks. He was always ready to give shoulder and connect to their pain even though he has not experienced it because he was always the one finding paths to make them feel comfortable. People who approached him or befriended him always used to say he is a pain in the ass but never got to know why he is the way he is. He once told someone in a drunk state that he doesn't feel good and want to change, the next morning he was ridiculed. Soon after, the next day everyone was laughing at his statement. That was probably the last time he said anything straight from his heart. It's been almost ten years to that incident. He tried giving chances to everyone but now even we can't do anything about it. He would be one of the best people who know how to cheer up others and be there in their hard time but nobody wants to look beyond that smile anymore. And sadly nobody can't now. He is comfortably numb. It's been almost 3 years now he is in Coma The guy I knew years ago was completely different at this very moment. Tomorrow his parents will take him off the ventilator under Passive euthanasia. The only regret I have about his life is how less I was able to understand him, All he was asking for a good time and I was going through books and experiment on him. If I could just change one thing about his life was to protect him from all those people who changed him drastically that now he prefers not to talk to them, even with me. Please read this for him before taking out the plug, because I don't know if I'll be able to see him during his last minutes. His Therapist KM

item.title: Fashion Victim
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
After a minuite of silence, she said ‘But Once when you’ve controlled a hurricane like this, you become the blow, And it’s the rest of the world that needs to run for cover. Because you become unstoppable, And that’s the thing about broken people, they run towards isolation till they figure out how to be strong and how not to give up on life like that, You can fill your life with stuff which is not important to others, but that doesn’t mean you need to do things just to impress them, Sometimes you do it for yourself and trust me that’s the best thing anyone can do in their free time, taking care of themselves. (Extracts from Beautiful)

Chapter-IV

'Have you ever been in a situation where you are stuck with many good options but you end up choosing something due to peer pressure?' I looked at her and said 'There have been times, where I've been thinking about being something else but was afraid to leave the herd, I think I all I would like to be getting emotional support or assurance that no matter what happens we are here for you. I guess I never got that assurance. Abandonment is one thing I am still scared of. Trying to maintain the past and present working for the future somehow made me worry about my state. We think we will be fit by keeping ourselves physically fit. But when you think you are physically fit then you try to adapt that life-style in your not so fit mental health. Why do people say talk only good about others and have positive thoughts? Why doesn't anyone tell us about the pain they suffer or how blind are we that we don't look at the situations from their shoes, but we are free to give our judgments over their state. How are we still so selfish but pretending to care about someone else just because you are scared of loneliness?' 'Tell me one thing' She tilted her head and asked me 'Are you one of those who are so much habituated to living within yourself that you don't want to take other people experience?' she nodded and added 'So whatever we talked about was just another day for you but a big lesson for me? Do you live for daily philosophy, Meanwhile people are living for food and entertainment?' 'There are funny incidents which occurred to me in where I was too dumb to take the hint or too clever to not act on something. Because all I learned from childhood is to live an easy life. I've never been the kind of guy who was stood girls up and then tell others that I am priority for opposite gender people, I was always that mediocre guy with a good sense of humor' taking the beers from the fridge 'I always keep extra beers in someone's terrace, If not someone I'd come along and have the time of my life' gives her a can of beer. 'I don't know, somehow I was always the guy who likes cans' 'So' She clasps her hand 'Imagine a situation where you are given a high platform, so high that now you wonder how to spoil yourself or grow from it. Now, What would you do after getting bored with everything you think you can be spoilt with? Every time, it's one more drag or last time sex and then moves on. But are you moving on, when you are using those things as substance, and like a weapon you'd use in war?, What are your plans?, what are you going to do if your 9-5 job doesn't work out?, When are you going to invest in something concrete as property?, Why do you think this is the end of the line when you have so many things to live for?. It's always going to be the last time. And to live in nostalgia, you do it again. But with some experience on the way. Is life all about mundane chores and expecting a different outcome, because some lines are adjusted?' She stopped the talk and started chugging down the beer, I was just staring at her creative brain and wondering why do we even compare some moments with others and rank them? Every moment is different from a different experience. is it the greed to be with best and not be with someone as flawy as you? Are you giving it 100% when you don't want them even at difficult times?' She continued 'You are distracted, You have a lot of things to think about before answering. Have you ever thought about whether you believe in god or not What are your thoughts on the judiciary system in the country? The only way you are avoiding these questions is because we are easily distracted Distracted by a funny tweet or Instagram video or talking to someone. Let it be for nostalgia or just want to stay connected because that's the company you like and you can be what you like. But you are even shy to think about how your personality will be in front of others. So you stop caring about what's happening from the third person point of view. you start to look into yourself not to impress somebody but anxiety kicks in and to avoid all the insecurities, you try to be funny. If your boyfriend is funny it doesn't mean his life is fun, It could also be because that's his defense mechanism to hide the real him. Even Fun Bob was only fun when drunk. Focus is also something this generation has lost, They start from their recent personal story to suggesting ways to deal with national-level problems. Once when you find the solace in that place, you open up yo yourself and conclude what are the problems you are going through. There are going to be many examples of people finding solace but worrying about reaching there is not the solution You force yourself to look into yourself, with the help of music or tv shows Sometimes when you got to sleep you wake up with a phone in your hand. You wake up distracted, You sleep distracted. When are you going to give yourself some time? In moments like these, I ask myself When am I going to give myself some time? When am I going to take care of my mental health and not care about others' *To Be Continued* PS: What I've done? I've created a monster that is full of emotions and sentiments. :/

item.title: Walking Contradiction
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
You wake up distracted, You sleep distracted.
When are you going to give yourself some time?
In moments like these, I ask myself
When am I going to give myself some time? When am I going to take care of my mental health and not care' (Extracts from Fashion Victim)

Chapter- V

'So what's your story? What gave you so much hope in life?' She asked

'I thought I was at the end of the tunnel but there was no light till the last moment, the change of path was the transition. the only thing I regret in life is being stupid and having commitment issues, I once wrote a suicide letter and accidentally posted it in the story writing contest and won the cash prize of $10,000. That's when I realized that people listen to you if you're at your vulnerable state. They don't want to listen if you're doing great in your life or how you have started from the bottom and now you're here. If that's your story nobody is going to be convinced that's you unless given some kind of proof, that's what I discovered that day when I had my hand on the check of $10,000. I was angry at myself for showing the vulnerable side of myself but at the same time I was bargaining with myself and that's how I learned how to wear a mask and as time passes the mask became my identity. Soon I found a place where I can hide my deepest feelings and overlay by calling them a piece of fiction, it soon became my therapy. Whenever I want to answer something I started talking to myself in my blogs. So, What about that ring mark? it's pretty fresh, what's your story?'

'I never had an opportunity to know someone better, the ring mark is the closest thing I've experience about human emotions. I never realized why she was telling me to focus on our savings. she was terminally ill and she was the only thing I had left in my life since my parents kicked me out. I feel bad that I neglected her all my life by pretending that I'm busy on my phone or hiding behind my books, I was never there when she needed me the most. I wish she had accepted my apology when she was in the hospital taking her last breath. She made me strong and I don't want to give up on the one thing I learned from my sister. This was the promise ring she gave me, it looks like a wedding ring because at that time I was stubborn and told her to get me that. What about chop? your best friend?'

'Yes, he was my best friend, the most loyal friend I had, we used to play every evening, we used to watch movies together, we even used to have sleepovers. One of the longest bonds I had with anyone. I used to tell him anything he used to listen to me console me but at the end of the day, he used to cheer me up. He died when a car ran over him when I was just 10. I saw the accident closely because I was stupid to not put a leash on him and he ran towards the other side of the road, there goes my four-legged therapy. I never trusted humans, I've seen my parents fighting almost every day and how at night just to give me a goodnight kiss they used to make up and come to me like there were never any conflicts that day. That's where I adapted how to wear a mask so perfectly that nobody would read me. those were the days when you don't have to feel bad about anything stupid you did and still learn and move on from your mistakes.have people forgot how it is like to have a day without any impurities? are we that much affected by the surroundings that instead of thinking what's best we think about how much worse can it get. Everyone is competing with other people they know, but at what cost? have we forgotten to live our lives to the fullest?'

She interrupted by hand gesture and answered 'It's the race of who is better in living, it's not about how well you live, Our society has always made us think about how well can we do to beat them but not taught us about how to take care of our mental health, people of this generation crave for one thing the most, a relationship and they fall in love with the person who is willing to give them shoulder to cry on or anyone who is listening to their bullshit but does that gives them the audacity to be their special one when you are the only one struggling to keep the relationship by giving them gifts on every date and spending ample amount of money in small things like one months anniversary or the first time we kissed each other anniversary?'

He replied with 'Don't you think it's the movies and TV shows we consume which teaches us that's how an ideal relationship looks like or that's the type of lifestyle one should crave for but deep down we all know if that's not what we want and after achieving those heights you feel nothing, you feel the years of hard work was done but not for yourself. The beauty in hard work is knowing what one wants to do in their lives and put their mind and soul into it, otherwise, nothing else matters. Just like the time, this will pass too'
To Be Continued
PS:I'm not like them, but I can pretend.

item.title: Halfway Right
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
The beauty in hard work is knowing what one wants to do in their lives and put their mind and soul into it, otherwise, nothing else matters. Just like the time, this will pass too’ (Extract from Walking Contradiction)

Chapter VI

'We are either misguided or not taught how to live our lives.
Even before a butterfly turns from a cocoon to a beautiful skipper we forget to portray the struggle is actually beautiful. People look at struggle as a bad thing, but aren't they missing the point like the caps on pyramids?' Her eyes said different stories at that time and she told 'They want to live in their comfort zone and get all the pleasure of their lives. A car, house, and whatever fundamental. it does feel like a never-ending competition where we are just against the people we call our acquaintances. We are distracted by small elements which are now a big part of our lives. our phones, how we are not being able to concentrate on our main objective of this life we are proceeding with, but at the same time, we are misguided by social media feed on how to live your life to the fullest.'


'To add that' he responded 'Roaming around the country became a trend for kids who were able to afford to stay in a new place. looking at the social media who saw your photo posing happily at that peak and how people react to it and they also copy the similar if not replicate by showing how their life is great drunk dancing in pubs with others. Money becomes just a monetization value and they either end up buying out their way from pain and misery. Mortals do chase for one big thing that is how they are going to buying out the struggle of their lives, Destination weddings, and expensive honeymoon stops are just for social validation to demonstrate that they can afford to spend an ample amount of money. Yes, people do spend a lot while buying an asset and not looking for an investment or resale value of the entity.'

She looked at me and said 'The problem is, we sometimes take things for granted, let it be friendship, or favorite ice-cream because we tend to see that actuality daily or be connected with them one means or another. We lose the core value of our comfort food when we are eating the same thing every day. The past is gone, it's never going to come back. The future is unpredictable but what's more important is what you do in the present. I was in depression for long enough to understand that I'm too afraid to give up on my life.'


'You know,' He stood up and asked me to come towards the railing of the terrace and spoke with a crack in his voice 'There was a time when nobody believed in me when I said I had depression, they used to tell me things like it's just another Illness and nobody believed me, that's when I decided to seek for professional help. Because your social circle can do wonders, they tell you things to keep yourself busy with some non-interested things and in the end, you will be distracted and you will forget if are happy'


Soon after that small monologue, she asked me 'But in this chaos would you be happy?' with a concern on her face, like she is genuinely asking.

'Is it always about happiness or the pleasure we get from doing that one thing when we are easily fatigued with a 10-second story on Instagram or Snapchat, That's pleasure; A short-lived obligation. Our mind has become a dumping ground for all the useless things we keep ourselves occupied with, every fourth person in that room want to stream and want to adapt their life as a YouTuber because they think it's easy to sit in a room and play game or talk about stuff. PewDiePie, who has become an inspiration to all the other streamers now they want to be like him. Isn't it strange we just look on the internet and who made it big we just try to imitate by looking at their followers following ratio or how many Facebook friends they have? It's like bargaining to become someone out of the crowd? But we are afraid to accept ourselves the way we are, Having a social crowd that big doesn't mean anything if they're not going to come to your funeral. I had a friend who had more than a thousand Facebook friends but when she died nobody showed up at her funeral.'


'You know,' he continued 'I feel like people out there are insecure, they are not firm. Maybe we need someone to talk to at first to know where we are standing in our lives, consulting someone who is in the game for long learning a thing or two from everyone but apply that what's fit you. Instead of looking at someone's success and following the same path, how about if we just focus more on how we want to do in our lives and commit to it? Why people have commitment issues even with themselves and lack of knowing what truly they want for happiness and not aim for pleasure?'

She tilted me to her side and looked me in the eye and said 'Nobody talks about their insecurities because it makes them feel like they are flawed, and they think its a bad thing to have some' she then showed me the scars on her hand, these are the symbol of my strength, I stopped wearing full sleeves because I hate hiding this flaws and also it's irritating to look like a drug dealer everywhere I go'

She giggled and continued 'whenever someone recommended me to get the scar removal cream, I feel if I hide the mistakes I made how am I going to be in my natural self when I'll be looking for just omitting my mistakes and is also a reminded that I was filled with rage once and now looking at it, it feels good that i learned something from that to not pretend to be someone else, and just embrace your flaws and if you are hiding it from someone, it means you just don't want them in your life, because you are scared if they judge you without knowing the entire story'


*To be continued*


PS: I look at her scars and took out my hot wheels and ran over her hand and said 'That's a bumpy road homie xD
PPS: Please remember this has nothing to do with my real life incident. This is a piece of fiction, but i'd like to ride that bumpy road someday and call it a way to show affection xD

Thank you

item.title: Let it be
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
In a world where there are competitions of who is the most beautiful person from the outside
But it hurts to be beautiful.
Everyone gain followers on how well you portray yourself by having a strong social media presence but they don't look for the hour-long makeup put behind that.
For the validation, we sometimes go to the extreme since we've set the bar so high.
We even get the fancy, waterproof version of them which lasts longer than an orgasm or in some cases hookups. But It hurt's to be beautiful.

Chapter-VII

'Everybody wants to check how they portray themselves to the outside world, and suddenly when people started giving criticism and hate behind my back. I felt like someone has been looking beneath the makeup and triggering my insecurities. But I was unable to remove the mask because I was afraid that more people would see and talk about it. I was convinced I was nobody without makeup and I was ready to give up on the cosmetic Industry. Soon after accepting my fate, in 2014 I was introduced to Snapchat and as I was getting attached to it I was using less of the inbuilt camera app to take pictures anymore[1] . Filters are just there to show that you can still look beautiful and cute without makeup. Soon I realized it was just contributing towards my mental health as I was posting the pictures with filters and getting likes and comments[2]. That's when I realized social media is toxic. People just follow others to know what's going on in their personal life or how to change that one button to flow the hormones all over the body. I don't get one thing though, how people can be so dedicated to not show any mistakes in their work when reaching to an audience, let it be a story or making a meme.
'To hide how I've have outgrown as a butterball, I started posting pictures till it shows my chest[3], and then one day an unknown individual started attacking me in social media by saying things like you're afraid of showing your whole body or you're afraid and hiding behind the filters and it made me think about no matter how much hard I try I have to accept the fact the type of content one has made defines their audiences, if they are just for the entertainment they will criticize when you don't reach that level of their satisfaction, there is a reason why El Camino was not accepted as sequel to Breaking Bad because according to people it was not good, we are busy comparing them instead of enjoying the craft and read between the screenplay and how well it was crafted to give justice to one of the characters. People were expecting more sex scenes in GOT final season and not looking for the Machiavelli's philosophy[4] or why that show was such a hit. Instead, they were focusing on the things which make tingling sensation in their pants, or make their heart beat faster than normal. I'm not a person who is there to entertain others with my pictures or caption. I just share whatever I feel. I don't even want to be a model or enter that industry. I'm just another person with flaws. Yes, it hurts to be beautiful.'


She looked at me with tears in her eyes and was trying to wipe the tears by looking at the other direction.
'Uh,' I said to lower the tension in the air 'when you have to put pressure on pretending to be okay and how people know you as the funny guy and not knowing why you are happy wearing that mask. Everyone wants to see the face and success but not appreciate the struggle to maintain the bar we've set for them. I peered around and found out friends and relatives just want to hear the fall of me and secretly feel good about their lives, and judge me. Talking about mental health is still a taboo[5] and people who are diagnosed with such issues are mocked for being too fragile or termed as 'overthinkers' . I was inadequate to remove the mask of being what I am. I was numb, that's when I did they said they miss the old me who was making jokes all the time. You know what's funny, it took a death of a celebrity[6] to make people aware of how important mental health is. We are still missing on how much power does everyone has in social media and they're misusing it instead of being creative. People do often bully because either they have low self-esteem or struggling socially [7] and this bullying has been commonly seen nowadays in social media where one creates such an image of themselves that others do make theories about it. I was accused of having side-chicks just because I haven't posted her photo on my Instagram account. And she knows well I've been single my whole life and she was my first girlfriend. While thinking about my past I found out how my classmates used to make fun of my insecurities and everyone in my college knows what are my flaws including teaching staff and the janitors as well. But here I am, accepting all my flaws and moving on from that place, Let your past make you better, not bitter [8]'

For the first time, she saw someone who has genuinely gone through similar things and sharing his experience about how well he has become since the 'great depression' of his life and now he is a warrior, but there are some bad days where even the warrior himself is at it's lowest.
And he continued 'It's all about acceptance, Once we learn to accept things the way it is, the process of feeling something profoundly just vanishes and we move on from one thing and focus on something else. And remember the words of wisdom by The Beatles- Let it be'.[9]
*To Be Continued*

PS: I still listen to your songs, and i miss you. you said you'd care if one more light goes out.[10] One man can save millions, but millions couldn't save one. I thought I was just obsessed with you but now I'm crying at the same thing you wrote to give yourself strength once upon a time.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: soo raw and right
Glad you liked it ❤️

And remember the words of wisdom by The Beatles- Let it be’. (Extracts from Let it be) […]

item.title: Crawling
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
And he continued ‘It’s all about acceptance, Once we learn to accept things the way it is, the process of feeling something profoundly just vanishes and we move on from one thing and focus on something else. And remember the words of wisdom by The Beatles- Let it be’. (Extracts from Let it be) 

CHAPTER-VIII

'Don't you think we are missing something apart from just playing the blame game, blaming the toxicity of the internet, cyber-bullying, exploiting insecurities and not move on from the blaming someone for our doings, why are we like this? have we forgotten to talk to ourselves?' he asked her while rolling another spliff.

She chuckled and replied with a soft voice in her tone as she didn't want anyone to know about this 'That's funny because the beauty of talking to yourself and deconstructing your thoughts and emotional breakouts are amazing. It feels like a therapy session, where you are talking to yourself listening to your thoughts, and analyzing them. Solitude is underrated because we are distracted by many things that are going around us and we give less importance to the things we can do it anytime. Nobody tells you about Self-care is because then others will judge them for being too emotional or confused in life. People love to conclude but not work on the cause of the same thing happening with someone else. They turn off their emotions switch to avoid catching those feelings or they are worried if it's going to happen the same?'

'Maybe people are very optimist about their life' He chuckled by saying that in a sarcastic tone and continued ' They have the fear of the unknown, they don't want to live the experience but only worry about the end product. If I go out and buy a pet but in my mind, if I'm thinking this pet is going to die one day, Will I ever be happy with that notion constantly going in my subconscious? Pets are going to die, relationships are going to end, One day you are going to die, You are going to struggle a lot and there will be more setbacks in your life, you will cry at nights for making that mistakes, also nobody will take you seriously as you'd do. But the more important question is how you want to define your life? Do you want to be that person who just lost everything to something which doesn't even matter 10 years from now?' 

She looked at him like she could connect to the connotation and replied 'Emotions play an important role in any human's life, Since the day you were born till you witness a birth of a new life, Emotions influence to make the situations better to remember. I wonder sometimes about those people who have given up on feeling positive, on how they gave up on such a beautiful thing. But instead of enjoying the moment at that time they are insecure and think about What If. Is it that hard to take a step back and enjoy the moment at that time? Or we are surrounded by such negativity and easy access to everything that we are unable to see what's pure and what's adulterate. In some relationships, Privacy is a myth. Sometimes whenever I surf the internet I casually say hi to the big brother in a suit. I can feel my wounds are crawling inside me like an insect but it is not going to heal itself unless I do something. My friends used to call me weird, They never got to know this side of me.'

As it was 3 AM already but the party was still going on downstairs, It was silence up there with nobody interrupting them, they could've done anything up there and nobody would know, they decided to stay up and have some time, bond over and get to learn something new from each other. It's been almost twenty minutes nobody has said anything. As they were smoking up and looking up at the clear sky he said something unusual but made sense as I was just listening to him and analyzing at the same time, he has a calmness in his voice like he has figured out his life. He pointed up in the sky and told how that star moved and then he said
'The irony of the change is we expect to deject the things we consider is wrong for us like people think about giving up on booze because of that one time they almost vomit to their death or that one time where they OD and did some stupid shit. Anything in abundance is not good, let it be love. We can talk about how social media has become a tool for surveillance or behavioral manipulation, radicalization, or addiction or how it is sabotaging relationships in general. But in the end, these are the things which have become an integral part of our society. It's the same with the people we come across in our lives. They have survived in this world by behaving like that, and that's their best defense mechanism to the things coming at their side. There is a reason why some people are not moved by reading something when they know how it is going to end or when the surprising element will come, It's always at the end of the movie when Marvel wants you to think about what would happen in the next installment of the movie. Learning something new is not a child's play. We cannot learn without pain. Acceptance doesn't need to be a happy or uplifting stage of the process. It could hurt at first but it will be worth it. We don't accept things the way it is, we don't accept someone as our friends just by looking at them, or just by a reference unless there is a personal connection with that person. It takes time to grow onto something, a new idea, or a new car. Adjusting to something new takes time. It's not an easy task adapting to change. Some people don't dare to move on from their past and want to be stuck in that same loop. Because after dealing with pain, they don't want to struggle to get to the root of the problem and move on. they are happy being at that place because it has comfort food and emotional outbursts. Some people are amiable for change since their whole life they've mastered the art. The art of letting it go and not forcing the thoughts to stay and in the past but learn from it and move on. The sad thing about losing someone is at the initial stage they are in denial that there was anything wrong. they are angry for the detachment they blame themselves for the death of their dog. In their head, they are bargaining for lost moments with solace. When they start fighting with their memories even at the moments when you don't want them. Depression hits hard, you wish to kill yourself. But once when you learn, you embrace your life more. and you start to accept your life the way it is.

*To Be Continued* 

PS: Five stages of grief[1]

item.title: Lithium
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
The sad thing about losing someone is at the initial stage they are in denial that there was anything wrong. they are angry for the detachment they blame themselves for the death of their dog. In their head, they are bargaining for lost moments with solace. When they start fighting with their memories even at the moments when you don’t want them. Depression hits hard, you wish to kill yourself. But once when you learn, you embrace your life more. and you start to accept your life the way it is.  (Extracts from Crawling)

CHAPTER IX

SCENE-I

'It's almost 3:30 AM, I need to have some time to think about the talk we had, I think I should....' she picked up her bag and looked at me one last time before going downstairs to tell the host that she is leaving. He interrupted her and said 'Thank you for talking with me, it's really hard for someone to open up knowing how people are keen to post gossips on social media'. She smiled at him and waved bye.

SCENE-II (Acceptance)

I started my car and was sober enough to drive, I started playing 'Pink Floyd-High hopes' as I was thinking about the conversation I had with him. He was charming enough to let me fall in his trap and still not judge me for my flaws, or pointed out the time when I was weak and vulnerable, also to make sure I don't overthink in the end he said about how people are posting telltales on social media without thinking the impact. But then what's good about having the medication and not consuming it? 

Acceptance isn't something which is always supposed to be sweet like the tip of a Cornetto, sometimes it is bitter and sometimes it doesn't feel the same. After accepting the fact that I need to grow up from that ridiculous thought and blaming myself for sister's death and being stuck in the same loop because everything I've touched till now has died and assuming nothing is going to be alright. But I always had the strength to choose my path and not get lost in the delusion of nihilism.

SCENE-III (Redemption)

When I was lost, the path of salvation was luring me and motivating me that I am better than what I was the previous day. Every day I used to wake up early spending the initial time by pampering myself by making a cute breakfast and coffee and thinking about what I can doodle today and make it meaningful and post it on my art page on social media, going through the comments and taking suggestions from and move forward from what I am left with. that was my route of redemption. Being saved from evil thoughts I had at the back of my mind. But at the end of the day, the memories of lost the beloved always used to haunt me as I switched off the lights. I never thought I had a fear of darkness, but I was afraid of the thoughts which arose immediately next minuite.

Now at this point thinking about the thoughts which were disturbing me was just something I need to face one day or another. Today it feels like a great opportunity to start thinking about them. 

SCENE-IV (Appreciation)

As I reached home, I parked my car and went inside. I turned on the neon light wires, took a shot of my bong and started playing the song 'Led Zepplin- Stairway to heaven'

"And the forests will echo with laughter"

That's when I started appreciating the circumstances that are in my life. 

I was finally able to see past all the sorrows, regrets, and all the crying that I've been doing for no reason at all. Thinking about the time where I had a choice of either fighting those demons or surrender. As much as I was afraid of facing the truth and it became a habit of avoiding thinking on this topic and distracting myself with something else like watching anime or gushing over Kurt Cobain by listening to Nirvana on loop. 

Things like the toxicity of social media, cyber-bullying, and criticism from the society which affected my mental health in a bad way felt like something which everyone would go by but it's about how well they handle and portray themselves in front of the world. Some people try humor as their self-defense, some people keep up with the trend and try to fit in with the mainstream, but they are happy in taking the ALS Ice bucket challenge but not reading and donating to a charity, because being relevant make sense to them. Sometimes I wish I was like them, easily amused. Appreciation of small gestures orchestrated by someone dissolves because we are too tired to look for hidden jokes or references and don't look between the lines. The efforts put for fixing yourself in that position is also underestimated because there is less value in social validation for struggling but more value to other unimportant assets of our lives. I am tired of pretending to be someone as I've finally figured out what I want in my life and that is to focus more on my art and appreciate all the things which come around the time. 

SCENE-V (Contentment) 

After having those critical moments in life where I was at my lowest helped me a lot to know what I want in my life, It's not a loving family or a nurturing boyfriend or alcohol and weed to keep up the spirits. It's the introspecting of my life like a Vacuum cleaner for my life, where I am sitting and evaluating all my toxic traits and focusing more on the weekly improvements on those. All those things will provide me pleasure for some minutes but won't make me happy unless I do what I want in my life. There can be numerous Job change ahead in my life because the numbers don't define what I am. It's what I have learned from them and applied or subtracted the things from in my life. One day maybe I would be good enough for some big publishing company that they give me a spot in their yearly magazine or give me a chance to publish my graphic novel. I am finally relieved of all the stress I've been going through because of knowing the very fact that 'Nothing else matters' (As the song by Metallica starts playing) 

Life is full of surprises, what comes next can be the worst and the best thing. It's all about how well prepared I am. I felt I have achieved something by explaining myself the problem with me and not without the help of my sister or anyone else. The satisfaction and pride that I felt after decoding all of my mysteries and feeling the gush of adrenaline spreading through the body which made me calm and sure about my career and life in general. 

PS: You met me at a very strange time in my life.

PPS: on 03/07/2020 I asked what should be the theme of this post, I got an overwhelming response of people, and thought about clubbing the idea into one and connecting them with the existing storyline. It was a fun for me, Maybe I'll do it again for sure. Thankyou for those four people who replied.

This is beautiful bro. I’m glad I finally decided to read this, so sorry for the delay.🥺
Thank you for reading :)

item.title: Self Care
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
‘It’s almost 3:30 AM, I need to have some time to think about the talk we had, I think I should…' she picked up her bag and looked at me one last time before going downstairs to tell the host that she is leaving. I interrupted her and said ‘Thank you for talking with me, it’s really hard for someone to open up knowing how people are keen to post gossips on social media’. She smiled at me and waved bye. (Extracts from Crawling)

Chapter X

Scene-I Search

As soon as I waved her bye from the terrace, I went down and took my car out and started playing 'Pursuit of happiness'. I was heading towards home and singing the song 
'I'll be fine once I get it, get it in, I'll be good'
Yeah, Life is a mess, but it's on us how we want to live.
If it wasn't for some elements in my story, my life would be different
Yeah everyone thinks about that. But what's good in being stuck in the past when you are moving forward?. Everyone thinks about their past and wants to change something. But rarely talk about the future because it is hazy and scary to make amends when someone is listening. keeping such meaningless expectations is what keeps up messing up the mind. People end up being sorry for the situations that never happened or think where would it go wrong but not live in the moment where everything is right.

Scene-II No love

Maybe people are too blind to see the positive side of any circumstance, because of fear or they are just anxious about themselves. When someone guides them, they take it adversely because they are made to believe that they are good for everyone. Many people who I've come across, who claim to be great listeners are usually the ones who are distracted with some unimportant things than being in peace with themselves. The number of people talking to their deeper consciousness is very rare because when someone reaches that point, it gets termed as being Religious or pious. They are not ready to fight their mental health when they don't want to move forward and take a look from another perspective. In my age group discussing something like this makes them the Instant boomer of the gang. It's life, It teaches us every day something. We are learning something new as the day passes by. It's on us how much are we able to take in and implement it in our lives. Some people find their self worth by being in a different environment while some talk about how much they love being with the group. Still, you see they are not fighting for that because they don't want to struggle much. When they have got everything easily. 

Scene-III Solitude

Once when people understand what's missing in their life by looking at their surroundings. They tend to get a similar lifestyle by buying that Smartwatch or fall in love with someone and struggling by putting their needs before ourselves. That's where the downfall begins when they think they are happy with someone they adore or like the moments spent with them. Does that mean they were not happy with themselves?
This does say a lot about how people tend to believe that to have a perfect life you need to have the correct formulae. Isn't it just as similar to stealing someone's dream and working from there? There is a big misconception between people who believes that without that 'particular thing' in their life, Life would not be complete. Because they saw it in that movie where they live happily together and put themselves in their shoes.
People generally tend to not look at what after 'Happily ever after' and that's when they are blank when they are asked the same question. When people go through a trauma, instead of going through that grieving process we tend to bleed it out in the form of words or verbal conversation. Another reason why people have been singing or writing about the same subject which impacts them the most. Instead of taking the road less taken they tend to take the easier path.
Most of the people of my generation are missing the beauty of solitude and how beautiful misery is. The beauty of struggle and taking care of yourself is underrated because it is believed that we are taught to do that, instead of impressing parents, teachers, and friends with our charisma, attitude and other things all the time.

Scene-IV Confessions of a Dangerous Mind 

I reached home, parked my car, and started rolling a joint. as the song 'Self-care' started playing that's when I was thinking about how people have been not taking care of themselves but caring about other things which don't matter in their individual lives. Things like Politics, Sports, or celebrity news matters them more than what they want to have in breakfast the next morning. Treating ourselves appropriate is something people don't look out for. There are enough proofs about people reaching the top only because they were loyal to their art and not because the numbers of followers or social media presence mattered to them, it's the self-growth that made them stand out the crowd. 
It's strange to see how people are looking at the easiest way to buy a lifestyle but not staying loyal to what they want to settle in. We humans are strange creatures. When it comes to watch that movie or listen to that artist they search for the reviews and then go for it. But when it comes to life decisions they just don't want to leave their comfort zone and want to achieve like others. 

Scene-V A lot

It's funny how it is hard now to be happy these days. A four minute song alters the mood more dramatically, The hunger of dopamine is what keeps us occupied. Everyone wants to change their past and want to live the perfect life. Everybody wants someone who would listen to them but are they heard? It's funny how we say we can't live without that certain element but when someone is relinquished with that nicotine addiction they feel a little lighter also not craving for that anymore. There are going to be things which are not going to be in your favor, sometimes it will be the other way around. There will be days when you are at your peak and when you will be at rock bottom. The more important thing is how we want to accept the fact and work on the other certainties of life. It's okay. Life doesn't have to be perfect. It just has to be lived.  Treat yourself right. It's not a tough job.

But again in the end I'm just a human with many flaws, There are people who are better than me in various aspects of life, and the process of learning is never ending. Be humble on what we've learnt in past. It's just a mental block on who's superior and inferior. These things shouldn't bother much as much it does to this generation. We need to learn to explore more because opportunities are limitless. and being happy is also one of them. We are nobody to give others hurtful opinions just because we are insecure or jealous of them. We need to focus from where the hate/anger is coming from. It's okay to feel something, It's completely fine to have emotions but outburst is something we need to take control of. It's okay if you've got 76% in graduation, there are some people who got 93% and are still struggling to find happiness where there is no competition. The number doesn't matter when your intention is just to be true to yourself. Even Elon musk had to face four failed launch before a successful one.

PS: Suddenly, you realize you’ll never have the good relationship you wanted, and as long as they were alive, even though you’d never admit it, part of you, the stupidest goddamn part of you, was still holding on to that chance. And you didn’t even realize it until that chance went away. My mother is dead, and everything is worse now, because now I know I will never have a mother who looks at me from across a room and says, “BoJack Horseman, I see you.” But I guess it’s good to know. It’s good to know that there is nobody looking out for me, that there never was, and there never will be. No, it’s good to know that I am the only one that I can depend on. And I know that now and it’s good. It’s good that I know that. So… it’s good my mother is dead. 

PPS: RIP Mac Miller ❤

item.title: All Apologies
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
There have been many things going in my brain about what to write
I have been blank just like today many times, but end up writing up something to keep up with my blogs.

Initially, it was just something that I used to like. Writing about the things which I've been afraid of saying to someone or put it up in a public. I always thought I'm the introvert type but turns out I'm not. I always thought I was the edgy kid, and by being sarcastic to every other aspect of living somewhere I lost that kid who used to feel for everything happening in my life. I'm lazy when it comes to maintaining my Instagram page because I was never the kind of guy who could portray my writings under 2500 characters.

There were times when I was grinding myself, Wringing out just to put a short story or a poem, just to stay relevant. Which caused burnout in March '19 when I started to feel that the quality of my writing was going down [1] , just because of the greed of increasing the engagement in my profile. Life isn't just about the number of people following you when you are at your creative block and confused about what to write next.

It was not exactly a writer's block but some of the things I was going through at that time. Feb '19 was the last time when I uploaded that year [2] , I did write stuff during the break I took, but never found it amusing or pleasing enough to post it. There were days where I couldn't speak up things to my therapist about but I could write it down[3]. There were days when I hung up my parent's call and wrote about the things which inspired me at that time. There were days when I used to cancel my date because I was just hit with an idea to write about[4] .

Writing something new was stressful at the initial level[5]. But now at this point, it feels like when Bilbo Baggings got out of the village for the first time[6]. I never had the blueprint to write when I make my first draft[7]. There was this peculiar habit of mine which was pointed out by my friend, I used to carry a diary everywhere I go. I used to scribble all my ideas there, and that explains why it was easy for me to write for that specific character, thus the character development can also be sensed in each one of them.

For me, writing has been a major part of my life. It's something which I have explored, from taking out my frustration to making an impact on someone who was a few steps away from jumping that high rise building. Writing has also affected my life, As always I used to write fiction, But to get in the mood I used to force myself to be in that position and write. I lost respect for myself when I realized I was writing things to grow and not for my satisfaction[8]. I admit my work was and is not hard-hitting but at least now I'm true to myself and my art.


The break was necessary because I was having an identity crisis, I was confused about my feelings because that's not me. Before the break, I was writing because I was being controlled for putting only forced positivity[9] but not because I wanted to give that character arc like Walter White or Jon Snow where they found their self-worth being next to the thing they loved the most in the end.


I took my time to come back to write again because I wanted to figure things out in my life, emotionally and mentally. Sorting out things which were hazy for me at the start but eventually, it got cleared as time passed, as soon as I took the road less traveled, to find my worth in living this life. Met a few amazing people on the way who opened up my eyes. Broken communication with people who have been a parasite in my life. Learnt a bit about philosophy, screenwriting, direction, and cinematography, even the essence can be sensed in previous posts. Watched a few movies, read some books which inspired me to focus on my peace than being the host to many creepers. Being good is one thing but being good just for the sake of being called good in front of other people is a different thing. I was the second one.
Now when I'll be on hiatus, it feels like I've grown a lot these past few months. I feel blessed for having people who I can trust whenever I come back. I regret not writing the yearly review this year which I started in 2018, I regretted not writing about me being anxious about my birthday which was another series of things, which was started in 2017. But looking back now, that was a good decision because I was not at a proper mindset. It feels great when getting my freedom and respect back. I feel blessed that I'm not the same kid who used to take everything for granted.

I feel blessed for not putting my nose in someone's frictions anymore. I feel blessed for being worse at what I do the best. It feels great to relive the things which one has suffered gravely from and focusing more on my identity and solitude. Somewhere around the lines, I've grown up. I feel blessed to have a supportive family that I've created in the past few years of my hustle. The reason behind taking a break now is because I have some other things I need to focus on. And even though if its the start of something new, it's something which is going to define me for the rest of my life. Simultaneously I'll keep working on the project I have been writing on for almost three months now. But for now, this will be the last for a long time.


I wish you all the best for starting phase 3.0 in your life.
I wish you Receive A Jabardast new phone so we can talk again.
I wish you to get a new job, I know you will fish out a great deal for yourself.
I wish you a happy graduation, It's the skill which matters not the marks.
I wish you Congratulations on your new job I know you will Bomb it.
And a big Thank You to you for reading this and giving me hope that there are people who still believe in my writing.
Signing off
Sharvilak

PS: Yes, there are two paths you can go by
But in the long run
There's still time to change the road you're on

PPS: No time to search the world around
Cause you know where I'll be found
When I come around

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Yes there’s still a path at the end of every destination 😉
It's not too late from where you stand :)

sm1 said that if your art is true it will speak for itself and yess in every word that i read from u your efforts and thoughts and passion for writing,your certain peculiar grasping skill to have the eight wrds for rhe right feelings manifests your honesty for writing. Raw as always this ones a really special post for me to bcoz smwhere as a writer i connect to this at a different level.
True that. Glad that we could feel the similar sentiments when it comes to some things not easily written. :)

item.title: Vanchit
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
There has been days in past when I though this was rock bottom, but after few days I was hitting a new rock-bottom. I stopped listening to music or watch any new TV show. Personal headway was stopped, that’s when a voice from inside was crying to keep some doors open. Even if you go in isolation, it’s fine, just remember the lost time is never going to come back. I was not in a right mindset at that time(writing the same thing for nth  number of time in past 8 years, maybe somewhere I am still hoping things to change for good) which became my greatest weakness and also my greatest strength. Introspection became a major time-spent for me where I was not looking for a guide of life but exploring all the mistakes and rectifications. It was my fault to trust on the basis of time spent and secrets shared. Willingly removing my mask in front of someone who has made peace with a mindset of peeking and delivering advices on the base of their experience. It made me understood how helpless we have became in the process of becoming a 9-5 mindset that we look for solution as soon as we are stuck with a problem, and not appreciate the fact that it’s a life changing process. I know one thing for a fact that I need to break this loop, this routine for a good reason. Chennai, you gave me memories which I never want to forget. You taught me about how to not give a fuck about anything; the art which I want to learn for so long but my morals didn’t let me. I tried making friends here but they were more curious to know about my social group. Never lost the root because never established it in first place Transferring to a new place, As usual it was normal for me to leave a place and start my new life somewhere. Don’t know where the next destination will be. There is a sort of beauty in struggling to find yourself in a place where you don’t belong. I think I found my peace in a place where I’m peeking up at the stars while blazing a joint.
I never had the privilege to love myself, till I experienced myself coming back from death, which gave me hope to ask again the same question2.  I was sitting in my hospital room. Thinking about the ways how much of aesthetic is there in the room but not in their intension. I was always been bullied which made me this one thing stuck in my head that there will be no happiness in my life. I blamed myself for being dumb at some places, I was so much focused on getting the spoon-fed that I kind of forgot how to struggle, trying to live in my comfort zone and distracting myself with other useless stuff. Instead of trying to find a community where I felt safe, I was more focused on myself and my goals. The reason I smoke a cigarette is because I need a time for myself and not because of the kick, the nicotine doesn’t elevates my mood anymore. I was abusing it just to get the time to myself. I became scared of myself so much that I need a distraction at that too. “Chal sutta maarke aate hai” became a thing for me to brooding at that time
Chennai was such an experience that I don’t think I’ll ever forget. To be humble, to appreciate little things in life. Self-care is more important than caring even about your friends just because it’s given in the book of life. Ted-talks are good for self-improvement but it gets addictive after a period of time. You get addicted to the loop of getting motivation to feel good about yourself that one day you could also be the one standing on that stage, but what’s the use of such motivation which gets lost as soon as the video ends? Have you even hit rock-bottom if you are not trying to get up from that pit. Have you ever searched within yourself instead of looking out for answer? Have you ever gone through a change so drastic that now your parents start to question their upbringing? Have you ever felt proud of your loneliness that now when you look back it just something you needed to do. There will be better days, the only thing is people get lost in finding answers instead of embracing the question and looking it from a different perspective. The only real change comes from the inside, not from the books  or songs we consume. Wish you were here 19 year old me to see what you have changed into, Thankyou for being a vulnerable crying for attention whore who was more focused on the hospitality and not on his goals.

Life is all about learning from the mistakes, embracing the pain and introspect where it went south. Pain should linger on your mind because that’s where we learn what not to do. Going back to the same routine and not learning anything new is just like playing the same mission where you have to kill the goons who are standing on the train and if not done, “All you had to do is follow the Damn Train CJ”

PS:Abhi kami na mann kameena chahiye sab
Par saali sarr par haabi
Peti pe peti pe peti, kar aaj hi dakaiti
Kar raaj hi wo kehti pranali me kaidi anaek hain
Insaaf me na deri, chalaaki bhateri
Kala ki kachaeri me pesh hai.
