item.title: Khat
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Stay true to yourself; don’t stop questioning yourself; Look back but introspect; Do make mistakes, but learn from them.

You’ve lost friends and family to various accidents, Mourn for them not because everyone else is doing it but you feel something gravely for them. <3

Fuck validation, stay true to your skillset. Everything will fall into right place.
After grind, watch your art evolve into something more beautiful,
Fuck validation; just because society doesn’t accept a boy talking about his mental health doesn’t mean you should be shush about it. The whole country thinks it’s a murder and not suicide due to depression.
Fuck them, they don’t deserve to kill your safe space. They will always be trying to bring you to their level to talk; let it be up or down. What’s the point of vision when you can’t paint it on your own, What’s A decision when you can’t make it on your own? What’s the point of writing something you can’t trip on and appreciate the art? What’s the point of art when you are just throwing out your frustration instead of making sense in your writing? Who would you believe when people change their point of view based on someone’s opinion and not from their personal experiences? Why are people getting controlled by artists? Artists are one of the greatest manipulators there ever will exist and also a great teacher if they use their skills in a proper way. But the Engagements on the views which mostly supports negativity are more as compared to others. Do you wonder if they ever love themselves, By posting about Trigger Warning posts and even their “stories” are all about sadness and how empty their life is. People do get attracted towards the pain because we have been taught to have empathy towards a humans. We are socializing being we are supposed to be the way we are.

Whoever comes after us, tell them that we are not fucked up generation. We were full of hopes and dreams once, but because of the greed to become famous, Power to be heard and how feelings are manipulated by keeping opinions matters, we kind of lost ourselves somewhere. And that’s where the mask became so absorbent that it has now became our identity. We are just mocking someone else for small pleasures of our life. People always used to come to me saying oh this is your story for sure. I say whatever makes you sleep at night is good with me, don’t fucking bother me ever again if you’re going to  look at with those judgy eyes.

I don't follow any religious beliefs, but... But when it comes to a way to select to do things which are not done by many humans you start to read yourself, and once when I did that I realized, I think, I have to make amends to everyone to whom I did something bad or said bad or made them feel bad about themselves.

Firstly I would like to say sorry to that person who knows for whom I'm writing this.
You were very dearly closed to me. But then due to some circumstances, you decided to die on me (in coma). Also to not make it feel more painful than this I made that decision to take my time with the grief, It was tough at first but you should know it's what. I hope one day you wake up and remember me as just a fun memory and nothing more than that. I know you will move on. And trust me you will be happier than me. but not with me.

These are for those people who I have trusted and said some of my personal stories hoping they won't tell it anybody else. and in that confidence, they shared theirs and promised that we will be in touch. But even if you call me even after like a month it feels like you never left.

To those people who've loved me deeply but couldn't confide me because I was too dumb to take the hints. I was self--involved in myself that I couldn't even think from that point of view and once when I started doing that, I got to know a lot about human behaviors. Isn't it strange that sometimes experiences teach you something which you couldn't learn because you were too focused on yourself by pretending to be something else and keeping all the tracks clean, and eventually that became me? Isn't it strange the only time I'm real is when I jot down something, not content-based but something creative. Wrote some stuff forcefully in past to maintain the Instagram page, which made me stop doing that because by that time the writing became like the task of acceptance from few people who follow you on your social media websites. I'm still learning new things about me every other day and I hope never to stop learning.

To those people who've been there like a wall but due to some misunderstandings I've avoided them, I'm sorry for being an asshole, even if I was or that was my nature which took a serious toll on our friendship. To all those hearts I broke by making their fake promises about going on trips or getting drunk together and talking about life. I deeply regret that. I do want to meet you to discuss stuff and discuss where we left off, And yes take pictures with you so I'll have something to put on your birthdays.

To those kids who've bullied me all my life, sorry I was such a bitch to you for standing for my rights and principles. Thank you for telling me if I continue to do so this world is going to be a mess for me. Also love it how Starting from that guy who almost killed me to my best friend for punching me every time I say sorry, She gets angry easily if I say sorry for wrong or non-worthy things(best friend=bad?).

To those kids who I've been good to irrespective of gender, age, etc, etc. Please dont treat me like your role-model. Thank you for making me believe that I'm not a piece of shit. For me, Self-Therapy helped me a lot to think straight and prioritize the elements of my life.

Finally, Thank you This bitch life, I will always be grateful for your stay. You were an awesome teacher, but mostly silent. Maybe that was the lesson that I have to take from here that it's okay to lose contact with people and it's completely fine to be with yourself and focus on yourself.

PS: Life is a bitch then you die, right?
Sometimes life’s a bitch and then you keep living.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: True.. Sometimes life is a bitch and you have to keep living because you don’t haver an option to die.. Bitter truth.. But I loved this piece of writing.. It’s soothing and it’s the best piece of all your work.. Thank you once again for writing this soothing piece and reducing the effect of my mental illness indirectly.. ☺️

item.title: Purple Sunshine
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I

When I was a kid, there were times when people never understood my pain, I tried explaining them my situation my story my frustration my anger but they were unable to feel what I was going through. Even being in the same class, I felt like I don’t belong there. They stopped trying to understand me I stopped having expectations from them. I made peace with myself that I don’t belong here. I thought if I meet different kind of people maybe they would feel me and guide me in a proper direction. I was lost in my own thoughts, like a tangled string who wants to make things right. But I was tired of trying and not reaching somewhere. They say give it some time, you will forget about it eventually and be happy.
But tonight, everything’s going to change. Either I jump from roof or alleviate the roof.

II

“Let's listen to your playlist while you tell me about how you got those scars and how you've accepted your flaws and worked on your insecurities.
Tell me how you are that happy go lucky girl but when it comes to certain situations you put your heart and soul in it.
Tell me how you call yourself a pessimist but all you see is from the glass half-filled perspective.
Tell me how did you get these scars and how it doesn't affect your mood when asked about your hard times.
Tell me how did you accomplished that when you look in the mirror and still be cheerful and happy.
Tell me how did you remove your mask and do not hate yourself at all for whatever you do.
Tell me about your daddy issues and how you got over those;
Tell me about the time when you were heartbroken and nobody was there to talk with you.”
She looked at a curious person, like he has no idea how can a woman be self-sufficient and strong at the same time. He came from a place where misogyny is a common thing like black coffee, and discrimination is common, he came from a place where racism still exist and even though he tried to move on and get up from there, Loneliness hits him; he lost all his friends and stopped letting in the negativity. He tried to make peace with that there is nobody out there like him; Until he met her.

She smiled at him and stroked his hair kiss his forehead and said “You are cute,you know that?” and further continued “it’s okay to be different and have the learning ability for the different culture. People are weird, they follow a religious Morales and get stuck in the superstitious beliefs, when they get out of that, they are stuck in the loop of getting pleasure from somewhere. I learnt the hard way to acknowledge different opinions and different perspective but also keep them in mind while introspecting. Words have changed, ‘I feel bad’ is the new envy, ‘I wish I had’ is the new jealousy

III

Solving mystery has always been a fascinating experience for him, scrapping and examining every detail hoping to find hints and answers made him felt alive. The kid who had constant craving to learn something died somewhere when he saw how people around him are only promoting disappointment, discouragement and forced happiness. All he wanted was to hear the words “I am Proud of you beta”.
But his parents were too blind to see how their kid was trying to pick up and mend the pieces of the broken mirror they want to see themselves in. Because that’s how they think being happy is. In this competitive world of social media, the one who is away from all these are the real winners. He stopped uploading everyday because it was taking a toll on his mental health, constantly thinking about the likes, comments, captions instead of thinking how he feels about things he do on a daily basis. Free are those people who are living their life doing whatever they want. It’s funny how some of us are never going to look at our flaws, introspect and improve, but when it comes to make a statement about a certain person/entity these are the same people who are first one to pull the trigger. I got problems, now everybody on my block got them. He tried to find solace in many places, with someone, with few people, with a certain tv show or book but in the end all he was trying is to get far away from the self he hated the most. Because he was scared he might kill himself if he dwell himself in those thoughts. Education did made him aware of his situation and made him grown mentally but also became his curse. He was unable to handle so much truth. All he wanted to do is free himself from the truth bombs.



IV

This Not giving a fuck attitude has changed him a lot. He stopped caring about people surrounding  he even stopped caring about himself, he couldn’t find himself  feeling when he was happy or in grief. He used to take all his life milestones as a Thank-you Next kind of situation. He never felt a heartbreak so bitter at the age of 13 ever again. He never felt a wish to celebrate his success but he gets over it easily. When he was kid he wanted to become a superhero saving lives, but now all he is okay with being the silent hero of his own story but all he want is to live in harmony and have a peace of mind at the end of the day when he is sleeping on his bed. Hoping not to face these again, and then comes another day of grind. He finally got a reason to live, a reason to fight for another day. In all the ignorance and days he spent in darkness He found himself but was still lost, He only thing he needs to open that door is the key. Little he knew that key was the time spent with the one night stand who never left.

V

People his age are still stuck in the loop of stereotyping things. The environment they are growing up is what mould them to be what he is. But right now he is speechless. Contemplating between Life and death. He is overdosed on this drug which they consumed that night.
She advised to hang in there. It’s okay if the mask fell down, you can always pick up and wear it again, but remember to humble yourself down. Make mistakes a lot of them but learn from them also. Have faith in yourself honey. Everyone want to figure out how complicated life is and they want to break the barrier. keep the frustration, keep the anger, tame that fire inside you, Keep it real. If you are genuinely feeling about something you should be happy because it’s rare to fake them in this modern world. Evaluate yourself, Look into that mirror, look into his eye and you will find some questions unanswered. You will find yourself struggling from questions like greed, wrath, envy, negativity and even hatred. You will face situations where you might have to choose between the toughest choice. You will always be compared with your old self, and that’s the real competition. You will learn a lot from experiences. Good, bad trips are part of life. Without a twist there wouldn’t be much fun in living yo. Find someone to love soo immensely that even if they are at their lowest  and if they give you a call, next moment you are there for them. People will advice you or even give you suggestions on the base of what they have seen in this world. Never close them, keep learning from others. Cut off the negativity and focus more on your self growth and surroundings. All my life I’ve seen my parents fighting almost every fortnight when I came home, but after every fight at night after dinner they used to sleep in the same bed. For the longest time I used to think that’s how getting married is like. Me and my younger brother used to play till late night so we don’t see our fear in front of our eyes. My brother used to cuddle me to sleep crying as I couldn’t sleep but think about trauma in his mind. The motherly instinct inside me kicks in whenever I see a troubled child with a heart that pure like you to encourage and have faith. Because once when you find a way to control yourself and you will find a reason to live and love. Reconsider!

PS: “The hardest thing for – not only an artist but for anybody to do is look themselves in the mirror and acknowledge, you know, their own flaws and fears and imperfections and put them out there in the open for people to relate to it.“ – Kendrick Lamar

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Second and fifth part had my heart .. a soothing read and relate narrative .... it feels something to read ur pieces🔥🔥🔥🔥
Thank you :') Means alot <3

item.title: Bubblecars
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
I

I remember I was 10, I was her number 1 fan, she used to listens to me. We used to listen to Linkin Park and she used to tell me about how mental health is important and how nobody is going to teach you to love yourself. She was my best go-to for anything that happens in life. She used to bring my favorite food after my karate training. She was the one who encouraged me to do some physical activity, and she also used to come with me and sometimes watch me from the glass just outside the class. She was my best friend, even though I never understood her she used to pat on my back and kiss my forehead and say One day you will understand.

  II

I was 14 when she got to know about my first relationship, I told her about this girl, I could see her blushing and feeling proud of me, but she had to show her tough-side at the same time. She appreciated the honesty we kept in the relationship. She always used to tell me how one day I'm going to look up to guys as a role model and soon there will be a crack in our relationship. I never understood that until the day came. 

III

The pain of losing someone is more than anything for me at that time. I never felt so much for someone ever in life. Meanwhile, Societal pressure got me. I stopped going to my karate classes, I never went after getting a brown belt Rank II. The pain started elevating when nostalgia hits me while taking the same path to the destination and hoping someone would see me. I used to come home late. I was doing great in my studies because I used to hate them. I just wanted to prove to them that the death of my best buddy never mattered to me. I was just distracting myself by not being myself. At that time studying was therapy for me, I was constantly reading about things just to keep myself not to fall into depression.

IV

Nowadays, even cheating is considered as part of a relationship. The love triangle has been a very common thing. I was busy laying the foundation of my career, but miserably failing to maintain relationships with people. I've become numb to people who surrounded me, on the bright side, my parents did not know about my episodes where I'm destroying things, I searched for a part-time job to keep myself occupied and with that money, I used to buy things that I broke. Eventually, I started buying things that I wish to keep, Filled them with fake sentimental values so I start to have feelings for something. Does it even matter when you have a perfect condo for yourself with all the brands you desire, the perfect sofa set, the King Size bed The plasma TV, hundreds of clothing varying from DKNY to Blackberry. Shoes which I would wear only once in my lifetime. Do these things matter when I'm unable to love myself?

Maybe it's my fault to not get educated first that experiences cannot be bought. I could get laid right now, but now I have OCD and my brain stops functioning properly if someone is invading my personal space. 

  V

She caresses my hair and looked into my eyes as I was trying to act tough in front of her, and she said "It's not good to hide your wounds, you know" she held my hand firmly, "I'm looking after you, even if we are not together in the future, I just want you to do well in life."


She's so pure and perfect for this world sometimes I wonder if it was the right decision to take her own life. Maybe because I couldn't understand her pain. 
.
"The pain is so deep... 
you can never scratch that deep." She always used to say this.
.
.
Instead of taking a long path to redemption, she took the fastest one.
.
.
.
I'll always love you, Sister
You will be missed
Dated: 16/04/2012
PS: It's your turn in monopoly, roll the dice already, I'm still waiting to celebrate when you come out of jail.
❤

item.title: Visit to shrink
item.dc:creator: himanshoe
item.content:encoded:
Q. Did you zoned out again while talking to your friends?

Yes, I did, and it has been happening a lot, maybe because since I've been acquainted with myself for a long time. There's nothing that excites me, so I zone out for a minuite to think about why and how I ended up here? It's because peers surrounding me are stuck in the system.

"Maine sirf pucha Kaun meri taraf, aur mujhe dikhe sirf kaun meri tarah"

.It did make me realize that maybe I'm ready to admit that I prefer myself over other's opinions and stories, it does make me look selfish, but if that is helping me to clear my mind and see the path.
There are days when I don't do much productive, there are some days where I'm not sleeping for 50 hours straight, hallucinating and almost sleepy but still trying to write that piece just because I felt I should.
Even a broken clock shows the correct time twice. We're a generation of broken hearts, who are willing to look for a shoulder to rely on, an ear to be listened to a mouth to satisfy the tensions and urges. But the moment people generalize them, they get offended. It's funny how we look up to ted-talks, self-help books for motivation but we failed to look at the boiling fire inside us. Isn't it weird how we talk about our goals, dreams, and ambitions to many people but we start to lose interest as the more people we talk to about?

.

.

.

I zoned out again and this time I don't feel bad about it because it was necessary at the moment. I was sure this time what to take in, there was this girl in my feed, who made a tik-tok video saying 'Inhale the good shit, exhale bullshit'. I secretly thank her for such words.
I zoned out because I realized this is not the crowd I want to be in, want to be known for.
I zoned out because of lack of creativity, lack of exposure, lack of self-awareness, lack of keeping it real. but more of sugarcoating things with how they look, the clothes they wear, and how they try to pretend their best version, but in reality, they are just avoiding the main question.
They look at my mask and think I'm stupid, I let them think because I don't want them in my life. I zoned out because this shit's too basic, maybe I don't belong to the people who are nearby, or maybe they don't deserve me because they ain't gonna reach my level in mere hours of talk.

I feel like I'm lost in translation, we all heard the same thing about how to live our lives but when it came to implementing, some of us selected the path most taken, ticking checkboxes given to them from a higher authority, and applying the same rules, replying with the same textbook answers with an ability to reproduce the same things and coming to the same conclusion, instead of searching for true intensions behind big complicated questions they prefer to be the miniature version of people they've always looked up to as role model.

.

.

.

.
I just wish that my future wife reads this and promise me that we won't be turning into our parents.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: I wanna ask you if I can reblog this?
Relatable.. ❣️💔
